- Collaborate closely with developers, product analysts, project analysts, and stakeholders to ensure quality outcomes
- Proactively flag risks and propose solutions before they become problems
- Support and contribute to automation testing initiatives (nice to have)
- Take end-to-end ownership of quality in your assigned products/projects
requirements:

- Advanced English — able to communicate fluently in writing and speech with cross-functional teams
- High sense of responsibility and ownership — you see things through, not just report them
- Proactive mindset — you don't wait to be told; you identify gaps and act
- Good attitude and collaborative spirit — you make the team better
- Automation experience (Playwright) is a plus
benefits:
- Birthday leave
- Competitive salary package
- Learning & development opportunities

title: AI Software Engineer (Python/Go/C/C++ & AI Agents)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2026TD450888 - AI Software Engineer (Python/Go/C/C++ Backend & AI Agents)

Xây dựng phát triển các sản phẩm AI có khả năng tự động lập kế hoạch, ra quyết định và thực thi hành động, được triển khai thực tế ở quy mô lớn, các hệ thống AI thế hệ mới như:- AI Agents (Autonomous Agents)- LLM-powered Applications- Multi-agent Workflow Systems- AI-driven Backend Services- Intelligent Automation Platforms

Trách nhiệm công việc (Responsibilities):- Thiết kế và phát triển các hệ thống Backend tích hợp AI/LLM Agents.- Xây dựng các Agentic Workflow, A: Planning – Tool Use – Memory – Execution.- Phát triển các dịch vụ AI dưới dạng Microservices (FastAPI/Flask/Django hoặc Java/Go services).- Tích hợp các mô hình AI vào hệ thống sản phẩm qua REST/gRPC APIs.- Triển khai hệ thống AI production-ready với Docker/Kubernetes.- Tối ưu hiệu năng inference: latency, throughput, cost.- Làm việc với dữ liệu lớn và hệ thống có lượng người dùng cao (đặc biệt trong tài chính/ngân hàng/chứng khoán).- Nghiên cứu và ứng dụng các kỹ thuật mới: RAG, Function Calling, Multi-agent systems, Reinforcement Learning Agents.- Đảm bảo các tiêu chuẩn về bảo mật, an toàn và khả năng mở rộng của hệ thống AI.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính,Công nghệ phần mềm, Hệ thống thông tin, Tự động hóa, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc các ngành liên quan
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế làm Backend tại công ty hoặc dự án lớn.
- Thành thạo ít nhất 1 ngôn ngữ Backend: Ưu tiên Python, Go, C/C++
- Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế hệ thống Microservice Architecture.
- Thành thạo một trong các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu:PostgreSQL, MongoDB...
- Hiểu rõ API design (RESTful/gRPC), bảo mật và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống.
- Có kinh nghiệm với: LLM Agents (GPT, Gemini, Claude...), LangChain / LangGraph/ ADK, Autogen, RAG pipelines, Vector Database(Milvus, pgvector...). Tool-use Agents (Function Calling), Memory + Planning + Multi-step reasoning systems
- Thành thạo Git/GitFlow
- Có kinh nghiệm: Docker, Kubernetes...Ưu tiên:+ Có kinh nghiệm trong domain: Tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán+ Hiểu biết về AI Safety, Guardrails, Model Monitoring.+ Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hệ thống AI cost-efficient ở production.+ Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV)+ Có kiến thức, Kỹ thuật xử lý dữ liệu:NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Video Understanding+ Hiểu biết kiến trúc mô hình: CNN, RNN, Transformer, Attention, GNN…

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển?- Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn

Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage:- Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers
benefits:
Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện:

- Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể…
- Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm
- Khám sức khỏe định kì
- Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC)
- Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân:

- Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng
- Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng
- Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh.
- Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...)

Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với:

- Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng
- Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: Senior AI Engineer (Agentic AI, MLOps)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Mục đích vị trí công việc

- Là hạt nhân kỹ thuật trong việc thiết kế, phát triển, vận hành và tối ưu hệ thống Agentic AI – từ POC đến Production với các mục tiêu:Thiết lập pipeline AI Agent: Data ingestion → model training → CI/CD → monitoring, đảm bảo hiệu quả vận hành (thời gian phản hồi, độ chính xác, availability).Tối ưu liên tục thuật toán và kiến trúc: giảm thiểu sự can thiệp thủ công, nâng cao tính ổn định và khả năng mở rộng của giải pháp.
- Thiết lập pipeline AI Agent: Data ingestion → model training → CI/CD → monitoring, đảm bảo hiệu quả vận hành (thời gian phản hồi, độ chính xác, availability).
- Tối ưu liên tục thuật toán và kiến trúc: giảm thiểu sự can thiệp thủ công, nâng cao tính ổn định và khả năng mở rộng của giải pháp.
- Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật và chuyển giao công nghệ cho nhóm vận hành, đảm bảo ứng dụng dụng hiệu quả vào quy trình kinh doanh thực tế.

Trách nhiệm chính

- Thiết kế kiến trúc agentĐánh giá use – case, đề xuất Poc, định nghĩa module (decomposition, memory, planning, execution, feedback loop).Lựa chọn framework và công cụ (LangChain, ReAct, multi-agent orchestration) phù hợp.
- Đánh giá use – case, đề xuất Poc, định nghĩa module (decomposition, memory, planning, execution, feedback loop).
- Lựa chọn framework và công cụ (LangChain, ReAct, multi-agent orchestration) phù hợp.

Quản lý vòng đời giải pháp

- Xây dựng, vận hành pipeline MLOps/LLMOps tự động: data ingestion → feature store → training → containerization → deployment → monitoring → re‑training.
- Hướng dẫn team DevOps/Full‑stack tích hợp và vận hành model trong môi trường production, đảm bảo agent hoạt động ổn định.

Tối ưu hóa & mở rộng

- Giám sát hiệu suất agent trong thực tế, phân tích logs và metrics để liên tục tối ưu hóa thuật toán và hệ thống.
- Phối hợp với team Platform/Infra thiết kế và duy trì thư viện thành phần chung (templates, connectors, wrappers) nhằm đẩy nhanh việc phát triển, triển khai và tái sử dụng các agent mới.

Phát triển năng lực đội ngũ

- Tham gia tổ chức buổi workshop, đào tạo nội bộ về kiến trúc agent, MLOps và multi-agent coordination.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên. Chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Toán hoặc lĩnh vực có liên quan.
- Nền tảng và kinh nghiệm thực hành Machine Learning, Deep Learning.
- Triển khai và vận hành model lên ít nhất 1 nền tảng cloud: AWS/GCP/Azure ML.
- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm với LLMOps/MLOps, tham gia POC Agentic AI.
- Thành thạo Python, ML Fundamentals.
- Hiểu khái niệm cơ bản ML: supervised/ unsupervised learning, regression, classification, clustering.
- Nắm nguyên lý LLM (Transformer, attention).
- Kỹ năng xây prompt tối ưu, đánh giá chất lượng đầu ra.
- Tư duy & kỹ năng phân tích.
- Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề.
- Kỹ năng làm việc độc lập.
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc theo quy trình Agile/scrum.
- Khả năng học hỏi nhanh.
- Sẵn sàng nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm giải pháp mới.
- Fine – tuning LLM (Nice to have)
benefits:
Quyền Lợi:

- Chế độ đãi ngộ cạnh tranh. Lương tương xứng năng lực.
- Thưởng hấp dẫn , bao gồm : Tháng 13, Tháng 14, Tháng 15. Thưởng vào các dịp lễ tết, Thưởng đột xuất cho cá nhân có thành tích xuất sắc, Thưởng theo kết quả kinh doanh công ty ….
- Các khoản đóng bảo hiểm được thực hiện tốt hơn Luật quy định.
- Bảo hiểm tai nạn, sức khỏe, kiểm tra sức khỏe định kì cho tòan bộ nhân viên.
- Chế độ đào tạo: Chương trình định hướng nghề nghiệp rõ ràng cho nhân viên. Được tham gia các khóa đào tạo trong và ngoài nước.
- Các họat động tập thể: Team Building, Ngày hội gia đình, Văn nghệ, CLB thể dục thể thao, nghỉ mát…

Môi trường làm việc:

- Thời gian làm việc: 40 tiếng/ 1tuần.
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện và năng động.
- Cơ hội thăng tiến, phát triển nghề nghiệp không giới hạn.

title: Senior QC (Automation Tester, QA QC)

​Đảm bảo chất lượng dữ liệu cho AI:

Học hỏi và phát triển:

title: (Senior) DataOps Engineer
label: HOT
reasons:
- User-first mindset, solving real needs with impact
- Data-driven culture, decisions backed by insights
- Safe space to innovate, fail fast and grow faster
jobDescription:
About GHN

Giao Hang Nhanh (GHN) is one of Vietnam's leading logistics enterprises, confidently providing superior services: "SMARTER, FASTER, MORE COST-EFFECTIVE." We support millions of businesses in optimizing their operations and create thousands of jobs for the Vietnamese people.

Established with the mission to revolutionize the logistics industry and driven by a technology-centric development approach, GHN continuously applies advanced technological solutions to every order. This aims to streamline operational processes, enhance delivery efficiency, and provide fast, secure, and effective service experiences for all customer segments – from e-commerce platforms and retailers to individual consumers.

With a nationwide network covering all 34 provinces and a strategy of continuous innovation alongside a robust infrastructure system, GHN has been affirming its pioneering position in the rapidly growing e-commerce and logistics sectors in Vietnam.

Why Join GHN?

This is a pivotal opportunity to join a rapidly growing e-commerce delivery leader in Vietnam, where your contributions will directly impact our strategic direction and market position. You will be part of a team that embraces cutting-edge technologies, data- driven innovation & discruption to solve real-world problems and enhance millions of lives. We offer a dynamic and collaborative environment where you can leverage your expertise, grow professionally through challenging projects, and make a significant impact on our success.

About the AI & Data Team

At GHN, our highly motivated AI & Data team is dedicated to establishing GHN as the fastest, most reliable, and convenient delivery service in Vietnam. We achieve this by developing and adopting advanced, data-driven decisions and solutions, making data capability a core business driver for operational efficiency, scalability, and customer trust and happiness.

Job Summary

We are seeking an exceptionally skilled and experienced Senior DataOps Engineer to manage, automate, and scale our high-performance, open-source-focused data platform. This role is central to our data strategy, requiring a blend of DevOps principles, deep infrastructure expertise, and data engineering fundamentals. The ideal candidate will ensure the reliability, security, and efficiency of our end-to-end data lifecycle, from ingestion and streaming to computation and visualization.

Key Responsibilities

- Platform Design & Automation: Architect, deploy, and maintain scalable, robust, and secure data infrastructure on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE). Focus on automation using advanced scripting (Python, Go, Shell) and Kubernetes-native tools (e.g., manifests) across development, staging, and production environments.
- Orchestration & Data Flow: Design, implement, and optimize complex data pipelines using Apache Airflow. Ensure reliable data movement and scheduling for batch and streaming workloads.
- Streaming & Real-Time Data: Oversee and manage our diverse streaming ecosystem, including Kafka and RabbitMQ. Implement and administer Change Data Capture (CDC) processes using Kafka Connect with providers like Debezium, Confluent, and Lenseio.
- Data Governance & Security: Enforce data access control and audit policies using Apache Ranger across compute layers. Implement security best practices using Google Secret Manager and KMS for sensitive data and credentials.
- CI/CD & Deployment: Own and enhance the continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipeline for data services using GitLab and ArgoCD, ensuring fast, reliable, and consistent environment rollouts.
- Performance & Optimization: Tune and optimize compute engines (Trino, Spark, Doris) and query performance on BigQuery. Manage storage layer efficiencies on GCS.
- Monitoring & Observability: Establish and maintain comprehensive monitoring, logging, and alerting using tools like Grafana to ensure high availability and proactive issue resolution.
- Metadata & Cataloging: Maintain and leverage metadata management systems (Hive Metastore, DataHub) to ensure data discoverability and quality across the organization.
requirements:
Our Comprehensive Data Platform Stack

Candidates should have demonstrable, deep experience across the majority of the following technologies:

- Compute & Query: Trino (or Presto), Apache Spark, Google BigQuery, Apache Doris
- Streaming & Messaging: Apache Flink, Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ
- CDC & Connectors: Kafka Connect (e.g., Debezium, Confluent)
- Infrastructure & Orchestration: Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Apache Airflow
- Databases: MongoDB, AlloyDB, MySQL, Redis
- Policy & Security: Apache Ranger, Google Secret Manager, KMS
- CI/CD & Tooling: GitLab, ArgoCD
- Languages: Python (Mandatory for DataOps), Java, Scala, Go
- Storage & Metadata: GCS, Hive Metastore, DataHub
- Table Format: Apache Iceberg
- Observability: Grafana, Superset, Metabase, Looker

Qualifications

- Experience: 3+ years in a DevOps or DataOps role focused on building and managing large-scale, distributed data platforms.
- Cloud Native: Deep expertise in cloud-native architecture, particularly on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Automation & Scripting: Proficiency in Python and Shell scripting is mandatory. Experience with Go or Java/Scala for supporting data services is a strong asset.
- Containers & Orchestration: Advanced hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes (GKE), including writing custom operators or complex deployment manifests.
- Operational Excellence: Proven track record of designing, implementing, and maintaining high-SLA systems, with a strong focus on security, observability, and disaster recovery.
- Communication: Excellent communication skills, capable of explaining complex technical issues to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Education:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, Information Systems, or a related quantitative technical field.
- Master's degree in a related technical field is highly preferred.
benefits:
- 13th-month salary, performance bonuses, and KPI bonuses
- Health insurance, Social insurance, and Unemployment insurance
- Medical insurance
- Annual health checkup
- Annual salary reviews
- Annual team building/company trip
- Ongoing internal and external training opportunities.

title: Mid/Senior Fullstack Engineer (Python)
label: HOT
reasons:
- A leading Swiss product company
- An attractive compensation and benefit package
- A strong culture of growth, wellbeing and balance
jobDescription:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!

SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.

This job refers to our Real Estate brands, Homegate and Immoscout24, the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings. We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing.

We are looking for a Mid/Senior Full-stack engineer (Python) to help us build the future of the Swiss real estate market by contributing to our cutting-edge, cloud-based technology stack. The platform's core function is to digitally connect tenants with landlords and property managers, streamlining the entire process from initial listings and managing viewing appointments all the way through to the submission of digital applications. Your work will contribute to making the rental process more efficient for all parties involved.

You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential.

Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.

Our tech stack

- Our frontend services utilize a variety of technologies, including Vue.js and React, with Typescript as the language of choice. These services consist of a mix of client-side, server-side, pre-rendered, and hybrid web apps. Additionally, some services leverage Django templates for the frontend, often mixed with React written in Typescript.
- Our backend architecture utilizes a combination of technologies. We have services built with Node.js and Typescript, following a serverless and microservices pattern in AWS, leveraging services like Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and S3. Additionally, we have services built with Python and the Django Framework, running as a modularized monolithic architecture in Docker containers on on-premise servers.
- Our monitoring is done mainly through Datadog and Sentry.
- Our codebase and services are documented using Backstage.

Your mission

- You will design, implement, test, and deliver new features that bring value to our users.
- You will encourage knowledge sharing and drive technical discussions within the team.
- You will translate high-level ideas and requirements into practical solutions.
- You will own your own services and be responsible end-to-end for everything from development and testing to delivery and monitoring.
- You will collaborate with other engineering teams as well as your existing team to ensure the stability of our microservices architecture.
- You will challenge the status quo and continuously aim to improve the architecture, code, and tools to ensure the delivery of high-quality software.

Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow.
requirements:
What will you bring to the ride?

- You are fluent in English, with written and verbal communication.
- You've got 3+ years of experience in web development, building user-facing products with end-to-end ownership across multiple layers of the stack.
- You've got 2+ years of experience with Python for backend development.
- You are proficient in working with databases.
- You are a creative, adaptable, and problem-solving individual who thrives in collaborative environments.
- You have a positive attitude and are a team player.
- You are open to change and able to propose solutions.

It would be a big plus if you also have some of these:

- You have prior working experience with Django framework or similar.
- You have prior working experience with frontend frameworks like React or similar.
- You have prior working experience with JavaScript/Typescript and Node.js.
- You have prior working experience with APIs and microservices.
- You have prior working experience with cloud service providers like AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud.
benefits:
- Purposeful & Impactful Careers: Be part of SMG Swiss Marketplace Group, Switzerland’s most relevant online marketplace, promoting sustainable consumption, contributing to a greener society...
- Attractive Compensation: Top salary, Full pay during probation, 13th-month bonus, Annual profit growth share plan, Commuting allowance…
- Generous Benefits: 21+ annual paid days off, 10 paid days for sick leave, Full Social insurance contributions plus Premium private insurances for you and your family…
- Strong Learning & Development: Working with large scalable systems, Modern technical stacks, Transparent career paths, 24 days for learning, Personalized development plans, Yearly education budgets, Hackathons, LinkedIn learning…
- Fair Recognition & Evaluation: Clear OKRs, Regular performance check-ins, Annual performance cycle with 360-degree feedback mechanism, Promotion opportunities for all…
- Holistic Wellbeing & Balance: Annual health check-ups, Flexible hours, 40-hour work week with manageable workload, Diverse team bonding & wellness activities, Trips to Switzerland & Europe…
- Modern Work Environment: Inclusive & innovative culture, Hybrid working model with additional 12 remote weeks per year, Top-tier equipment, Best-in-kind AI assistants…
- Supportive Onboarding: Comprehensive assistance to help you settle in…

APPLY NOW, SO A GREAT CAREER OPPORTUNITY WON'T BE MISSED!

reasons:

jobDescription:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC TỔNG QUAN

Chúng tôi tìm kiếm AI Engineer Junior đam mê nghiên cứu và ứng dụng các công nghệ AI, đặc biệt trong lĩnh vực Large Language Models (LLM). Bạn sẽ được làm việc trong môi trường nghiên cứu - phát triển năng động, tiếp cận các công nghệ AI tiên tiến nhất.

requirements:

ĐIỂM CỘNG (NICE TO HAVE)

- Có portfolio: GitHub repo, bài viết blog, demo AI application

The position works closely with business, marketing, operations, UI/UX, development, QA, and leadership teams to define product direction, translate business needs into delivery-ready requirements, and ensure successful release outcomes.

title: Backend Developer (Java, Golang, NodeJS)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
label: HOT
reasons:

- Go build it on top of the state-of-the-art tech

jobDescription:
Job Overview

We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam building next-generation platforms for trading, customer management, and digital services. We are seeking a Backend Developer with experience in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput transaction processing to join our core engineering team.

You will be responsible for building and maintaining scalable, maintainable backend services using Golang, Java, or Node.js, in a microservices architecture with Kafka-based event streaming, and apply best practices in performance, code quality, and system design.

This role is ideal for engineers who thrive in building process-driven, rule-based, and event-oriented systems in financial services or other highly structured business domains.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain backend services using Golang (Fiber/Echo), Java (Spring Boot), or Node.js, following clean architecture principles.
- Build and enhance microservices that interact via APIs and event-driven pipelines using Kafka, designed for scalability and business flexibility.
- Implement business logic based on rule-driven processing and process orchestration, handling both synchronous and asynchronous flows effectively.
- Collaborate with PM, BA, QC and DevOps to ensure deliverables meet business logic, reliability, and maintainability standards.
- Optimize system performance for rule-based workflows, ensuring fast and traceable processing under high-load business scenarios.
- Work with PostgreSQL and Redis to design efficient data models, caching strategies, and maintain transactional integrity.
- Contribute to logging, observability, and monitoring using structured logging and standardized diagnostics.
- Participate in code reviews, technical design discussions, and team knowledge sharing.
requirements:
Must-Have:

- 3+ years of backend development experience using Golang, Java, or Node.js.
- Experience building microservices with strong separation of cellular and reusable components.
- Solid understanding of event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka (or similar).
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL and Redis for persistence and caching.
- Experience working with business rule engines, workflow-based processing, or complex business transaction orchestration.
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs, gRPC, and system integration practices.
- Proficient with Docker and containerized deployment workflows.
- Understanding of asynchronous vs synchronous processing patterns, and when to use each.
- Knowledge of Git, CI/CD practices, and clean code standards.

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience in financial services, securities trading systems, or commission-based platforms.
- Familiarity with KeyCloak or other IAM frameworks.
- Experience with Elixir is a plus.
- Exposure cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.

Soft Skills

- Strong problem-solving skills and logical thinking.
- Clear communicaton and team collaborator.
- Able to work independently with a proactive mindset.
- Passionate about writing clean, maintainable, and testable code.
benefits:
What We Offer

- Competitive salary and annual performance bonus.
- Full health insurance and annual check-ups.
- Friendly and collaborative working environment with modern tools and workflows.
- Participation in core technology product delivery with real business impact.

jobDescription:
About Safetrust

- Safetrust is redefining how people and organizations securely access the world around them. Our digital identity platform combines secure credentials, cloud-native architecture, and mobile-first authentication to power seamless access across physical and digital environments.
- From unlocking doors with a mobile device to securing enterprise systems, our technology is transforming identity across mobility and IoT.
- We partner with global enterprises and channel partners—from Fortune 200 companies to emerging innovators—to eliminate legacy credential risks and deliver secure, scalable access solutions.
- With teams across the United States, Vietnam, and Australia, Safetrust is built by bold thinkers who move fast, solve complex problems, and are shaping the future of trust.

Why This Role Matters

- This role sits at the intersection of engineering, product, and customer success.
- As a Development Support Engineer, you will help ensure Safetrust’s solutions are successfully implemented, integrated, and scaled in real-world environments. You will troubleshoot complex technical issues, guide customers through integrations, and provide critical feedback to engineering teams.
- This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys solving problems, working across systems, and helping customers bring technical solutions to life.

Role Overview

- The Development Support Engineer acts as a technical bridge between Safetrust’s engineering teams and customers.
- You will support customers and partners in implementing Safetrust SDKs and APIs, troubleshoot complex hardware and software issues, and help ensure smooth delivery of product features and integrations.
- This is a customer-facing, technically deep role that requires strong problem-solving skills, curiosity, and the ability to communicate complex concepts clearly.

What You’ll Do

Technical Support & Troubleshooting

- Diagnose and resolve complex issues across hardware, software, and mobile applications (iOS and Android)
- Support customers and internal teams with system integrations and deployment challenges
- Troubleshoot interactions between devices, applications, and backend systems

SDK & API Integration Support

- Guide customers and partners in implementing Safetrust SDKs and APIs
- Assist with integration, testing, and debugging of custom solutions
- Act as a technical liaison for integration partners to ensure successful deployments

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Serve as a communication bridge between Engineering, QA, Product, and Customer teams
- Work with developers to identify, reproduce, and resolve technical issues
- Translate technical findings into actionable insights for Product and leadership

Proactive Feature Readiness

- Stay ahead of product releases by testing and validating new features
- Evaluate features from a customer perspective before release
- Ensure readiness through documentation, validation, and feedback

Documentation & Knowledge Sharing

- Create and maintain technical documentation including SDK guides, FAQs, and troubleshooting resources
- Contribute to internal knowledge bases to improve team efficiency
- Help standardize support and integration practices

Customer Enablement & Training

- Act as a technical advisor to customers implementing Safetrust solutions
- Deliver technical training sessions for customers and internal teams
- Help customers optimize solutions within their environments

Automation & Tooling

- Build scripts or tools to automate repetitive support and deployment tasks
- Improve efficiency across support and integration workflows
requirements:
What You Bring

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent experience)
- 2+ years of experience in technical support, development, or engineering roles
- Proficiency in scripting languages (Python, Bash, or similar)
- Strong understanding of APIs (REST, JSON) and tools such as Postman
- Experience working with SDKs, including implementation and debugging
- Experience with iOS and/or Android development or debugging
- Ability to troubleshoot hardware and software interactions
- Basic understanding of networking and system integrations
- Strong written English communication skills

Nice to Have

- Experience with embedded systems, IoT devices, or access control systems
- Experience working with mobile SDK integrations
- Familiarity with agile development environments
- Hands-on experience testing hardware or electronic devices
- Experience in identity, security, or access control solutions

What Sets You Apart

- Strong problem-solving mindset and ability to debug complex issues
- Ability to work across hardware, software, and mobile environments
- Strong communication skills—able to explain technical concepts clearly
- Curiosity and willingness to learn new systems quickly
- Proactive approach to improving processes and tools
- Collaborative and team-oriented mindset
benefits:
Why Join Safetrust

- Work on cutting-edge identity, IoT, and mobile access technology
- Gain hands-on experience across APIs, SDKs, hardware, and mobile systems
- Collaborate with global teams across Engineering, Product, and Customer Success
- Play a key role in delivering real-world customer solutions
- Join a fast-growing company where your technical impact is visible

Benefits

- Competitive salary based on experience and performance
- Daily lunch provided at the office
- Free coffee, tea, and refreshments
- Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment)
- Annual health check-up and paid annual leave
- Professional, international working environment

- 13th-14th month salary & Incentive Programs
jobDescription:
Job Summary

We are looking for Middle/Senior Software Developers to join the Core Banking team at Shinhan Bank Vietnam. The candidate will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and enhancing Core Banking applications and related banking systems, ensuring system stability, performance, and compliance with banking regulations.

The role will collaborate closely with business teams and project members to support both common banking modules and card-related services.

Key Responsibilities

Core Banking Development

- Maintain and enhance backend services of the Core Banking System.
- Analyze and resolve bugs, incidents, and performance issues in production and non-production environments.
- Perform database query tuning and optimize system performance.
- Write and maintain technical documentation (design documents, API specifications, release notes).
- Participate in code reviews and ensure development standards are followed.
- Collaborate with business and technical teams to deliver stable and secure solutions.
- Submit progress reports and support issue tracking activities.
- Comply with security policies and change management procedures.

Depending on project assignments, candidates may work on Core Banking modules related to Common Banking Services or Card Systems.

Banking Business Development (Common Modules)

- Develop accounting modules (GL, posting rules, reconciliation, financial reporting)
- Configure and manage product setup (fees, interest, pricing rules, conditions)
- Implement AML/CDD processes (transaction monitoring, screening, case management)
- Manage customer data lifecycle (CIF creation, KYC, data validation, deduplication)

Card System Development

- Develop and maintain card-related services and transaction systems.
- Handle card lifecycle management: Issuance Activation Debit/Credit processing
- Issuance
- Activation
- Debit/Credit processing
- Support transaction processing: Clearing Settlement Reconciliation
- Clearing
- Settlement
- Reconciliation
- Ensure compliance with banking regulations and international standards such as PCI DSS and ISO 8583.
requirements:
Technical Requirements

- Experience in developing main services using C-based frameworks
- Proficiency in building terminal/screen interfaces with HTML5, CSS, JavaScript
- Strong knowledge of database design and management using Oracle SQL/PLSQL
- Experience working in Linux/Unix-based operating environments
- Ability to ensure system performance, stability, and scalability.

Soft Skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.
- Proactive, responsible, and detail-oriented mindset.
- Good written communication skills in English.

General Requirements

- 2–4 years of relevant experience (middle level).
- Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.
- Experience in financial services or banking IT systems.
- Knowledge of banking protocols (ISO 8583, SWIFT, etc.).
- Familiarity with Napas 247, eWallet, and SBV reporting.
- Knowledge of security standards and compliance requirements.
benefits: Our company provides an opportunity to grow as an expert-Banking IT in VietnamYou can learn about Banking concepts and know-how from korea specialized developersIn addition, We have plans to expand our company to Indonesia, Myanmar, PhilippinesWe plan to offer training for outstanding employees in korea. - Salary: you will be happy.- Performance review: twice a year.- Incentive Programs to congratulate members' development.- Company Trip, monthly/weekly activities and events.- Health check once a year and advanced healthcare program.- Free snack, coffee, sponsored pizza or chicken & beer parties.- Work onsite with foreign teams for short or long term.- Your solutions and opinions are heard.

reasons:

jobDescription:
🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam

1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required)

Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ.

2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm

Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày.

Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm!

Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày.

3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.)

Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất.

- Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư.
- Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu.Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại.

** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất.

**Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 vị trí Senior PHP Software Engineer: LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI CHI NHÁNH QUẬN PHÚ NHUẬN

- Domain 1: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý email: Project lớn, được sử dụng bởi hơn 8,000 Doanh nghiệp tại Nhật Bản, doanh thu tăng trưởng ổn định. Team size khoảng 15 người. Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao.

- Domain 2: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chấm công: Project mới, Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao, là một Dịch vụ Web được xây dựng để vận hành trên nền tảng Amazon Web Services (AWS).

Nếu:

・Bạn muốn tham gia phát triển một dự án mới có độ khó cao về nghiệp vụ, hệ thống lớn.・Bạn có định hướng thăng tiến lên Principal Software Engineer/Technical Leader.・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên) ・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống.

Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản.

- Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng PHP thuần (Pure PHP).
- Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability).
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Có từ 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên làm việc với PHP trong các dự án phát triển web application (Development, Refactoring, Unit Test).
- Có kinh nghiệm với 1 (hoặc nhiều) trong các framework của PHP như: Laravel, CakePHP, Zend, CodeIgniter, Yii 2
- Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với VueJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Có kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt với Team và khách hàng.
- Có kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt
- Có khả năng đọc, hiểu và phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía khách hàng
- Có khả năng tạo/trình bày tài liệu kĩ thuật dễ hiểu và chia sẻ kiến thức với đồng nghiệp
- Có khả năng phát hiện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt
- Có khả năng research tốt.

Ưu tiên:

- Đã từng sử dụng Figma, PHPStorm, GitHub
- Sử dụng hiệu quả các công cụ AI như Github copilot, Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT,...
- Đọc hiểu tài liệu bằng tiếng Anh tốt
- Hiểu quy trình và phong cách làm việc tại công ty Nhật là một lợi thế.

Lưu ý: Không tuyển ứng viên nước ngoài.
benefits:
Tại sao Rakus được yêu thích?

Không chỉ là lương thưởng, chúng tôi chăm sóc cuộc sống và gia đình bạn theo phong cách Nhật Bản: "Tận tâm và An tâm".

💰 Tài chính vững mạnh (Solid Finance)

- Chắc chắn "14 tháng lương": Bao gồm lương tháng 13 + 1 tháng thưởng cố định (được nhận bất kể KPI). Tài chính gia đình bạn luôn được đảm bảo.
- Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn.
- Công ty đóng BHXH ở mức 100% lương gross.
- 100 % lương trong thời gian thử việc.

🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care)

- Bảo hiểm đặc biệt: Chi phí y tế của bạn được chi trả phần lớn bởi gói bảo hiểm cao cấp do công ty đài thọ.
- Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện).
- Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút"."Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.

🎉 Niềm vui & Kết nối (Community)

- Du lịch 5 sao: Company Trip hàng năm (3 ngày 2 đêm) tại các resort cao cấp. Tài trợ 50% chi phí tour cho gia đình nhân viên.
- Sự kiện liên tục: Tiệc sinh nhật hàng tháng, Year End Party hoành tráng, Lì xì Tết, quà tặng Trung thu, ngày phụ nữ, ngày nam nhân, Giáng sinh, ...

📝 Đào tạo

jobDescription:
Our Tech stack:

- Our mobile platform was running on Flutter, component based, composable architecture. Web app largely on TypeScript, React, NextJS, Tailwind CSS and composable in-house design components and framework.

Spirit:

- Flexible working environment, and performance-based optimization focus
- Ownership and excellent learning opportunity, in-house and external
- Be part of the team, who set the trend, influence and build meaningful product to millions of fellow Vietnamese

Responsibilities:

- Work with engineering team to explore and create new design / architectures geared towards scale and performance
- Work with product managers and implement products and features with data driven approach and evaluate its impact via ab test and experimentation platform
- Work closely with SRE team in building and scaling and operating high performance back-end services

requirements:

- Excellent communicator, be a team player and independent at the same time.

- Experience in writing good unit test.

Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm 01 lập trình viên, xây dựng hệ thống computational design chuyển quy tắc thiết kế thành hệ thống tự động hóa trong Rhino / Grasshopper / Revit cho các dự án nhà cao tầng.

Về công ty

Công ty Cổ phần Kiến trúc Lập Phương – CUBIC Architects được thành lập từ 08/2004. Sau hơn 21 năm hoạt động, CUBIC là một trong những đơn vị tư vấn thiết kế hàng đầu, Top 10 kiến trúc Việt Nam trong nhiều năm, với định hướng chuyên môn cao, tư duy thiết kế bền vững và ứng dụng công nghệ cao.

GRADIENT LAB là phòng R&D do CUBIC đầu tư, được thành lập từ 07/2023, tập trung vào:

- Computational design (thiết kế thuật toán)
- Tự động hoá và tối ưu hoá thiết kế
- Ứng dụng AI trong kiến trúc

Bạn sẽ làm việc trên các hệ thống phục vụ trực tiếp cho dự án thực tế.

Công việc

- Phát triển plugin bằng C# cho Rhino / Grasshopper / Revit
- Chuyển logic từ Grasshopper sang code có cấu trúc
- Tối ưu và maintain các tool nội bộ
- Làm việc trực tiếp với computational designer để implement design logic

Tìm hiểu thêm về công việc của chúng tôi - Facebook:
requirements:
- 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm C# / .NET
- Hiểu OOP, debug tốt
- Đã từng build tool / app thực tế
- Có thể làm việc với spec chưa hoàn chỉnh
- Tiếng Anh: bắt buộc, đủ để đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật
- Codebase sử dụng tiếng Anh
- Có thể đọc hiểu documentation, API, error message
- Không yêu cầu viết hoặc giao tiếp tiếng Anh tốt

Điểm cộng

- Có kinh nghiệm với Revit API hoặc BIM tooling
- Quan tâm tới geometry / design / automation
- Đã từng làm plugin, tool hoặc scripting

Không cần

- Không cần biết sẵn Rhino / Grasshopper
- Không cần kinh nghiệm AI
- Không phải vị trí vận hành BIM

Phương thức làm việc

- Domain và logic thiết kế được define bởi các bộ phận chuyên môn: kiến trúc, kết cấu, dự toán, MEP
- Bạn tập trung vào implementation, structure và performance
- Code phải readable, reusable, không phụ thuộc cá nhân

Môi trường làm việc

- GRADIENT LAB gồm 2 nhóm chính:
- Nhóm vận hành (architect / computational designer)
- Nhóm phát triển (developer)
- Hai nhóm làm việc trực tiếp cùng nhau, không qua nhiều layer trung gian
- Tool được sử dụng ngay trong dự án → feedback và debug diễn ra liên tục
- Vòng lặp phát triển nhanh: build → test → sửa → dùng thật

Bạn sẽ không code “trên giấy”, mà thấy ngay kết quả trong workflow thiết kế

Định hướng & cơ hội

- GRADIENT LAB vận hành theo định hướng **startup nội bộ (internal startup)** trong một công ty kiến trúc đã có nền tảng dự án và khách hàng
- Tập trung xây dựng **core system** cho design automation và AI, không làm project rời rạc
- Quy mô team gọn → mỗi người có ảnh hưởng trực tiếp tới hướng đi hệ thống

Cơ hội trở thành **core member**:

- Tham gia sớm vào giai đoạn xây nền tảng
- Ảnh hưởng tới cách thiết kế system, workflow và tool
- Trách nhiệmm lợi ích tăng theo năng lực, không bị giới hạn bởi title cứng

Phù hợp nếu bạn muốn:

- Build hệ thống từ đầu thay vì maintain system có sẵn
- Làm việc trong môi trường linh hoạt, ít tầng nấc
- Thấy rõ impact của mình trong sản phẩm và dự án thực tế

title: Product Designer (UI/UX/AI)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Own critical product surfaces end‑to‑end
- Build real revenue engines with AI and data
- Hybrid, async work that respects working style
jobDescription:
About Flexspace AI

- Flexspace AI is the e-commerce + AI revenue platform for coworking — / Shopify / Airbnb for flexible workspace. Seed-funded. We turn operators' websites into high-converting storefronts and run AI agents that price and market their inventory in real time.
- What we ship: mobile-first booking engine that embeds in any operator's site; SmartPricing Agent for dynamic pricing on meeting rooms, day passes, offices; SmartMarketing Agent for promo campaigns; operator dashboard for revenue/bookings/attribution; member portal for end customers; two-way integrations with prominent property management systems.
- Who buys it: coworking operators from single-location indies to multi-country brands. Their revenue is the conversion rate of the screens you'll design — CTAs, catalog, transitions, and checkout aren't decoration here; they're the product.
- How we work: small, agile, AI-heavy. On track to profitability this year. Headcount is deliberately small so each person owns real surface area — tight feedback loops, no bureaucracy, no committees. We measure shipped work — funnel lifts, partner themes shipped, UX issues triaged — not hours. No face-time theater.
- Co-located hybrid out of Workflow Thao Dien in HCMC for in-person speed. Wider team is async-first, written-first across US, Israel, Turkey, Philippines, and Vietnam. Weekly product/design sync with the CTO/cofounder — no layers between you and the people deciding what to build.

The Role

Product Designer across our three products: Operator Dashboard, eCommerce customer-facing pages, and Member Portal. You report to the CTO (also a cofounder). No design layer above you.

- What design means here. The hard problem isn't decoration — it's information. Operators juggle hundreds of spaces, prices, members, bookings, integrations, and promotions across locations and timezones. Customers comparing meeting rooms decide in seconds. Members need to find what they're entitled to without reading docs. Your job is to sit with these humans — on calls, in onboarding, over recordings — and reconstruct the mental model they're operating under, including the frustrations they've stopped voicing. Then decide what surfaces when, what's grouped, what's hidden until needed. Empathy is the input; information architecture is the output. Visual polish comes last.
- On prioritization. Not all UX work has the same payoff. You'll look at the same problem from multiple angles — funnel data, operator interviews, revenue, churn signals, support tickets — and pick the surface where your hours move the business most. A polish pass on a screen no one reaches is wasted hours; a 2% lift on the booking funnel is the company's quarter. Judgment over completeness.
- On UX decisions. Bigger calls go to the team before execution. Smaller calls — ship, watch the data, iterate. We're data-driven, not opinion-driven. Real authority over the surfaces you cover; expose your reasoning so we can calibrate together.
- Design system. You're inheriting a partial foundation — it exists, it works, the bones aren't perfect. Today's concrete bottleneck: the system isn't documented well enough for Claude to pick the right component. Closing that gap is core to the role. We also need a north star for where this design system and product experience should be in 12–18 months.

What You'll Do

- Audit, watch the funnel across all three apps. Surface obscure UX issues — flows, transitions, empty states, error states, micro-copy.
- Prototype UI/UX adjustments constantly. Most can be driven with AI if you can guide the frontend correctly.
- Theme partner storefronts. Take a partner's brand (logo, fonts, palette, tone) and tune our eCommerce surfaces to feel native — including non-Latin scripts (Hebrew RTL, Polish diacritics, Spanish, English).
- Recommend CTA placements on partner marketing sites — where, what they say, how they look — to maximize the funnel into our checkout.
- Pull data, form an opinion, decide. Revenue, Mixpanel, GA4 / GTM funnel data, operator feedback.
- Make the design system AI-legible. Each pattern — empty state, error, modal, form, badge, toast — named, exemplified, discoverable from a prompt. Codify repeating patterns as reusable components, documented heuristics, or prompt templates.

How You'll Work With AI

Claude as a peer, not a novelty. You'll iterate on structured prompts and build new ones. Engineers coach you and set guardrails so you can ship UI changes through Claude without first becoming a framework expert. Taste, intent, and judgment are the bottleneck now — not syntax.

What Success Looks Like In 6 Months

- You own UX critique across Dashboard, eCommerce, and Member Portal.
- Partner theming pipeline is documented, repeatable, faster than today.
- You've shipped frontend tweaks directly into the codebase — not just handed off specs.
- You're driving CTA recommendations on partner websites end-to-end, with measurable funnel impact.
requirements:
Must-have

- Vietnamese, based in Ho Chi Minh City. Hired on a Vietnamese employment contract. No visa sponsorship or relocation funding.
- Solid UI/UX fundamentals: visual hierarchy, IA, accessibility, error prevention, cognitive load. You can name the heuristic you're applying.
- Human empathy. You can watch users, reconstruct the mental model they're operating under — including the frustrations they've stopped voicing — and let that shape design. User-situation-first, not heuristics-first.
- Information design. You can take a dense, multi-dimensional dataset (bookings × spaces × times × prices × members × policies) and decide what to show, what to hide, what to group, how to layer it.
- Interactive portfolio with at least one full product flow we can click through end-to-end. Live, clickable links — Figma, Framer, Notion, or any platform. State, hover, transitions wired up. No static PDFs or screenshot decks.
- AI-native, Claude-fluent. Daily Claude user, sharp prompter. You know where it shines and where it breaks down.
- Frontend-curious. Willing to ship UI changes into the codebase via Claude with engineer coaching and guardrails.
- QA-grade attention to detail. You spot the obscure flow break, the misaligned state, the off-by-one transition.
- Writing and reading English required for async work. Speaking can be conversational — we coach.
- Agency. You spot things, fix things, ship things — don't wait to be told.

Nice-to-have

- E-commerce, marketplace, or booking-site exposure.
- Conversion / funnel optimization experience.
- Multi-language / RTL exposure (Hebrew, Polish, Spanish) — speeds up partner theming work.

New graduates and self-taught designers are welcome if the must-haves are real. What matters is taste, agency, willingness to ship, and how fast you learn.
benefits:
This role suits future founders. Direct cofounder access, real ownership of decisions and outcomes, scope across an entire product surface, an inside look at how a small team turns AI into shipped product. If you aspire to build your own startup product one day, this is the seat that builds the muscles.

Compensation & growth

- Salary: 20M – 55M VND/month NET. Calibrated on portfolio strength, interview sharpness, and demonstrated speed of learning, not years on a resume. Exceptional senior candidates can be discussed above this band.
- Comp reviews on request — if you've grown the role, raise it.
- Probation: 2 months at full salary. Passes on shipping consistently + demonstrating taste in critique — no surprise gates.
- Stock options eligibility and a company laptop after probation. Bring your own laptop during probation.

Tools

- Company-paid Claude, Figma Team Plan seat

Workspace & culture

- Covered desk at Workflow Thao Dien (HCMC). Hybrid 2 days/week in-office, bouncing product ideas & solutions.
- Vietnam time (ICT). Occasional pre-scheduled evening calls overseas, rare in practice.
- English-first, American startup culture: direct feedback, written-first, low-meeting. We measure shipped work, not hours.

Benefits

- BHXH / BHYT / BHTN contributions per Vietnamese labor law.
- Vietnamese public holidays off (incl. Tết).
- Unlimited personal time off. Coordinate with the team based on urgency and your ownership.

Hiring process

Three real-time conversations with humans. No automated screening, no pre-recorded video tasks, no take-home gauntlet.

- Intro call — short conversation to get a sense of your English and how clearly you articulate your thinking.
- Team conversation — in person at Workflow Thao Dien. Walk us through your portfolio, talk shop, hang out, grab lunch.
- Conversation with the CTO — remote. Product, technical fluency, working style.

You will not only write focused, high-performance codebases but also ensure the seamless orchestration and resilience of our entire service ecosystem.

We are looking for leaders who want to operate at the next level in their careers and drive the growth of our global AI-powered platform.

benefits:

title: DevOps Engineer (Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD)

jobDescription:
We are seeking a DevOps Engineer with a minimum of 2 years of expertise in Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) practices. In this role, you will play a crucial part in our software development lifecycle, focusing on automating and streamlining our build, deployment, and release processes.

Essential Functions:

- CI/CD Implementation: Design, develop, and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines to ensure smooth and efficient software delivery.

- Containerization: Work with containerization technologies like Docker and orchestration tools such as Kubernetes for application deployment and scaling.
- Coding / Scripting: Create and maintain in-house tools aiding software development.
- Security: Implement security best practices throughout the CI/CD pipeline and infrastructure to propose a good balance and prevent breaches.
- Observability stack: Manage and improve metrics, logs, traces, alerting, visualization
- Troubleshooting: Diagnose and resolve issues related to deployments and system performance.
- DevOps Advocate: Collaborate closely with development and operations teams to bridge the gap and promote a DevOps culture.

You’ll also need to:

- Collaborate tightly with architecture, product, front-end, and back-end teams to gain feedback and ensure your solutions effectively bring value.

- Take control of your productivity and improve your time management and communication skills
requirements:

title: Senior Project Manager/Program Manager (RTE)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Job Description

About the Role/position

This position is responsible for coordinating and managing the release trains in an agile environment. They will act as a Project Manager, coaching and supporting the implementation of more effective ways of working and using Agile methodology. Overall, the Release Train Engineer plays a crucial role in ensuring the successful delivery of software releases and driving business outcomes in an Agile environment.

Role Overview

- End-to-end program / project coordination with strong delivery discipline
- Focus on transitioning legacy onboarding to an enhanced customer onboarding experience
- Final phase: onboarding all “new-to-bank” customer journeys onto the new flow

Program Characteristics

- EU regulatory program with non-negotiable timelines
- High visibility with frequent touchpoints with Executives and Heads of (HO’s)
- Significant stakeholder scrutiny and focus across business and technology
requirements:
High-impact coordinator and stakeholder manager over a pure delivery lead—someone who can operate confidently in a complex, regulatory, and executive-facing program while effectively enabling Agile execution on the ground.

1. Stakeholder & Communication

- Exceptional stakeholder engagement is critical
- Comfortable interfacing with senior leadership (Execs / HO’s)
- Strong communication and influence skills across business and tech teams

2. Delivery Orientation

- Solid understanding of delivery lifecycle; hands-on delivery experience is beneficial but not mandatory
- Ability to manage dependencies, risks, and timelines in a structured manner

3. Agile / RTE Fit

- Comfortable operating as an RTE in an Agile setup
- Focus on coordination, facilitation, and flow—not on executive reporting (for example: not owning steering committees or executive packs)
- Will align closely with an onshore RTE, with opportunity to ramp up

4. Technical Appreciation

- Ability to read and interpret architecture diagrams and tech stacks
- Sufficient technical context to engage meaningfully with engineering teams

5. Soft Skills

- Strong interpersonal skills and team facilitation
- Ability to navigate ambiguity and operate in a high-pressure, high-visibility environment

Nice to Have

- Prior banking domain exposure (preferred, not mandatory)
- Experience with Australian banks is advantageous
- Operating Model
- Mapped to an onshore RTE for guidance and alignment
- Cadence-driven environment with monthly releases
- Initial focus on learning the program landscape, stakeholders, and delivery rhythms
benefits:
Life at Capgemini is dynamic and fun, a place where people love to work. A career with freedom, full of learning and development opportunities and the support to help you achieve your best.

A career at Capgemini is rewarding and constantly transforming. Here are the top ten reasons why people love working at Capgemini.

1. Your values are our values:

We’re guided by seven core values: honesty, boldness, trust, freedom, team spirit, modesty, and fun. If you share those values, then you’ll find your place with us.

2. People come first

Through our People Charter, we encourage free exchange of ideas, respect for differences, and wellbeing in the workplace for everyone.

3. Never stop learning

At the Capgemini Group University, you’ll learn via classroom-based and virtual courses, e-learning modules and rich-media online resources.

4. Feel free to grow

Over the course of your career, your goals may shift. Want to change your focus? Switch tracks? We’re here to help.

5. Get inspired by your colleagues

Our cultural diversity means you’ll always have something to learn from those around you.

6. Forget the notion of the “typical day”

Challenge and variety are constants here. From the work you do to the people you meet to the places you travel, we’ll keep you on your toes.

7. Strike a balance that works for you

You’re human—and so are we! We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance.

8.Count on us for career growth

We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University.

9.Your Love for Travel

We have 300 offices in 40 countries around the world. You’ll have opportunities to travel or work in different locations.

10.Dig in your first day

Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

title: Data Annotation
label: HOT
reasons:
- Flexible work hours
- Product-mode organization
- Flat Management
jobDescription:
About FWH:

Facilitated Work Hub (FWH) partners with Norwegian tech scale-ups to employ software engineers in Vietnam under a long-term, one-client collaboration model, where each engineer works as part of the client’s product organisation as a fully integrated colleague, not as an outsourced or rotating resource. Our model prioritises stability, clear ownership, and cultural alignment, supported by a flat, Norwegian-inspired working environment grounded in fairness, transparency, and trust, with local support from a Norwegian Cultural Advisor and a transparent HR setup. We hire self-driven professionals who value long-term collaboration, professional integrity, and meaningful contribution within serious technology companies.

About the client:

Fishency develops and delivers advanced technology solutions for the continuous monitoring of fish groups across the entire value chain. By combining image analysis, IoT sensors, and Artificial Intelligence, the company enables the collection and analysis of real-time data related to fish health, welfare, and production. Joining this exciting opportunity, you will be able to progress further, by working together with other high level and experienced colleagues like yourself. You'll have close contact with the management and have a voice to give your ideas and input as we work in a Norwegian style flat hierarchy.

Annotation and Data Quality overview:

Annotation work is a critical part of Fishency's value creation and forms the foundation for precise and robust machine learning models. The work is organised with a clear separation between ownership, quality assurance, and operational production to ensure high quality, scalability, and low risk.

Fishency owns the entire annotation process, methodology, and quality standards. Production is carried out by dedicated annotation resources in Vietnam via FWH, under close Norwegian leadership and oversight.

About the role:

The annotation resources in Vietnam perform operational annotation work based on defined guidelines and quality requirements. Resources are dedicated exclusively to Fishency and work solely within Fishency's annotation tools and processes.

Responsibilities:

- Perform video and sequence annotation of fish and relevant objects
- Annotate very small objects (down to millimetre-level) with high precision
- Perform multi-class annotation in accordance with defined taxonomies
- Follow established workflows, instructions, and quality standards
- Report deviations, ambiguities, and improvement suggestions to the QC lead
requirements:
Framework conditions:

- No requirement for domain expertise or programming skills
- Work is evaluated based on precision, consistency, and adherence to instructions
- Final quality approval is always performed by the Norwegian QC and annotation lead

Annotation resources represent a scalable production capacity that can be expanded in line with demand, without compromising quality or control.

Personalities:

- High integrity, confidentiality, and genuine commitment to excellence
benefits:
We offer:

- Flexitime account
- Competitive salary package, 13th month bonus
- Growth opportunity and hands on experience
- Experience exceptional Norwegian business culture rooted in trust and openness
- Excellent staff retention
- International yet close knitted work environment
- Central location

label: HOT

jobDescription:
YOU

You want to be a key member of a strong team of creators who take pride in their work and support one another. As a Senior UX Engineer, you will be responsible for collaborating with the team to build a variety of Simpson Strong-Tie digital products, leveraging your valuable skills and competence, and contributing to the growth of the organization. You’ll focus on delivering intuitive, efficient, and innovative solutions that address business needs, helping drive progress forward. Your impact will be recognized, and if career growth is important to you, we not only know how to support your development—we're passionate about it:

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

Front-end Development

- Develop, test, and maintain performant, scalable code using React/Next.js and TypeScript.
- Build reusable, modular components and libraries that power Simpson Strong-Tie's digital products.
- Ensure applications are responsive, fast, accessible, and well-tested across devices and browsers.

UX & Design Collaboration

- Partner with designers early — contribute to design decisions and propose interaction patterns rather than only consuming Figma artifacts.
- Build and maintain the design system and component library as the shared source of truth between design and engineering.
- Advocate for accessibility (WCAG), usability, and consistent interaction patterns across products.

Architecture & Performance

- Lead the design of complex front-end applications, ensuring scalability and performance.
- Collaborate with backend engineers on integration via REST APIs and WebSockets.
- Optimize performance using techniques like lazy loading, code splitting, and tools like Lighthouse and Chrome DevTools.

AI-Augmented Development

- Leverage AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or similar) to accelerate development while maintaining code quality.
- Prototype AI-powered features and integrate AI APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI) where they add product value.
- Critically evaluate AI output — knowing when to trust, verify, or override.

Collaboration & Mentorship

- Partner with product managers, designers, and backend engineers across multiple product teams.
- Mentor Interns, Engineers, and Associate Senior Engineers — including how to work effectively with AI tools.
- Lead code reviews, establish coding standards, and drive continuous improvement.

- Solid grasp of accessibility (WCAG) and an eye for visual detail
- Comfortable translating designer intent and user feedback into thoughtful implementation
- Demonstrated daily use of AI coding tools, with concrete examples of how they've changed how you work
- Comfort with prompt engineering, context management, and critically evaluating AI output
- Curiosity about emerging AI capabilities and interest in integrating AI APIs into products
- Fluent English communication skills (both verbal and written)
- Excellent organizational and communication skills
- Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodology

- Familiarity with web security principles and front-end vulnerabilities (e.g., XSS, CSRF)

reasons:

jobDescription:

We are looking for experienced mobile engineers enjoys solving complex technical challenges and wants to have a direct influence on the architecture of a real-world banking application.

- Modernize & Optimize: Lead the transition to cleaner, modularized code. Improve app performance, responsiveness, and memory management.

requirements:
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.

1. Engineering Rigor & Quality•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."•    Code Health: Deep application of SOLID, YAGNI, and KISS principles. Strict adherence to coding conventions and documentation standards.•    Performance: Proven ability to identify and resolve bottlenecks using platform profiling tools (e.g., Instruments, Android Profiler). Experience with threading and complex offline data synchronization.2. Banking-Grade Security & Integration•    Security (Critical): Strong knowledge of secure mobile practices: Certificate Pinning, secure storage mechanisms (Keychain/Keystore), biometric authentication (FaceID/TouchID/ Fingerprint), and obfuscation techniques.•    API Orchestration: Deep understanding of RESTful API lifecycle, request/response cycle management, and handling token-based authentication flows in a secure environment.•    Ecosystem: Experience integrating and maintaining 3rd-party SDKs (e.g., Firebase, Analytics, Marketing tools like AppsFlyer, and UI frameworks like SnapKit/libraries across Android and iOS ecosystems).3. Workflow & Tools:•    DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices.•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills•    Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions.•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.•    AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities.5. title: IT Support Analyst – Level 1 to Level 3
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Company: Nexnode (Melbourne, Australia)Location: Ho Chi Minh City, VietnamEmployment Type: Full-time, RemoteSeniority: Level 1 to Level 3 SupportReporting to: Director, Nexnode

About Nexnode

Nexnode is a growing IT services and technology solutions company delivering reliable, secure, and scalable support to business clients. We work across modern cloud platforms, Microsoft technologies, networking, collaboration systems, and infrastructure environments.

We are now looking for a capable and customer-focused IT Support Analyst to join our team. This role is suitable for someone with strong technical foundations, excellent communication skills, and a passion for solving problems in a professional IT support environment.

Job Description

As an IT Support Analyst, you will provide Level 1 to Level 3 technical support across user devices, Microsoft 365, Azure, networking, collaboration tools, and cloud-based environments. You will work directly with internal teams and clients to troubleshoot issues, support infrastructure, and ensure high-quality service delivery.

This role requires strong English communication skills, a proactive attitude, and the ability to manage support requests professionally from diagnosis through to resolution.

Key Responsibilities

- Provide Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 IT and desktop support to users across various industries.
- Troubleshoot and resolve issues across Microsoft 365 suite, Azure, Intune, Windows Server OS.
- Configure and troubleshoot issues with VMware systems.
- Support user account management, licensing, permissions, MFA, and security configuration.
- Assist with Microsoft Azure administration, including Entra ID, users, groups, policies, and basic cloud infrastructure tasks.
- Configure, troubleshoot, and support Cisco networking and collaboration solutions.
- Support Cisco Meraki environments, including wireless, switching, security appliances, and cloud dashboard management.
- Assist with Cisco UCS and server infrastructure support where required.
- Manage tickets, document solutions, and communicate clearly with stakeholders.
- Escalate complex issues when required while maintaining ownership and follow-up.
- Support onboarding and offboarding processes for users.
- Contribute to IT documentation, process improvements, and service quality initiatives.

Working Environment

At Nexnode, we value reliability, accountability, and continuous improvement. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, communicates clearly, and enjoys helping people solve technical problems.

This is an excellent opportunity for an IT professional in Vietnam who wants to develop their career in a practical, hands-on support role across cloud, networking, and business technology environments.

Device Requirements

You will need to use your own laptop to start with. A sign on bonus will be provided towards a new laptop if necessary.

How to Apply

Please submit your CV in English, including details of your experience with Microsoft 365, Azure, Cisco technologies, and previous IT support roles.
requirements:
- At least 2 years of experience in a similar IT support, helpdesk, systems support, or managed services role.
- Bachelor’s degree or higher in Information Technology, Computer Science, Networking, Cybersecurity, or a related field.
- Fluent English communication skills, both written and spoken.
- Strong experience with Microsoft 365, including Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Intune and admin portals.
- Experience with Microsoft Azure and Microsoft Entra ID.
- Strong Experience with Microsoft Server Operating Systems and Active Directory.
- Good understanding of Windows and MAC operating systems, endpoint support, and general IT troubleshooting.
- Experience with Cisco networking technologies.
- Experience with Cisco collaboration (Webex) solutions is highly regarded.
- Experience with Cisco Meraki is highly regarded.
- Experience with Cisco UCS, VMware or server infrastructure is an advantage.
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
- Professional attitude with a strong customer-service mindset.
- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Nice to Have

- Experience working for a Managed Service Provider or IT services company.
- Microsoft certifications such as MD-102, AZ-700, AZ-305, AZ-104, or similar.
- Cisco certifications such as CCNA or equivalent.
- Experience with IT ticketing systems, remote monitoring tools (ninjaone), and documentation platforms.
- Understanding of cybersecurity best practices, MFA, conditional access, endpoint protection, and backup solutions.
benefits:
- Work directly with modern Microsoft, Azure, Cisco, and cloud technologies.
- Opportunity to grow into Level 3, systems, cloud, or network engineering roles.
- Professional working environment with exposure to international clients.
- Supportive leadership and clear career development opportunities.
- A role where your technical skills and communication ability will be genuinely valued.
