title: Senior Software Development Manager
reasons:
- Global Company- Develop Your Career & English
- Competitive Salary, and company profit share
- Onsite opportunities
jobDescription:
Who Are We

Hansen Technologies is a leading global provider of software and services that enable organisations to transform customer experiences and streamline critical business processes. With a rich history of innovation and a footprint that spans over 80 countries, Hansen empowers utilities, energy, and communications companies to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and collaborative culture makes Hansen a place where passionate professionals can make a meaningful impact, drive real change, and help shape the future of industries worldwide.

We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners, and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodation during the recruitment process, please let us know.

Why This Role Matters

Lead, Inspire, Transform, Deliver.

At Hansen, our software powers critical services for industries that keep the world running. As a Senior Software Development Manager, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our CIS-HU engineering capability, leading distributed teams across Vietnam and Australia.

This is more than a leadership role—it's an opportunity to build high-performing engineering teams, elevate technical capability, and drive delivery excellence at scale. You will influence how we adopt AI-assisted development, modern cloud platforms, and best-in-class engineering practices to innovate faster and deliver greater value to customers.

Your leadership will directly impact how our teams perform, how our products evolve, and how we deliver secure, scalable, and reliable solutions across global markets.

What You’ll Do

- Lead Engineering Teams: Develop and mentor Technical Leads and engineering teams across a distributed structure, driving high performance and engagement.
- Drive Delivery Excellence: Oversee planning, execution, and delivery across multiple teams, ensuring alignment with business priorities and customer commitments.
- Advance AI & Productivity: Embed AI-assisted engineering practices to enhance development efficiency, quality, and innovation.
- Strengthen Technical Capability: Champion modern cloud (AWS) and engineering practices including microservices, APIs, CI/CD, and automation.
- Collaborate Across Functions: Work closely with Product, Architecture, QA, DevOps, and Delivery to ensure cohesive execution and outcomes.
- Enhance Quality & Standards: Establish and maintain strong engineering standards, focusing on scalability, security, and performance.
- Manage Risk & Improve Continuously: Proactively identify delivery risks, resolve issues, and drive continuous improvement across teams.
requirements:
What You Bring

- Proven experience leading software engineering teams across multiple layers of leadership, including Technical Leads.
- Strong people leadership skills with the ability to coach, inspire, and develop high-performing teams.
- Experience leading distributed teams across regions and cultures.
- Deep understanding of modern engineering practices, cloud technologies (preferably AWS), and software architecture.
- Exposure to AI-assisted development and engineering productivity improvements.
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across technical and business audiences.
- Expertise in CI/CD, microservices, APIs, containerisation, and secure development practices.
- A passion for continuous improvement, innovation, and delivery excellence.

Nice to have:

- Experience in energy, utilities, or enterprise software domains
- Background in cloud transformation or large-scale modernisation
- Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and CI/CD platforms
benefits:
- Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary
- Twice yearly salary review
- Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program
- Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year).
- Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees.
- High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year
- Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices
- Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking
- Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform.
- Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program.
- New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset.
- An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

jobDescription:
About the Company:

AIRR Labs, headquartered in Singapore, is a leading e-commerce enabler in Southeast Asia, specializing in FMCG, Beauty, and Lifestyle brands on platforms like TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada. Established in 2019, AIRR Labs has over 350 experts across Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Singapore, with a technology hub in Vietnam. The company provides comprehensive digital commerce solutions, including content strategy, performance marketing, store management, short-form video production, livestreaming, and multi-channel fulfillment. As a certified TikTok Strategic Agency, Shopee Premium Enabler, and Lazada Star Enabler, AIRR Labs partners with global brands such as Unilever, Colgate-Palmolive, Estée Lauder, and Adidas.

About the job:

We are seeking a skilled Software Engineer (Data Focused) to join our dynamic team. Reporting to the Regional Head of Data & BI, this role requires a hands-on approach and a commitment to independent learning, contributing to exciting projects that drive our business forward.

title: Kỹ sư hệ thống & mạng (System & Network Engineer)
label: NEW
reasons:

jobDescription:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

- Quản trị hạ tầng lưu trữ: Thiết lập, cấu hình, vận hành và bảo trì hệ thống NAS (Synology/QNAP hoặc tương tự). Phân quyền truy cập chi tiết theo nhóm người dùng và theo dự án. Đảm bảo sao lưu (backup) và khôi phục dữ liệu (restore) định kỳ.
- Quản trị mạng nâng cao: Vận hành, giám sát và xử lý sự cố các thiết bị mạng doanh nghiệp (firewall, switch, router, WiFi controller). Triển khai các kỹ thuật như VLAN, VPN (Site-to-site, Remote Access), QoS, NAT, ACL.
- Phát triển & tự động hóa: Chủ động nghiên cứu, đề xuất và triển khai các giải pháp automation trong vận hành hệ thống (ví dụ: tự động backup config, giám sát cảnh báo, cập nhật bảo mật). Cải tiến hiệu suất và độ ổn định của hạ tầng.
- Hoạch định kiến trúc công nghệ: Xây dựng và duy trì kiến trúc tổng thể hệ thống CNTT của công ty. Nghiên cứu, đánh giá và cập nhật các giải pháp mới (Cloud, bảo mật, hạ tầng), theo dõi xu hướng thị trường để áp dụng phù hợp với nhu cầu công ty.
- Hỗ trợ người dùng nội bộ: Tiếp nhận và xử lý các yêu cầu từ nhân viên liên quan đến máy trạm, email, phần mềm văn phòng, kết nối mạng, quyền truy cập NAS và các vấn đề IT hàng ngày.
requirements:
YÊU CẦU

- Có tối thiểu 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí tương tự (IT Support, System Admin, Network Admin).
- Thành thạo quản trị NAS (phân quyền, cấu hình backup, snapshot,..).
- Nắm vững các giao thức và thiết bị mạng (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, VPN). Có kinh nghiệm cấu hình firewall và switch doanh nghiệp.
- Có kỹ năng xử lý, tư duy logic và khả năng tự nghiên cứu.
- Biết hoặc có hứng thú với automation (scripting bash/Python, hoặc các công cụ giám sát hệ thống khác,..).
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh để tự cập nhật công nghệ.
- Ưu tiên: Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng kiến trúc hệ thống hoặc tham gia các dự án nâng cấp hạ tầng quy mô vừa.
benefits:

- Được Công ty mua bảo hiểm sức khỏe tự nguyện.
- Du lịch (trong nước / ngoài nước) hàng năm
- Tham gia các hoạt động tập thể nội bộ: The end party, Du xuân, Team building, Ngày hội gia đình.
- Và nhiều đãi ngộ khác.

THỜI GIAN VÀ ĐỊA ĐIỂM LÀM VIỆC

title: Principal Solution Architect (ERP, Golang)
label: NEW
reasons:
- Young, dynamic and creative working environment
- 13th month salary, KPI bonus; Annual salary review
- Premium health insurance
jobDescription:
The Principal Solution Architect will be the technical authority leading the decomposition and replacement of the core Microsoft Dynamics AX 2012 R3 ERP system with a modern, cloud-native microservices architecture. This role is critical to Pharmacity's digital transformation, focusing on building high-performance, scalable retail services including Order Management (OMS), Warehouse Management (WMS), Promotion Engine, and Customer Loyalty. You will translate complex business needs into technical blueprints and provide hands-on architectural leadership to the engineering teams.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Architectural Strategy & Design

- Decomposition Roadmap: Define the technical strategy and multi-year roadmap for surgically dismantling the monolithic Dynamics AX 2012 R3 into independent, domain-driven microservices.
- Microservices Design: Lead the design and implementation of event-driven, highly available, and scalable microservices for core retail domains: OMS, WMS, Loyalty, and Promotions, ensuring low-latency performance for high-volume transactions.
- API Governance: Design and establish the API Gateway and data exchange protocols (e.g., Kafka/Event Streams) to ensure secure, reliable data flow between the new services, the legacy AX system (for financial journals), and the Databricks Lakehouse.
- Technology Standards: Be the final arbiter of architectural patterns, coding standards, and best practices for the GoLang backend and associated cloud-native technologies (Kubernetes/Docker, Azure/AWS).

2. Technical Leadership & Execution

- GoLang Expertise: Serve as the Principal Expert for the GoLang development team, conducting high-level code reviews, mentoring senior developers, and ensuring performance and maintainability across all services.
- Legacy Integration: Design the complex integration patterns required to seamlessly synchronize data (e.g., General Ledger, Inventory Valuation) between the new services and the legacy AX 2012 R3 system during the phased transition, minimizing business disruption.
- Data Modeling: Collaborate with Data Architects to define the domain-specific data models for each new microservice (e.g., Order, Stock Keeping Unit, Customer) to ensure consistency and prevent data duplication.
- Non-Functional Requirements: Define and enforce non-functional requirements (NFRs) for performance, security, observability, and scalability that exceed the capabilities of the legacy AX system.

3. Stakeholder Alignment & Business Translation

- Business Translation: Act as the primary technical bridge between the Executive team (CEO, CTPO) and the engineering teams, translating strategic business objectives (e.g., faster last-mile delivery, complex promotions) into technical solutions.
- Risk Management: Proactively identify and quantify architectural risks related to the decomposition project (e.g., data loss during cutover, performance degradation) and develop mitigation strategies.
- Vendor Management: Evaluate and select third-party logistics (3PL) and specialized WMS/POS vendors, ensuring their solutions integrate cleanly with Pharmacity's custom microservices architecture.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
- Experience: 10+ years in software development with at least 5 years as a Solution or Principal Architect leading large-scale system modernization or replacement projects.
- ERP Transformation: Proven, hands-on experience dismantling a large monolithic ERP system (ideally Microsoft Dynamics AX, SAP, or Oracle). Deep understanding of core retail ERP domains: Finance, Inventory, Order-to-Cash, and Procure-to-Pay.
- Backend & Cloud:Expert proficiency in GoLang and experience designing and deploying cloud-native applications on Azure or AWS using Kubernetes (K8s) and CI/CD pipelines.
- Architecture: Mastery of Microservices Architecture, Event-Driven Architecture (EDA), API design principles, and Domain-Driven Design (DDD).
- Data & Integration: Strong experience with relational/NoSQL databases, Kafka/RabbitMQ, and designing secure, high-throughput APIs for internal and external consumption.

Preferred Qualifications:

- TOGAF, AWS/Azure Solution Architect Professional, or similar enterprise architecture credentials.
benefits:
- Get your full salary even during your probation period
- Social insurance based on your gross basic salary
- 13th-month salary and a KPI bonus that depends on your performance and the company's results
- Have a chance to increase your salary every year based on your performance
- Get premium health insurance and annual health check
- Get vouchers from Pharmacity for special occasions such as onboarding, birthdays, flash sales, etc

company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
label: NEW

jobDescription:
The Senior AI Engineer for this global workflow product plays a specialized role at the intersection of reverse engineering and forward-looking product development. Unlike standard AI roles, this position focuses heavily on "unlocking" decades of tribal knowledge and operational data hidden in legacy silos to power the next generation of AI-driven automation.

You will lead the technical strategy for extracting, mining, and transforming massive volumes of legacy data into high-quality training sets for AI models. Your mission is to evolve our global workflow product from a reactive IT tool into a proactive, AI-driven platform capable of predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and automated decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

- Legacy Data Mining: Architect and implement advanced data mining techniques to extract valuable operational insights from structured and unstructured legacy systems (e.g., old SQL procedures, mainframe logs, siloed documentation).
- AI Product Evolution: Design and deploy production-ready ML/Deep Learning models that drive core product features such as intelligent workflow routing, natural language interfaces (LLMs), and predictive analytics.
- Feature Engineering for Workflows: Lead the discovery and creation of "features" from legacy data that specifically improve IT workflow efficiency, such as identifying bottleneck patterns or predicting system failures.
- Global Model Management: Oversee the deployment and lifecycle (MLOps) of models across global regions, ensuring low-latency performance and compliance with regional data residency laws (e.g., GDPR, SOC2).
- Reverse Engineering via GenAI: Utilize Generative AI and LLMs to automate the modernization of legacy codebases, turning outdated scripts into documented, cloud-native services.
- Cross-Functional Leadership: Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with Product Managers to translate legacy business logic into modern, AI-powered user experiences
requirements:
Technical Skills & Experience

- Education: Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field.
- Experience: 8+ years in software or data engineering, with at least 4+ years specialized in AI/ML deployment in a global production environment.
- AI/ML Mastery: Expert proficiency in Python and frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, or Scikit-learn. Strong experience with LLM Orchestration (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph).
- Data Mining & Engineering: Deep experience with ETL/ELT pipelines, NoSQL/Graph databases, and tools like Apache Spark or Flink for large-scale data processing.
- Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with MLOps (MLflow, Airflow), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and global cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).

Specialized Hybrid Skills

- Legacy System Knowledge: Ability to navigate and extract data from older relational databases or siloed enterprise architectures.
- Analytical Mindset: Proven track record of identifying high-value AI use cases from messy, real-world "dark data".
- Strategic Communication: Ability to justify the ROI of legacy data mining projects to senior leadership.
benefits:

- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

At the core of a global technology organization, our product team is building a next-generation enterprise workflow platform used by 500,000+ users worldwide. Built on modern low-code/no-code (NCLC) foundations and rapidly evolving into an AI-native product powered by automation and GenAI, this platform is central to how critical business processes operate at scale.

As we transform into a true AI Product Team, we are looking for a Senior IT Business Analyst (Product Owner Assistant) who thrives at the intersection of product thinking, execution excellence, customer empathy, and technical depth.

This is not a documentation role.

This is a product-impact role.

You will work closely with Product & Service Managers, engineers, consultants, and global stakeholders to turn vision into reality - bringing clarity to complexity and execution to scale.

Job Description

Why This Role Matters?

You sit at the center of product discovery and delivery – ensuring the right problems are solved, with the right priority, and that outcomes scale to hundreds of thousands of users. You bridge legacy knowledge, real customer pain points, and future-ready AI design to shape the Next Gen workflow platform.

If you’re energized by complexity, precision, and impact - and want to grow into a strong product development career - this role is for you.

What You’ll Do

Product Execution & Ownership

- Partner with the Product & Service Manager to translate product strategy into clear, outcome-driven requirements
- Break down complex processes into scalable workflows, user stories, and system designs
- Own backlog quality, user stories, and acceptance criteria
- Ensure requirements are data driven, testable, and aligned with product vision

Discovery, Legacy Deep Dive & Design Thinking

- Deep-dive into features, functions, and usage data of the existing workflow platform
- Identify what to retain, improve, simplify, or retire based on real user behavior
- Assist in organizing and facilitating Design Thinking workshops
- Translate research and insights into concrete Next-Gen requirements

Customer & IT Consultant Exposure (~25%)

- Spend ~25% of time in an IT consultant role, engaging directly with internal customers
- Understand real customer pain points, expectations, and constraints
- Feed customer insights back into product prioritization and solution design

Stakeholder & Delivery Management

- Act as a bridge between customers, key stakeholder, business, engineering, design, and operations
- Lead requirement reviews, validation, and support UAT
- Measure delivery outcomes against business success criteria

Technical, AI & Adoption Excellence

- Define functional and nonfunctional requirements (performance, security, scalability)
- Collaborate closely with engineering through design, build, and delivery
- Support AI-driven workflows, intelligent automation, change management, and adoption
requirements:
- 7+ years of experience in IT Business Analyst or product adjacent roles
- Strong understanding of enterprise platforms, workflow automation, and system design
- Experience with low-code/no-code (NCLC) and cloud architectures (preferred)
- Exposure to AI/ML products or strong interest in AI transformation
- Excellent analytical and communication skills – able to turn ambiguity into clarity
- Experience working with global, cross functional teams
- Comfortable in Agile environments with high ownership
- Detail oriented, proactive, and outcome-focused

Nice to Have

- Workflow / approval platform experience
- CBAP, PMI-PBA certifications
- Large-scale platform migration exposure
benefits:

- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

reasons:

jobDescription:
Company Description

The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology.

The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth.

Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) is 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions.

Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region.

With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes.

Job Description

A Lead Front-End Developer for a global IT workflow product drives the user experience of complex, data-heavy systems. This role requires balancing hands-on technical excellence with the architectural foresight needed to scale products across international markets.

You will lead the front-end strategy for a global IT workflow automation product, guiding architecture and delivery of intuitive, performant experiences for complex, data-heavy use cases. From drag-and-drop workflow builders and real-time dashboards to configuration wizards, you’ll set the technical direction, raise engineering standards, and ensure the UI is responsive, accessible, and reliable across regions and network conditions.

Key Responsibilities

· Technical strategy and architecture: Define the front-end architecture (React + TypeScript primary) including state management patterns, choosing frameworks and patterns that ensure scalability and maintainability. Drive API contract discipline with backend and define caching/streaming strategies for real-time data.

· Design System Management: Own and scale the Bosch Digital Design System and component library, ensuring pixel-perfect consistency across all regions and product modules. You will ensure Bosch Corporate Design is applied correctly.

· Workflow Automation UX: Design and implement intuitive interfaces for complex logic, such as drag-and-drop workflow builders, real-time data dashboards, and integration of wizards.

· Design system leadership: Own and evolve the component library and design tokens (theming, dark/HC modes); govern adoption via Storybook, documentation, and CI gates (lint, a11y, visual regression). Ensure consistency and scalability across modules and international variants.

· Global readiness (i18n, a11y, performance): Ensure high performance across varying network conditions and localized support for multiple languages and regional data standards.

· Engineering excellence and security: Build a testing strategy and implement CI/CD quality gates, bundle analysis, and static checks.

· Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with UX/UI designers to bridge the gap between high-fidelity designs and technical feasibility, and with backend teams to define robust API contracts.

· Team Mentorship: Mentor engineers, lead code reviews, establish engineering standards and playbooks, and contribute to hiring and onboarding.
requirements:
Must Have

- Education: Bachelor’s or master's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
- Experience: 7+ years of professional front-end experience, including 3+ years leading teams or major initiatives on large-scale web apps.
- Core Languages: Expert in modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 (Sass/CSS Modules) and modern layout.
- Frameworks: Extensive experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js, including state management (e.g., Redux, MobX). React proficiency building reusable, stateful components and hooks; strong command of state management.
- Design system adoption across 2+ product modules with documented components and usage guidelines.
- Build & Deployment: Proficiency with Git-based workflows, and CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins) with quality gates.
- Testing: Strong background in automated testing frameworks like Jest, Cypress, or Playwright.
- Deep understanding of Web Accessibility (WCAG) and SEO best practices.
- Localized experiences delivered in multiple languages, including at least one RTL locale.
- Security awareness (OWASP front-end risks, XSS/CSP, secure handling of untrusted content).
- Agile Mindset: Proven track record of delivering in fast-paced, sprint-based global environments.
- Global Mindset: Experience delivering software that accounts for regional cultural nuances and varied internet speeds.

Nice to Have

- Workflow Expertise: Experience building tools for IT operations, project management, or SaaS automation is highly desirable.
- Project Management: Ability to manage timelines, define technical roadmaps, and communicate progress to senior stakeholders.
- Design token pipelines (Style Dictionary), Storybook, Chromatic/visual regression testing.
- Observability (Sentry, Datadog), feature flagging, A/B testing.
- Experience with distributed teams and varying network conditions across regions.
- Measurable improvements in Core Web Vitals and interaction latency on at least one high-traffic workflow.
benefits:

- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

jobDescription:

As a Senior OutSystems Developer at Bosch, you are responsible for the development and maintenance of mobile and web-based applications assigned and ensure that the applications are in working well, supporting both internal and external stakeholders in any errors or bugs in the applications.

Your main responsibilities

· Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using OutSystems, with integration of previous experience in .NET or Java.

- Lead the architecture, development, and optimization of both web and mobile applications, ensuring clean, efficient, and maintainable code across the stack.
- Develop and maintain complex business logic, custom UI components, and database layers, using relational and non-relational databases like SQL, NoSQL, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Design, DevOps) to translate business requirements into technical solutions and ensure seamless integration across front-end, back-end, and databases.
- Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application errors, ensuring high availability and performance for users.
- Participate in agile teams, contributing to backlog refinement, sprint planning, and continuous delivery pipelines, ensuring high-quality and timely releases.
- Define and optimize data models, ensuring data integrity, scalability, and performance across SQL and NoSQL databases.
- Implement REST and SOAP APIs, as well as other third-party integrations, to support the full functionality of applications.
- Provide guidance and mentorship to junior developers, promoting best practices in coding, testing, and application security.
- Stay updated on the latest technology trends in OutSystems, full-stack development, and database management, recommending new tools and methodologies to enhance the development process.
requirements:
Must Have

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer/Software Engineering, Information Technology, or equivalent practical experience.
- Experience: 7+ years of experience in OutSystems development.
- OutSystems certs: Professional/Expert Web (Traditional/Reactive), Architecture; ODC certs.
- Solid back-end development skills: data modeling, advanced SQL (e.g., MSSQL or Oracle), and performance tuning.
- Workflow/process development experience (e.g., BPT, case/process management, asynchronous processing, timers/queues).
- Front-end development proficiency with UX/UI best practices; strong HTML/CSS/JS.
- Integrations: REST/SOAP, API design, auth, error handling, resiliency.
- OutSystems architecture best practices (layered, modular, dependencies); code quality/reviews.
- DevOps/release: LifeTime/environment management, deployments, versioning, basic CI/CD.
- Security: RBAC, SSO, secure integrations, data protection, OWASP.
- Troubleshooting/performance: caching, query tuning, aggregates, pagination, logging/monitoring.
- Strong communication, stakeholder collaboration, mentoring; Agile/Scrum.
- Proficient in written and spoken English.

Nice to Have

- Platform tools: AI Mentor, Service Center, LifeTime Analytics/APM.
- Advanced architecture: DDD, lean, microservices/SOA.
- CI/CD beyond LifeTime: Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions/Jenkins/GitLab CI.

title: Senior AI Engineer (Machine Learning, Python)
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Senior AI Engineer / Senior GenAI Backend Engineer có kinh nghiệm thực chiến để xây dựng, triển khai và tối ưu các hệ thống AI phục vụ sản phẩm của công ty. Vị trí này phù hợp với ứng viên có thể làm việc xuyên suốt từ nghiên cứu giải pháp, xây dựng AI backend, triển khai model hoặc AI service lên server, cho đến huấn luyện, fine tune và tối ưu model để phục vụ các yêu cầu riêng của công ty với chi phí hợp lý. Bạn sẽ tham gia phát triển các hệ thống AI cho nhiều bài toán thực tế như image generation, video generation, audio transcription, OCR, document understanding, LLM applications và các AI API services phục vụ sản phẩm hoặc hệ thống nội bộ.

Mô tả công việc

- Thiết kế và xây dựng AI backend systems cho các tính năng AI và GenAI của công ty
- Triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các model hoặc AI services cho các bài toán như:Image generationVideo generationAudio transcriptionOCRDocument understandingLLM applications
- Xây dựng API backend để tích hợp model vào mobile app, web app hoặc hệ thống nội bộ
- Deploy model, AI service hoặc inference service lên server, cloud hoặc môi trường container như Docker và Kubernetes
- Thiết kế kiến trúc model serving đảm bảo tính ổn định, bảo mật, khả năng mở rộng và dễ giám sát trong môi trường production
- Tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống theo các tiêu chí như latency, throughput, GPU CPU utilization và cost per request
- Làm việc với open source models, self hosted models hoặc third party AI services để đưa vào vận hành thực tế
- Huấn luyện, fine tune hoặc custom model để phù hợp với dữ liệu, nghiệp vụ và yêu cầu riêng của công ty
- Xây dựng pipeline cho data preparation, training, evaluation, deployment và monitoring
- Nghiên cứu các giải pháp giúp tối ưu chi phí vận hành như:Lựa chọn model phù hợpTính toán chi phíBatchingCachingQuantizationDistillationFine tune đúng hướng thay vì dùng model lớn cho mọi tác vụ
- Phối hợp với product, engineering và business team để chuyển nhu cầu thực tế thành các AI solutions có thể vận hành ổn định và mở rộng lâu dài
- Theo dõi, debug và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống AI trong môi trường production
requirements:
- Có từ 3 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên trong lĩnh vực AI, ML hoặc backend AI systems
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế 2 năm trở lên trong việc deploy AI hoặc ML models vào production
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế 3 năm trở lên xây dựng AI API backend, model serving systems hoặc inference services
- Thành thạo Python
- Biết thêm một ngôn ngữ khác là lợi thế
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với một hoặc nhiều framework như:PyTorchTensorFlowLang ChainHugging Face
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hệ thống trên:Linux serverCloud platformDockerKubernetesGPU environment
- Có kinh nghiệm với một hoặc nhiều bài toán như:Image generationVideo generationSpeech to textAudio transcriptionOCRDocument understandingLLM applicationMultimodal AI
- Có kinh nghiệm fine tuning, custom training hoặc model adaptation để tối ưu model theo dữ liệu và yêu cầu riêng của công ty
- Hiểu rõ các trade off giữa chất lượng model, tốc độ phản hồi, độ phức tạp hệ thống và chi phí vận hành
- Có kinh nghiệm về MLOps hoặc LLMOps là một lợi thế, bao gồm:Model versioningCI CDMonitoringLoggingEvaluation
- Có tư duy sản phẩm, tư duy hệ thống và khả năng biến công nghệ AI thành giải pháp thực tế cho công ty

Điểm cộng

- Từng làm việc với open source models và tự host model
- Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu chi phí inference trên GPU server
- Có kinh nghiệm với:LoRAQuantizationDistillationFine tuning
- Các kỹ thuật tối ưu model để phục vụ production
- Từng xây hệ thống AI phục vụ lượng request lớn hoặc yêu cầu hiệu năng cao
- Có khả năng đề xuất kiến trúc, review kỹ thuật và đưa ra quyết định phù hợp cho AI backend

Giá trị bạn mang lại

- Giúp công ty triển khai AI nhanh hơn
- Kiểm soát chi phí tốt hơn
- Xây dựng các năng lực AI phù hợp với nghiệp vụ riêng
- Giảm phụ thuộc vào những giải pháp đắt đỏ hoặc thiếu linh hoạt

title: Automotive Embedded Developer (Flash Bootloader/C++)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members

jobDescription:
We are seeking for Flash Bootloader Developer who is fully responsible for Flash Bootloader Solution development for Completed Software on ECUs.

Main Roles and Responsibilities

- Responsible for Flash Bootloader software development
- Communication protocol, diagnostic service, flashing, security based on AUTOSAR.
- Define and evaluate customer specific flashing sequence.
- SW requirement analysis related to flashing and support customer problem solving
requirements:
Education background:

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, or related field
- At least 2 years of experience Automotive Embedded

Mandatory Qualifications

- Good coding skills in C/C++ and scripting languages (CAPL, Python,...)
- Familiar with AUTOSAR architecture (COM, Diag and Security), especially familiar with UDS ISO144229, experience with FBL (Flash Bootloader) is much more preferred.
- Familiar with Infineon Tricore series and Renesas SOC is preferred.
- Vector CAN case usage for Communication debugging and Lauterbach debugging skill in mandatory.
- Familiar with FlashEEPROM，has concept with memory layout for embedded system, CAN/CANFD/ETH and FlexRay communication protocol.
- Good at data structures, and algorithms.
- Good oral and written English, ability to daily communicate foreign colleagues and suppliers.
- Familiar with software development process and toolchain, know about V model is preferred.
- Independent development and goal-oriented teamwork.

Nice-to-Have Qualification (Optional)

- Chinese/Japanese Language
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities

- Join in a dynamic and fast-growing global company (English-speaking environment), with opportunity to work in global projects and being a part of innovation team contributing initiative ideas to the hi-tech world
- Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in worldwide offices
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Flexible working time and working model
- Lunch and parking allowance

Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: Web Developer (NodeJS/ .NET/ ReactJS/ Angular/ VueJS)

jobDescription:
Opus Solution ( là công ty tiên phong trong lĩnh vực thiết kế, triển khai và quản lý hệ thống ứng dụng Web, cung cấp giải pháp Microsoft và tư vấn tự động hóa quy trình doanh nghiệp tại Việt Nam. Với đội ngũ lãnh đạo giàu kinh nghiệm (hơn 10 năm trong ngành), chúng tôi không ngừng mở rộng và phát triển, mang đến các giải pháp công nghệ tiên tiến cho doanh nghiệp.

Với nền tảng chuyển đổi số dành cho doanh nghiệp – Tasken eOffice - , chúng tôi hướng đến việc mang đến giải pháp thông minh giúp doanh nghiệp vận hành hiệu quả, tối ưu nguồn lực, tiết kiệm chi phí và nâng cao năng lực cạnh tranh. Các sản phẩm và dịch vụ của Opus Solution được xây dựng dựa trên kinh nghiệm thực tiễn từ những doanh nghiệp hàng đầu, đồng thời có khả năng cá nhân hóa cao, phù hợp với từng mô hình tổ chức.

Hiện tại, để đáp ứng nhu cầu phát triển, chúng tôi tìm kiếm những đồng đội mới cho vị trí sau:

Mức lương: thỏa thuận

Nhân viên lập trình

Mô tả công việc

- Tham gia phát triển, bảo trì và tối ưu các website/app của công ty
- Phân tích, thiết kế và lập trình theo yêu cầu của dự án
- Tích hợp API, kết nối hệ thống backend và cơ sở dữ liệu
- Đảm bảo hiệu năng, tính bảo mật và khả năng mở rộng của website
- Hỗ trợ xử lý lỗi, cải tiến tính năng và nâng cao trải nghiệm người dùng
- Phối hợp cùng team UI/UX, backend và QA để hoàn thiện sản phẩm
- Cập nhật công nghệ mới và áp dụng vào dự án khi phù hợp
requirements:
Yêu cầu công việc

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học/Cao đẳng chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan
- Có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm trong phát triển web (Front-end hoặc Full-stack)
- Thành thạo HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript
- Có kinh nghiệm với một hoặc nhiều framework: ReactJS, Angular, VueJS (front-end), NodeJS, .NET (back-end)
- Hiểu biết về cơ sở dữ liệu: SQL Server
- Nắm vững nguyên tắc responsive design, cross-browser compatibility
- Có kiến thức về Git, RESTful API, Web Security là lợi thế
- Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, tư duy giải quyết vấn đề và tinh thần học hỏi cao
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh theo năng lực
- Thưởng tháng thứ 13 dựa vào thành tích công việc và dự án
- Được đào tạo và tiếp cận các công nghệ mới
- Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động, cơ hội thăng tiến cao

Opus Solution ( là công ty tiên phong trong lĩnh vực thiết kế, triển khai và quản lý hệ thống ứng dụng Web, cung cấp giải pháp Microsoft và tư vấn tự động hóa quy trình doanh nghiệp tại Việt Nam. Với nền tảng chuyển đổi số dành cho doanh nghiệp – Tasken eOffice - , chúng tôi hướng đến việc mang đến giải pháp thông minh giúp doanh nghiệp vận hành hiệu quả, tối ưu nguồn lực, tiết kiệm chi phí và nâng cao năng lực cạnh tranh. Các sản phẩm và dịch vụ của Opus Solution được xây dựng dựa trên kinh nghiệm thực tiễn từ những doanh nghiệp hàng đầu, đồng thời có khả năng cá nhân hóa cao, phù hợp với từng mô hình tổ chức.

Hiện tại, để đáp ứng nhu cầu phát triển, chúng tôi tìm kiếm những đồng đội mới cho vị trí sau:

Vị trí tuyển dụng: Project Manager

Mô tả công việc

- Điều phối nguồn lực phù hợp theo mức độ ưu tiên các dự án.
- Theo dõi công việc và hiệu suất làm việc của team trong từng dự án.
- Chuẩn bị báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ: Báo cáo tuần/tháng, danh sách các rủi ro/vấn đề (Risk/Issue Log).

- Tham gia kiểm thử UAT cùng khách hàng.
- Hỗ trợ hướng dẫn, đào tạo người dùng cuối (End-user training).
- Theo sát giai đoạn go-live, hỗ trợ xử lý lỗi phát sinh & bàn giao tài liệu.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các ngành CNTT, Quản lý dự án, Hệ thống thông tin, Kinh tế, hoặc liên quan
- Có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm quản lý dự án trong lĩnh vực công nghệ, phần mềm, hoặc triển khai giải pháp.
- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm với các hệ thống: ERP, CRM, HRM, DMS, SharePoint, Power BI, Azure, Cloud…
- Hiểu biết về quy trình phát triển phần mềm (Agile/Scrum/Waterfall).
- Kỹ năng quản lý tiến độ, phân tích vấn đề và ra quyết định.
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp, đàm phán và thuyết trình tốt.
- Kỹ năng điều phối team, quản lý ưu tiên và xử lý xung đột.
- Biết sử dụng các công cụ quản lý dự án: Jira, Trello, Azure DevOps, MS Project, ClickUp...
- Có năng lực đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật, nghiệp vụ.
- Chủ động, trách nhiệm cao, tư duy tích cực.
- Biết quản lý áp lực và linh hoạt trong xử lý tình huống.
- Kỹ tính, cẩn thận trong việc ghi nhận tài liệu và quản lý thay đổi.
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, thỏa thuận theo năng lực và kinh nghiệm (kèm thưởng KPI).
- Thưởng hiệu suất, thưởng dự án và thưởng doanh thu theo kết quả kinh doanh.
- Chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định Nhà nước.
- Nghỉ phép năm 12 ngày, tăng thêm theo thâm niên.
- Du lịch, team building hằng năm và các hoạt động gắn kết nội bộ khác.
- Được tham gia các khóa đào tạo nâng cao chuyên môn, phát triển kỹ năng quản lý và lãnh đạo.
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, sáng tạo, khuyến khích đề xuất ý tưởng mới.

- Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu và xử lý sự cố hệ thống production
benefits:
1.    Chế độ lương, thưởng

- Mức lương cạnh tranh theo năng lực, xét tăng lương 1 lần/năm
- Lương tháng 13 và các khoản thưởng lễ, tết...

2.    Bảo hiểm và chăm sóc sức khỏe

- Được đóng BHXH, BHYT, BHTN, tham gia công đoàn và hưởng mọi quyền lợi theo luật lao động.
- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ.
- Chính sách nghỉ phép cho trường hợp thai sản, khám chữa bệnh,...

3.    Môi trường làm việc, cơ hội thăng tiến

- Cung cấp máy tính, trang thiết bị hiện đại
- Môi trường làm việc trẻ, năng động, tại một trong những công ty công nghệ hàng đầu về giải pháp quản lý, tạo ra giá trị hữu ích cho cộng đồng, các phần mềm được vinh danh nhận giải Sao Khuê 2021 và được giới công nghệ, báo chí truyền thông đánh giá cao
- Trải nghiệm văn hóa TMT gần gũi và thân thiện với nhiều hoạt động nội bộ
- Cơ hội thăng tiến rộng mở, minh bạch và rõ ràng

4.    Đào tạo và tham gia các hoạt động khác

- Tham gia các hoạt động đào tạo, hội thảo miễn phí do công ty đăng ký
- Thỏa sức sáng tạo và vui chơi, thể thao hàng tuần (Clb bóng đá, cầu lông,...)

title: Product Analyst ( Business Analyst, Product Owner)
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong
- An awesome zone, a second-home
jobDescription:
ABOUT THIS ROLE:

At GEEK Up, a Product Analyst collaborates across the full product lifecycle — from uncovering real user problems, defining solutions, to ensuring the quality of product (including the operations after launching). You’ll work side-by-side with Product Designers & Software Engineers in three core areas of expertise:

- Product Discovery – Understand business context, user behaviors, operational pain points to identify problem space & equivalent meaningful opportunities.
- Product Definition – Turn insights into measurable product requirements and definitions that align across User, Tech, and Operations perspectives.
- Product Operations – Validate and monitor how products perform in development progress and in reality — ensuring technical stability, usability, and business efficiency.

You don’t have to master all three yet — but you should be strong in at least two, and eager to grow in the remaining ones. You’ll gain visibility into real-world product behavior, influence product decisions through data-backed insights, and collaborate with multidisciplinary experts who challenge and grow

with you. It’s a rare opportunity to own the integrity of a product’s performance, not just its functionality.

SCOPE OF WORK:

A Product Analyst at GEEK Up is a multidisciplinary problem-solver who bridges business intent, user needs, and technical feasibility. You ensure every product we build is not only well-designed but also operationally sustainable & technically sound:

Product Discovery

- Uncover user problems and operational challenges.
- Collect, analyze, and synthesize insights from data, research, and stakeholder interviews.
- Translate findings into hypotheses and measurable problem statements.

Product Definition

- Collaborate in cross-functional squads to define product scope and measurable success metrics.
- Develop clear and structured product definitions across three dimensions:

❖ User (experience) – usability and journey validation

❖ Tech (system) – technical feasibility, NFR alignment

❖ Ops (business) – operational efficiency and scalability

- Document assumptions and criteria for validation (product readiness).

Product Operations

- Design and implement test and validation strategies to ensure real-world product performance.
- Coordinate regression, integration, and operational tests; identify and track fit gaps.
- Monitor product post-launch performance, detect friction points, and propose initiatives for improvement.
requirements:
REQUIREMENTS:

- 3+ years of experience in Product Owner, Product Analysis, Product Operations or related product management roles.
- Hands-on experience in at least two expertise areas above (Prefer Product Definition)
- Strong analytical mindset with the ability to connect user needs, business logic, and system workflows.
- Able to connect technical validation to product impact, along with deep exposure to how quality is defined beyond bugs — covering usability, business logic, and operational fit.
- Proven ability to define measurable criteria for validating product success, quality and give improvement initiatives.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across multi-disciplinary teams.
- Prior experience in the service environment is strongly preferred.

HIRING PROCESS:

To gain a deeper understanding of who you are and to ensure that GEEK Up is the battleground you desire & that you are the missing piece we are seeking, the recruitment process for this position will undergo the following steps:

- CV Screening & General Assessment
- HR Interview
- Expertise interview
- Offer Negotiation
benefits:
FOR YOUR BETTER WORK

- You will participate in the process of discovering, finding and proposing solutions, not just simply implementing the existing ones
- You can seize the opportunity to continually receive constructive feedback and suggestions, so you can easier realize what you have done well and what needs to be improved
- There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience

FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

- Our flat structure with no middle management enables you to leverage your own strengths, and make room for you to grow yourself in whatever aspect you desire.
- There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
- We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice

FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

- The flat structure will also enable you to choose your own career path and there will be a broad range of career opportunities available on your adventure at GEEK Up
- These perks will equip you with a clear mind and a healthy body: Weekly exercise with your teammates; morning coffee with free drinks; fruits, and nutritious drinks in our shared kitchen with a well-stocked fridge
- You can also enjoy team-building, retreats and other customized quarterly events with other team members

title: Agentic Coding Specialist
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
About Scandinavian Software Park

Scandinavian Software Park is Monterro’s tech hub in Hanoi, home to 150+ software engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Founded in 2021, the park connects outstanding Vietnamese engineers with Scandinavia’s market-leading software companies.

Monterro is a Stockholm-based private equity firm managing EUR 2.85bn, specializing exclusively in Nordic B2B software. We’re building a dedicated AI team called InFuse AI to accelerate AI adoption across our portfolio – and it starts right here in Hanoi.

Is this you?

You can’t stop exploring agentic coding. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, the latest open-source agent frameworks. You try them all, you compare them, you have opinions. Not because someone asked you to, but because you couldn’t resist. You read the changelogs. You follow the people building these tools. When something new drops, you’re already testing it.

Maybe you’ve built side projects just to see what’s possible. Maybe you’ve automated parts of your own workflow that nobody asked you to automate. Maybe you spend your evenings thinking about how AI changes the way developers work, not the models themselves, but what they mean for how software gets built. That’s the kind of curiosity we’re looking for.

You’re the person your colleagues come to when they want to understand what AI can actually do for their code. And you enjoy that. You like showing people, not just telling them.

You’ve shipped production software for 5+ years. You know what it’s like to maintain a legacy codebase, wrestle with technical debt, and deliver under pressure. That experience matters, it’s what gives you credibility when you sit down with a developer and say “let me show you something.”

Note: This role requires a strong software development background but the job itself is coaching and enabling other developers, not writing production code day to day. We’re looking for someone who builds with agentic coding tools, not someone who builds AI/ML models. If your background is mainly in machine learning, data science, or AI research, this probably isn’t the right fit.

Your English is strong. You communicate clearly and ask good questions.

If this sounds like you, keep reading.

What do you do?

Roughly 80% of your time: help developers get good at AI coding. The other 20% is technical assessment work for investment decisions. But this split isn’t fixed, it will shift based on what’s needed.Coach and enable developers.Scandinavian Software Park has 150+ engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Many of them haven’t yet integrated AI into how they code. Your job is to change that.You’ll work together with them directly in their codebases — not with slides and theory, but with real code and real problems. Pair programming, workshops, hands-on sessions. You’ll help teams find the workflows that actually work for them, at their level, in their stack.What this looks like day to day:

- Sit with developers and show them how to use AI tools effectively on their actual tasks
- Run workshops tailored to each team’s tech stack and experience level
- Help teams build habits — from spec-driven development to effective agent workflows to knowing when AI helps and when it doesn’t
- Support portfolio company teams based in Hanoi with agentic coding training
- Help with legacy modernization projects where AI-assisted development can make a real difference
- Create practical guides and share what works across teams

You never work in a vacuum. Every engagement is coordinated with the Swedish AI team and/or the engineering leader at the portfolio company. You’ll always have someone to discuss approach with and learn from.You don’t need to have been a professional trainer. But you need to be the kind of person who genuinely likes helping others figure things out and who is patient enough to meet people where they are.

Support investment decisions through technical assessment.

When Monterro evaluates a company for acquisition, you’ll help answer: how hard is this to build? You do this by trying to replicate the target company’s solution using AI tools. The outcome is always useful:

- If it’s easy to replicate – that tells us the solution has limited technical moat
- If it’s hard – we learn more about what’s difficult, which informs both the investment decision and where to create value afterwards

You’ll also use AI to review code quality, technical debt, and architecture in target companies and feed your findings into the investment process.

Your team:You’ll be part of Monterro’s AI team, Infuse AI – a small, senior team based in Stockholm that works across the entire portfolio. You report to the AI Lead for reviews and development, but your daily work is closely coordinated with our senior agentic coding specialist. Expect daily standups, weekly team meetings (remote) and a lot of autonomy in between.You’re the team’s presence in Hanoi. That means you’ll build relationships with developers and team leads at the park, and be the bridge between what’s happening on the ground and the AI team’s broader strategy.
requirements:
Your technical foundation

- 5+ years shipping production software – web apps, backend systems, APIs. You understand developer problems because you’ve had them yourself
- Strong in one or more of: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Python
- Hands-on, daily use of agentic coding tools. You should know your way around Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar
- You understand spec-driven development, agent workflows and how to get reliable results from agentic coding tools
- Comfortable with modern development practices: CI/CD, code review, testing, version control
- You can pick up a new codebase quickly and form a view on its architecture and quality

Your obsession

- You follow agentic coding closely – new tools, new workflows, new ways of working with AI. If we ask you “what changed in this space this week?” you should have plenty to say
- You think about how AI is changing the developer role, not just the tooling, but how teams work, how code gets reviewed how architecture decisions shift
- You’ve built things with agentic tools on your own initiative – side projects, experiments, automations. Not because it was assigned but because you wanted to
- You can talk about what you’ve tried, what worked, what didn’t and what you’d do differently
- Bonus: You do this on your own time too, not just at work

Your people skills

- You’re a clear communicator in English, written and spoken
- You enjoy teaching and coaching and people tend to trust you quickly
- You can adjust how you explain things depending on who you’re talking to
- You’re comfortable presenting to small groups and larger workshops alike
- You have the patience to help a skeptical developer see the value, and the enthusiasm to keep going

How you work

- Based in Hanoi, working from Scandinavian Software Park
- Flexible with time zones when coordinating with Nordic teams
- Comfortable switching between different companies, stacks, and contexts
- You prefer showing results over making plans. Quick wins first
- You’re comfortable with ambiguity. This role is still being shaped, and you’ll help shape it

Nice to have

- Consulting experience or a background working across multiple organizations
- Solutions architecture background
- Experience calling LLM APIs to build product features (not training or fine-tuning models)
- Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

What Success Looks Like

We don’t define success for you, that gets set together with the CTOs and team leads at each portfolio company, based on where their teams are and where they want to go.

But broadly, after 12 months you should have:

- Helped the majority of developers at the park actively use AI in their daily work
- Built practical resources and guides that teams actually refer to
- Completed several AI replication assessments for Monterro’s deal team
- Become someone developers at the park trust and seek out
- Contributed to at least one legacy modernization project

How to apply: Send your CV in English to us through the Monterro talent portal.

In your application, tell us:

- What’s the most interesting thing you’ve built or explored with AI coding tools recently?
- Describe a time you helped another developer learn something new. What did you do, and what made it work?
benefits:
Why this role is interesting:

- You get to explore AI coding tools as your actual job and help others discover what you’ve found.
- Full access to the best AI tools – Cursor, Anthropic (Claude Pro/API), OpenAI and whatever else comes next. We provide all the subscriptions and API access you need. No personal budget worries, no waiting for approval.
- You’ll work across 13+ different tech stacks and companies, not just one.
- You’ll see inside many different software businesses through the DD work.
- You’re part of building something new. Monterro’s AI practice is in its early stages.
- Scandinavian work culture: trust, autonomy, and a sensible view on work-life balance.
- Modern office at Peakview Tower in central Hanoi.
- Competitive salary for the Hanoi market.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

title: IT Infrastructure Supervisor
jobDescription:
The IT Supervisor is responsible for supervising and executing daily IT operations related to infrastructure, systems, networks, and security to ensure stable system performance and service quality.This role focuses on assigning tasks, guiding team members, and providing hands-on technical support when required. The Supervisor supports the line Manager in implementing action plans, monitors team performance, and ensures IT activities are carried out in accordance with company procedures and security standards. The position also supports continuous improvement at team level by identifying operational issues, contributing recommendations, and improving service delivery and team effectiveness.Duties and Responsibilities 1. Team & IT Operations Management• Supervise daily IT operations to ensure stable system performance and service quality • Assign tasks, guide team members, and monitor work progress and performance • Handle operational incidents and support resolution of user issues to minimize escalation • Maintain records of service requests, incidents, and operational activities • Support training and provide on-the-job guidance to improve team capability

2. Infrastructure & System Support• Support installation, configuration, and maintenance of IT infrastructure (network devices, servers, PCs, operating systems, applications)• Monitor system and network performance; perform routine checks (backups, logs, system health)• Troubleshoot system, network, and application issues and coordinate resolution• Execute deployment, upgrade, and testing tasks based on established standards

3. Service Improvement & Compliance• Support analysis of system performance and recommend improvements to line Manager• Ensure team follows IT policies, procedures, and security standards• Maintain and update IT documentation, user guidelines, and operational procedures• Support improvement of team workflows and service delivery processes

4. Coordination & Support Activities• Coordinate with internal departments, Global IT, and vendors as assigned for issue resolution and system support• Execute assigned IT project tasks and support team-level implementation• Track and maintain IT assets, including hardware, software, and accessories inventory

5. Security Systems (CCTV & Alarm)• Support monitoring and maintenance of CCTV and alarm systems• Troubleshoot issues and coordinate with vendors when required• Support incident handling and footage retrieval for investigation purposes
requirements: ► Education and Experience• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related field • At least 5 years of experience in IT operations / helpdesk / infrastructure support • At least 1 year of experience in team lead or supervisory role • Experience in logistics / freight / warehouse systems is an advantage • Experience with MS365, VMware, and backup solutions is preferred • Familiarity with ISO27001 or IT security standards is an advantage► Required Skills/Abilities:• Strong technical knowledge of IT infrastructure, network, and operating systems • Good problem-solving and analytical skills • Ability to prioritize tasks and execute effectively • Good communication and team coordination skills • Ability to guide and support team members • Upper-intermediate English communication (spoken and written) • Self-learning and continuous improvement mindset Competencies (Performance Standards)► Core competencies. • Operation & Resource Management • Problem Solving• Relationship Management • Continuous Learning & Innovation • Work Ethic & Compliance ► Leadership competencies • Business Planning (support implementation of team-level action plans) • Change Management (execute and support operational changes) • Team Leadership (task assignment, guidance, and monitoring) • People Development (on-the-job training and team guidance)► Functional/Technical competencies: Refer to the company’s skill inventory
benefits:
• Working Place: TTC Building, No. 19, Duy Tan Street, Cau Giay Dist, Hanoi City

• Working time: Monday to Friday, from 8:00 AM to 5:35 PM

• Annual Leave: 12 days/year (after probation time)

• Net salary: Negotiable (13 months a year plus Tet bonus & Annual performance bonus)

• Annual Salary Increase once per year

• Performance Assessment: twice per year (fixed in April and October)

• Insurance: 24 hours’ Accident Insurance, 100% Social Insurance, Health Care Insurance

• Others: International working environment with many opportunities for learning and development, training courses, company trip, etc.

5. Phúc lợi

THỜI GIAN LÀM VIỆC

jobDescription:

- Thiết kế levels, missions, challenges với độ khó hợp lý, sáng tạo và gây nghiện.
- Xây dựng meta game, đề xuất roadmap phát triển sản phẩm theo từng giai đoạn.
- Theo dõi chỉ số, phân tích dữ liệu, đánh giá hiệu quả tính năng để đưa ra giải pháp tối ưu.
- Đề xuất ý tưởng mới, xây dựng prototype và nghiên cứu xu hướng thị trường.
- Viết game story hoặc narrative (nếu cần) phù hợp định hướng sản phẩm.
- Phối hợp chặt chẽ cùng PO – Development – Art – UA để đảm bảo chất lượng & định hướng game.
requirements:
- Từ 1-2 năm kinh nghiệm Game Designer, có sản phẩm đã publish.
- Kinh nghiệm làm các dòng game Puzzle, Casual, Hyper Casual
- Nắm vững các khái niệm game design: Fun factors, User Motivation, Core Loop, Progression...
- Hiểu rõ về UI/UX, game balance, pacing, reward system.
- Có khả năng phân tích điểm mạnh/yếu của game và đề xuất cải thiện.
- Đam mê chơi game, có tư duy sáng tạo & logic tốt.
- Chủ động giao tiếp, tiếp nhận feedback tốt và phối hợp nhịp nhàng với team.
- Bắt buộc đính kèm portfolio hoặc link sản phẩm trong CV.
benefits:
- Tham gia trực tiếp vào các sản phẩm mobile game triệu user toàn cầu.
- Được tiếp cận và cập nhật xu hướng mới từ các đối tác lớn.
- Cơ hội tham gia dự án lớn & nâng cao thu nhập nhanh.
- Có cơ hội lên Leader trong 3–6 tháng nếu thể hiện tốt. Thu nhập
- Up to 35.000.000 VND (Gross) + thưởng.
- Review thưởng theo quý, thưởng nóng, tăng lương 2 lần/năm.

jobDescription:

requirements:

title: IT Security & Network Engineer
reasons:
- Attractive and Transparent Compensation & Bonuses
- Comprehensive Healthcare and Employee Well-being
- Professional Work Environment
jobDescription:
Security Policy & Governance

- Develop and enforce IT security policies, procedures, and standards in strict alignment with local banking regulations (e.g., SBV Circular 09).
- Define and manage Network Access Control (NAC) and Firewall policies to maintain strict network segmentation across DMZ, Internal, and Database zones.
- Establish robust security hardening standards for all network devices, servers, and endpoints.
- Manage Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies and proactively monitor privileged account activities.

Security Operations & Incident Response

- Administer and manage policies for Next-Gen Firewalls, IDS/IPS, WAF, and DLP solutions.
- Lead end-to-end responses to cybersecurity incidents, encompassing Detection, Containment, and Root Cause Analysis (RCA).
- Coordinate regular vulnerability assessments, manage remediation actions, and oversee third-party Penetration Testing (Pen-testing).

Network Infrastructure Management

- Design, implement, and maintain the bank’s internal and external network architecture (L2/L3 Switching, Routing, VLAN).
- Manage and optimize secure connectivity (such as VPNs) between Headquarters, branches, and Data Centers.
- Continuously monitor network performance and ensure High Availability (HA) for core banking services.

Compliance & Governance

- Ensure all network and security configurations fully comply with local financial regulations (e.g., SBV Circular 09/2020).
- Develop detailed technical documentation and gather comprehensive evidence to support IT audits and security inspections.
- Conduct regular network and security health checks and provide detailed reporting.
requirements:
Must-Have

- Experience: 5+ years of experience in Network & Security operations; prior experience in the Banking or Financial sector is mandatory.
- Setup Experience: Demonstrated experience in setting up secure networks from scratch for new financial entities or branches.
- Policy Expertise: Proven track record of translating complex regulatory and compliance requirements into actionable technical security policies.
- Domain Knowledge: Strong understanding of Vietnamese Cybersecurity laws and local banking technical standards.
- Technical Skills: Hands-on experience operating enterprise-grade security devices and network monitoring tools, coupled with a strong background in resolving security breaches or network-related incidents. Deep technical understanding of TCP/IP, Routing protocols (OSPF, BGP), and overall Network Security architecture.
- Language: Intermediate English proficiency, specifically the ability to accurately document security policies and respond confidently during technical audits.

Nice-to-Have

- Holding recognized professional security certifications such as CISSP, CCNP Security, CEH, or CISA.
- Practical experience dealing with ISO/IEC 27001 certification, maintenance processes, or internal auditing.
benefits:
Itviec's Client is currently representing a premier 100% foreign-owned bank from South Korea, a dominant force in East Asian finance with over 60 years of heritage. As a leader in corporate and digital banking, our client is aggressively expanding its tech hub in Vietnam to redefine cross-border financial services. This is a rare opportunity to join a global financial giant that combines a long-standing reputation for stability with a forward-thinking approach to digital transformation and Fintech innovation.

3 Reasons Why You Should Join

- Global Prestige & Career Stability: Work for a top-tier international bank known for its rock-solid financial foundation. You will benefit from a professional, structured environment that follows global banking standards, offering long-term career security and a clear path for professional growth.
- Premium Compensation & Benefits: Beyond a highly competitive salary, you will enjoy the elite "Banking-standard" benefit package, including generous performance bonuses (13th month and beyond), comprehensive premium health insurance, and attractive allowances that stand out in the tech market.
- High-Impact Fintech Projects: Get hands-on experience with sophisticated Core Banking systems, cross-border payment gateways, and advanced security architectures. You will collaborate directly with international experts from the HQ, gaining invaluable exposure to global financial technologies and "system-thinking" methodologies.

title: Senior/ Lead Game Developer (Unity, C#, Git)

- Nắm vững C#, Unity và tư duy xây dựng kiến trúc game dễ mở rộng, dễ bảo trì; hiểu rõ Design Pattern, SOLID, Memory Management và Garbage Collection trong Unity.

- Biết ứng dụng AI vào công việc để hỗ trợ coding, debug, research, viết tài liệu hoặc tối ưu workflow.

Ưu tiên:

- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển game Idle Tycoon, Simulation, Casual/Hybrid-casual hoặc game mobile có nhiều agent/object trên màn hình.

- Có chứng chỉ/khóa học chuyên sâu về Unity, mobile optimization, computer graphics, backend hoặc DevOps là lợi thế.

title: Database Administrator (SQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB)
reasons:
- An inspiring work environment.
- Annual salary reviews and adjustments.
- Company activities and parties.
jobDescription:
Job Description

Our HCM is an enterprise HR SaaS platform currently in active operation and continuous expansion. The system covers Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations, and Custom Modules for Enterprise Clients.

The DBA will lead database operations for HR SaaS platform, ensuring high availability, performance, security, and reliability across hybrid cloud environments. This role is both hands-on and strategic — responsible for building and mentoring the database team from the ground up, and driving database modernization initiatives, including migration from SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL.

Key Responsibilities

- Manage SQL Server and PostgreSQL databases across hybrid cloud (AWS, Huawei Cloud) ensuring 99.9% uptime and performance SLAs
- Troubleshoot and resolve critical performance issues (slow queries, indexing, blocking, deadlocks)
- Implement monitoring, alerting, automated health checks, and self-healing integrated with Prometheus/Grafana
- Lead P0/P1 incident response and conduct root cause analysis
- Design and maintain backup, HA, and disaster recovery strategies
- Define database standards and provisioning for multi-tenant architecture
- Support SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL migration initiatives
- Collaborate with other members of the DBA team in other locations
- Ensure PDPA compliance and collaborate with internal teams and external vendors
requirements:
Experience

- 5+ years of database administration experience in production, multi-tenant environments
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field
- Master’s degree is an advantage
- Strong expertise in query optimization, indexing strategies, execution plans, and SQL performance tuning
- Hands-on experience with database monitoring and observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana)
- Solid knowledge of backup/recovery, high availability (HA), and disaster recovery (DR)
- Proven experience in crisis management, incident response, and root cause analysis (RCA)
- Experience building or mentoring technical teams
- Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills

Preferred:

- Experience with MariaDB or PostgreSQL administration
- Kubernetes-based database operations
- Multi-cloud environments (AWS, Huawei Cloud)
- GitOps and CI/CD practices for database changes
- Knowledge of PDPA and data protection compliance
- Scripting skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell)

Language

- Able to communicate in English in a professional working environment (reading technical documents, participating in discussions with international team members)
benefits:
- An inspiring work environment.
- Competitive salary packages with annual reviews and adjustments.
- Opportunities for training, education, and professional growth.
- A knowledge-sharing atmosphere with enthusiastic professionals.
- Company activities, team events, and social gatherings.
- Opportunity to become a Vietnam HR domain expert within a global organization

title: Enterprise Architect
company: Tổng công ty Tân Cảng Sài Gòn (Saigon NewPort Corporation)
reasons:
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, trẻ trung
- Tham gia các chương trình đào tạo không giới hạn
- Lương hấp dẫn/thưởng tháng 13 và các khoản khác
jobDescription:
We are looking for an Enterprise Architect to own and evolve the Enterprise Architecture Blueprint for large-scale IT & Digital Transformation programs in port, logistics, and infrastructure operations.You will shape long-term architecture direction, ensure consistency across projects, and protect the organization from fragmentation and technical debt.

Key responsibilities

- Own and maintain the Enterprise Architecture Blueprint (Business, Application, Data, Integration, Technology).
- Define architecture principles (API-first, event-driven, platform-based, security-by-design).
- Review and govern architecture for IT & DX projects.
- Guide solution architects and vendors to ensure alignment with long-term architecture.
- Identify and manage technical debt across systems.
- Support architecture design for strategic initiatives when needed.
requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in IT, with experience in architecture roles (EA / Solution / System Architect).
- Experience with large-scale, integrated systems (ERP, logistics, data platforms, etc.).
- Strong system thinking and ability to balance long-term vision with delivery realities.
- Experience working with multiple projects and vendors.
- Architecture frameworks (TOGAF, ArchiMate) are a plus, not mandatory.

Who should apply:

- Senior architects ready to move beyond pure implementation.
- Professionals who enjoy building foundations, not just projects.
- Architects who can defend good architecture under delivery pressure.
benefits:
- Architect digital foundations for a national-scale infrastructure enterprise.
- High-impact role influencing strategic technology decisions.
- Long-term vision, stable environment, real authority in architecture governance.
- Flexible model: expert contract → internal role.

title: Senior IT Consultant (Business Analyst/ Worklow)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
About the role

Join Bosch in shaping the future of internal digital solutions for a global organization of 500,000+ users. As a Senior IT Consultant, you will collaborate with Business Analysts, developers, and stakeholders to modernize workflow platforms, drive digital transformation initiatives, and deliver scalable solutions that create business impact.

Key Responsibilities

• Analyze existing workflow platforms, gather requirements, identify gaps, and support migration initiatives to next-generation technologies.

• Engage with stakeholders to collect, analyze, and translate business requirements into clear user stories and actionable solutions.

• Act as a bridge between business teams and development teams to ensure smooth communication and successful project delivery.

• Develop business insights dashboards and provide data-driven recommendations to improve efficiency and decision-making.

• Support strategic initiatives through business analysis, process optimization, and workflow improvements.

• Participate in Agile activities including sprint planning, backlog refinement, and retrospectives.

• Support change management activities and ensure successful adoption of new systems and processes.

• Plan and execute UAT activities to ensure solutions meet business requirements and quality standards.

• Develop training materials and user documentation to support system adoption.
requirements:
• Bachelor's or Master's degree in Information Technology, Business Management, Computer Science, or related fields.

• At least 05 years of Business Analysis experience in internal IT solutions or workflow transformation projects.

• Strong communication skills in English with experience working in multinational environments.

• Experience with stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration.

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Experience with SQL and data visualization tools.

• Experience working with Agile methodologies and software development lifecycle processes.

• Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.

Nice to have

• Experience mentoring junior Business Analysts.

• Knowledge of workflow platforms and digital transformation initiatives.

• Certifications such as CBAP, PMI-PBA, or Agile certifications.
benefits:
This role follows Bosch’s third-party employment model. The product is already running, and this is not intended as a short-term engagement. Contract renewal is considered based on performance

But no worries — you'll still enjoy an attractive benefits package, including:

• Company-sponsored Generali private health insurance• 100% company-covered personal accident insurance• Guaranteed 13th-month bonus upon contract completion• 12 annual leave days to support your work-life balance

Chúng tôi luôn hướng tới việc xây dựng môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, sáng tạo và tạo điều kiện để mỗi cá nhân phát triển toàn diện trong lĩnh vực công nghệ.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

- Tham gia phát triển các hệ thống phần mềm, ứng dụng và nền tảng chuyển đổi số cho khách hàng trong và ngoài nước.
- Phân tích yêu cầu, thiết kế và phát triển các tính năng theo yêu cầu dự án.

requirements:

- Đối với ứng viên Java developer yêu cầu có kinh nghiệm làm việc với ReactJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

- Tư duy logic tốt, chủ động trong công việc và có tinh thần teamwork.

Đãi ngộ (lương, thưởng, review lương):

Văn hoá môi trường làm việc:

Khả năng thăng tiến trong công việc (Sếp, cơ hội học hỏi):
