jobDescription:
Kỹ sư AI (Phần mềm) chịu trách nhiệm thiết kế, phát triển và tích hợp các giải pháp trí tuệ nhân tạo (đặc biệt là các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn - LLM, hệ thống RAG và AI Agent) vào nền tảng phần mềm của tổ chức. Vận hành, tối ưu hóa hạ tầng LLMOps và cơ sở dữ liệu vector, đảm bảo tính sẵn sàng, hiệu năng cao, độ chính xác và tính bảo mật của hệ thống ứng dụng AI dành cho khách hàng nội bộ và đối tác.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

- Tiếp nhận, phân tích và chuyển đổi các yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ các phòng ban thành kiến trúc phần mềm AI; xác định giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp (như hệ thống Multi-Agent hoặc RAG pipeline) và đánh giá tính khả thi của dự án.
- Thực hiện phát triển và tối ưu hóa hệ thống Tìm kiếm tăng cường truy xuất (RAG): xử lý tiền dữ liệu (parsing, chunking), xây dựng quy trình nhúng dữ liệu (embedding) và cấu trúc Cơ sở dữ liệu Vector (Vector Database).
- Triển khai và thực thi quy trình phát triển phần mềm và vòng đời MLOps/LLMOps theo các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật nghiêm ngặt, đảm bảo tính toàn vẹn của mã nguồn, phiên bản mô hình và dữ liệu.
- Vận hành, cấu hình và bảo trì các thành phần hạ tầng phục vụ AI: hệ thống máy chủ ứng dụng (Next.js, Golang), API Gateway, môi trường container hóa (Docker) và các dịch vụ điều phối AI Agent.
- Xây dựng, tinh chỉnh và tối ưu hóa kỹ thuật thiết kế câu lệnh (Prompt Engineering), cơ chế kiểm soát chất lượng phản hồi nhằm giảm thiểu hiện tượng ảo tưởng (hallucination), tối ưu độ trễ (latency) và tiết kiệm chi phí tài nguyên API.
- Quản lý và theo dõi kho dữ liệu tri thức: thu thập, chuẩn hóa, phân loại và tích hợp mã nguồn, tài liệu kỹ thuật vào hệ thống lưu trữ tập trung để phục vụ cho việc huấn luyện hoặc truy xuất dữ liệu tự động
- Lập báo cáo phân tích hiệu năng hệ thống AI, báo cáo định kỳ về chi phí sử dụng tài nguyên (Token, hạ tầng phần cứng) và kiểm tra mức độ chính xác của mô hình gửi đến ban lãnh đạo và các bên liên quan.
- Hỗ trợ và hướng dẫn các đội ngũ phát triển phần mềm khác trong việc tích hợp API và kết nối các dịch vụ AI; tham gia xây dựng quy trình, tài liệu kiến trúc hệ thống và playbook vận hành nội bộ của phòng công nghệ.

QUYỀN HẠN

- Xử lý công việc trong phạm vi quy định công ty.
- Đề xuất ý kiến đối với các công việc được đảm nhiệm.
- Đề xuất cải tiến quy trình làm việc .
- Đề xuất các chương trình đào tạo nâng cao kỹ năng trong công việc.
- Đề xuất các công cụ hoặc công nghệ tự động hóa nhiệm vụ và giảm khối lượng công việc.
requirements:
- Trình độ học vấn: Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Trí tuệ nhân tạo, Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ thông tin, Kỹ thuật phần mềm hoặc các ngành kỹ thuật liên quan.
- Ngoại ngữ: Có khả năng đọc hiểu tốt tài liệu kỹ thuật, tài liệu API và tài liệu nghiên cứu công nghệ bằng tiếng Anh
- Kiến thức chuyên mônNắm vững nền tảng một trong các ngôn ngữ lập trình: Python, Golang, hoặc JavaScript/TypeScript (Next.js/React).Hiểu biết cơ bản về kiến trúc hệ thống AI, quy trình hoạt động của Mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM), hệ thống RAG và AI Agent.Có kiến thức nền tảng về cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ (SQL) và khái niệm về cơ sở dữ liệu vector (Vector Database như Milvus, Qdrant, Pinecone...).Hiểu rõ về phát triển và tích hợp RESTful API, cấu trúc dữ liệu JSON và các giao thức kết nối hệ thống.Có kiến thức cơ bản về Docker, container hóa ứng dụng và thao tác trên môi trường hệ điều hành Linux là một lợi thế.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

- Xây dựng và cập nhật các quy trình giám sát, phản ứng sự cố (incident response).
- Lập báo cáo định kỳ về tình trạng an toàn thông tin.
- Đề xuất cải tiến hệ thống bảo mật nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả giám sát.

title: Senior Backend Developer (.NET)
jobDescription:
About Trustify TechnologyTrustify Technology is a fast-growing software engineering and digital transformation company providing AI-driven software development, verification & validation, and automation solutions for global clients across the US, UK/EU, Japan, and Singapore.Trustify aims to be the top-tier technology outsourcing partner from Vietnam, combining human expertise with AI power to deliver high-quality, cost-effective solutions.

About Senior Software Engineer PositionWe’re looking for a Backend .NET Engineer to join a large-scale travel platform serving complex booking and supplier integration workflows. This role offers the opportunity to work on real-world enterprise systems, solve production-critical challenges, and contribute to improving the reliability and scalability of a high-traffic platform.

Responsibilities

- Investigate and resolve production/system issues
- Develop and maintain features in a large enterprise travel platform
- Debug cross-service and asynchronous workflows
- Work with distributed/domain-based architecture
- Collaborate with product, operations, and support teams
- Improve system reliability, performance, and maintainability
- Support integrations with suppliers and third-party systems
requirements:
- Strong experience with C#, .NET Framework 4.8, ASP.NET MVC/Web API
- Solid knowledge of SQL Server, query optimization, and REST API integration
- Experience with RabbitMQ or message-driven/distributed systems
- Familiar with IIS, Windows Server, and enterprise/legacy applications
- Strong debugging, troubleshooting, and production support skills
- Understanding of distributed/SOA architectures
- Effective English communication skills (written and spoken) for working with UK-based stakeholders

Preferred Experience

- Experience with travel, OTA, or booking platforms
- Experience with supplier/third-party integrations and distributed systems
- Familiar with AWS/cloud infrastructure, Solr, and logging/audit/tracing systems

jobDescription:
Core Platform & Architecture Security

- Design and implement Secure Boot, Chain of Trust, Measured Boot
- Define and maintain Root of Trust (RoT) / Platform Root of Trust
- Develop and integrate Trusted Execution Environment (TEE)
- Work with Secure Partition Manager (SPM) and secure OS components
- Support Automotive PKI, V2X Security, SCMS
- Implement Key Management, Key Provisioning, Secure Key Injection

Runtime Protection & Isolation

- Design runtime isolation using: Hypervisors (Type-1 / Type-2): Xen, Jailhouse, ACRN, VM separation and virtualization security
- Implement application sandboxing & containerization
- Define and maintain SELinux/SEAndroid policies
- Implement Integrity Measurement Architecture (IMA)
- Ensure process/thread isolation and memory protection: MPU, MMU, SMMU
requirements:
- Major in Computers or IT/Computer science/Electrical engineering/Embedded electronics
- More than 3+ years of relevant experience
- Strong experience in:- Embedded systems & Embedded Linux- C/C++ programming- Bootloader, OS startup, low-level system architecture- ARM architecture & TrustZone- Hypervisor and virtualization concepts- Linux security frameworks (SELinux, IMA, netfilter)
- Solid knowledge of:- Embedded cybersecurity- Cryptography fundamentals (PKI, TLS, key management)- Hardware-based security mechanisms
- Soft Skills:- Strong system-level thinking and problem-solving skills- Ability to work across hardware, OS, and application teams- Good communication skills in English- Ability to work in complex, safety-critical environments

title: Lead QC Engineer (Automation & Gen AI)
reasons:
- Disruptive innovations
- People-oriented philosophy of doing business
- Your footprint on regional on-demand market
jobDescription:
We are seeking a visionary Lead QC Engineer with 5–7 years of experience to spearhead our transition into AI-augmented quality engineering. In this role, you will architect an Automation-First ecosystem powered by Generative AI and high-velocity deployment tools. You aren't just managing a test suite; you are leveraging cutting-edge CLI tools like Claude Code and robust frameworks like Antigravity to ensure reliability at the speed of modern development.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIESAutomation & Gen AI Execution (65%)

- AI-Native Development: Use Claude Code (CLI) to accelerate script generation, perform real-time code refactoring, and automate the creation of complex test suites directly from the terminal.
- High-Velocity Execution: Implement and maintain automation workflows using Antigravity, ensuring tests are lightweight, fast-executing, and resilient across different environments.
- Gen AI Execution Strategy: Build "Prompt Libraries" and AI agents to handle the heavy lifting of manual-to-automated script conversion (Playwright/Cypress).
- CI/CD Intelligence: Integrate AI-driven insights into GitLab/Jenkins pipelines to predict "flaky" tests and optimize execution paths based on code changes.
- Self-Healing Frameworks: Design automation layers that utilize LLMs to self-correct scripts when UI elements or API contracts shift.

Process Innovation & Strategy (20%)

- Workflow Engineering: Re-engineer the QC lifecycle by deploying AI agents for defect triaging, log analysis, and automated bug reporting.
- Tech Advocacy: Continuously evaluate the intersection of Claude Code, LLMs, and Antigravity to minimize "gravity" (friction) in the release cycle.
- Efficiency Metrics: Define and track "AI-Lift" metrics—measuring how AI integration reduces time-to-market and increases test coverage.

Leadership & Mentorship (15%)

- The "Automation-Mindset": Coach the team to move beyond manual validation, fostering a culture where AI assistants are the primary driver for efficiency.
- Strategic Alignment: Partner with DevOps and Engineering leads to align quality gates with rapid, "Antigravity-speed" deployment cycles.
requirements:
- Experience: 5–7 years in QA/QC, with at least 2 years in a Lead capacity spearheading automation initiatives.
- Automation Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Java. Hands-on experience with Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium.

Advanced Tooling & AI:

- Claude Code: Proficiency in using Claude’s CLI for agentic coding, automated debugging, and script generation.
- Antigravity: Proven experience leveraging Antigravity for high-efficiency test execution and infrastructure management.
- LLM Literacy: Expert at using GPT-4, Claude 3.5/4, and AI-powered IDEs (Cursor/GitHub Copilot).

Technical Stack:

- Deep knowledge of API Testing (Postman, RestAssured) and Microservices.
- Proficiency in Docker/K8s and cloud-native environments.

Soft Skills: A technical "tinkerer" who can explain complex AI workflows to stakeholders and mentor junior engineers in the art of Prompt Engineering.
benefits:

- Emotional Wellbeing Benefit: Company Trip, Year End Party, Aha Hour Activities, Special Day Gifts, Aha Club (Badminton, Soccer).

title: Remote AI Engineer (Deep Learning Algorithm/ Python)
location: Ho Chi Minh - Ha Noi - Da Nang
reasons:
- Build Real AI Products That Reach Users:
- High Ownership, High Impact
- Startup Speed with Global Vision
jobDescription:
VisionTech is building an algorithm team capable of truly integrating deep learning into products and onto terminal devices. This role is not just about connecting models or tuning packages; it requires continuously improving model performance under the constraints of terminal computing power, memory, latency, and product limitations. We are looking for someone who possesses the complete capability from problem definition and method design to experimental verification. We hope you don't just use models, but deeply understand the principles behind them, can independently dismantle abstract problems, propose hypotheses, design experiments, and land research results into real products.

Responsibilities:

- Challenges: Continuously improve model performance under limited computing power and memory, advancing from demos to mass-producible, maintainable, and continuously evolving products, and flexibly responding to product issues reported by customers.
- Edge AI Design: Responsible for the design, training, optimization, and deployment of Edge AI models to improve product performance under terminal platform power constraints.
- Systemic Improvement: Systematically improve model performance based on feedback and demo requirements through model architecture, training methods, loss design, data preprocessing, data cleaning, and augmentation strategies.
- Performance Balancing: Analyze performance bottlenecks and balance accuracy, latency, memory, and power consumption according to product requirements and hardware constraints.
- Technical Research: Independently read papers, track technical progress, and evaluate applicability and cost-effectiveness for actual products. Deconstruct vague or abstract product problems into verifiable technical questions, proposing improvement directions and planning experiments.
requirements:
- Location: Not based in Taiwan. We are looking for partners permanently based overseas (i.e., not in Taiwan), regardless of nationality.
- Deep Learning Fundamentals: Familiarity with basic principles including, but not limited to:Neural network optimizationRegularizationGeneralizationModel evaluation and error analysis
- Neural network optimization
- Regularization
- Generalization
- Model evaluation and error analysis
- Development Experience: Practical experience in model development with the ability to independently complete:Problem definitionData analysisModel trainingExperimental designResult interpretation
- Problem definition
- Data analysis
- Model training
- Experimental design
- Result interpretation
- Frameworks: Familiarity with at least one mainstream deep learning framework, such as PyTorch.
- Engineering Skills: Solid programming skills and engineering habits, capable of writing maintainable, reproducible, and scalable research and training code.
- Analytical Ability: Ability to read technical papers and transform them into executable experimental plans. Possess independent thinking and problem-deconstruction skills rather than relying solely on existing recipes or ready-made models.
- Edge Constraints: Understanding of common constraints and challenges when landing models on edge/embedded platforms, such as:LatencyModel sizeMemory footprintFLOPs
- Latency
- Model size
- Memory footprint
- FLOPs

Preferred Qualifications:

- Publications/Patents: Previously published patents or deep learning papers in international conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, ICLR, CVPR, etc.).
- Specialized Experience:Model compression, pruning, and quantizationKnowledge distillationOn-device inference optimizationResearch/development experience in generative models
- Model compression, pruning, and quantization
- Knowledge distillation
- On-device inference optimization
- Research/development experience in generative models
- Deployment: Experience deploying models to actual terminal platforms.
- Data Strategy: Familiarity with the impact of data preprocessing and quality on model performance; experience in data engineering or data strategy optimization.
- Project Lifecycle: Experience advancing research topics or production projects from 0 to 1.
- Resource Management: Successfully achieved acceptable model performance and deployment costs in resource-constrained scenarios.

Ideal Candidate Attributes:

- Not satisfied with just "getting the model running," but asks "why it works, why it failed, and how to make it better."
- Actively establishes baselines, proposes hypotheses, and designs verification processes when facing abstract problems.
- Finds balance between research depth and product reality rather than just chasing paper ideas or simple engineering stacking.
- Passionate about deep learning and willing to translate understanding into real-world systems.

Qualifications & Package:

- Education: Master's degree or above in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or related fields.
- Location: Not based in Taiwan.
- Compensation: Cash compensation will be based on your strength and location. We provide a "competitive" equity package (out company believes that those with IPO experience in this industry understand the high potential of stock options).
benefits:
- Build Real AI Products That Reach Users: Your work contributes directly to real-world AI imaging technologies integrated into consumer devices and applications.
- High Ownership, High Impact: Every team member plays a critical role in product direction, technical innovation, and strategic decision-making.
- Startup Speed with Global Vision: Experience the fast-paced energy of a startup while working on technologies designed for international markets and large-scale commercialization.
- Work on cutting-edge AI imaging technologies that directly shape future smartphone experiences
- Opportunity to participate in end-to-end product innovation, from algorithm concepts to commercialization
- Small but highly agile international team with strong ownership culture and fast execution
- Exposure to collaborations with smartphone ecosystem partners and global technology companies
- Flexible and innovation-driven environment where ideas can rapidly become real products
- Opportunity to contribute to IP-driven products with strong market differentiation potential
- Cross-functional collaboration across AI, product design, engineering, and business strategy

title: Product Analyst ( Business Analyst, Product Owner)
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong
- An awesome zone, a second-home
jobDescription:
ABOUT THIS ROLE:

At GEEK Up, a Product Analyst collaborates across the full product lifecycle — from uncovering real user problems, defining solutions, to ensuring the quality of product (including the operations after launching). You’ll work side-by-side with Product Designers & Software Engineers in three core areas of expertise:

- Product Discovery – Understand business context, user behaviors, operational pain points to identify problem space & equivalent meaningful opportunities.
- Product Definition – Turn insights into measurable product requirements and definitions that align across User, Tech, and Operations perspectives.
- Product Operations – Validate and monitor how products perform in development progress and in reality — ensuring technical stability, usability, and business efficiency.

You don’t have to master all three yet — but you should be strong in at least two, and eager to grow in the remaining ones. You’ll gain visibility into real-world product behavior, influence product decisions through data-backed insights, and collaborate with multidisciplinary experts who challenge and grow

with you. It’s a rare opportunity to own the integrity of a product’s performance, not just its functionality.

SCOPE OF WORK:

A Product Analyst at GEEK Up is a multidisciplinary problem-solver who bridges business intent, user needs, and technical feasibility. You ensure every product we build is not only well-designed but also operationally sustainable & technically sound:

Product Discovery

- Uncover user problems and operational challenges.
- Collect, analyze, and synthesize insights from data, research, and stakeholder interviews.
- Translate findings into hypotheses and measurable problem statements.

Product Definition

- Collaborate in cross-functional squads to define product scope and measurable success metrics.
- Develop clear and structured product definitions across three dimensions:

❖ User (experience) – usability and journey validation

❖ Tech (system) – technical feasibility, NFR alignment

❖ Ops (business) – operational efficiency and scalability

- Document assumptions and criteria for validation (product readiness).

Product Operations

- Design and implement test and validation strategies to ensure real-world product performance.
- Coordinate regression, integration, and operational tests; identify and track fit gaps.
- Monitor product post-launch performance, detect friction points, and propose initiatives for improvement.
requirements:
REQUIREMENTS:

- 4+ years of experience in Product Owner, Product Analysis, Product Operations or related product management roles.
- Hands-on experience in at least two expertise areas above (Prefer Product Definition)
- Strong analytical mindset with the ability to connect user needs, business logic, and system workflows.
- Able to connect technical validation to product impact, along with deep exposure to how quality is defined beyond bugs — covering usability, business logic, and operational fit.
- Proven ability to define measurable criteria for validating product success, quality and give improvement initiatives.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across multi-disciplinary teams.
- Prior experience in the service environment is strongly preferred.

HIRING PROCESS:

To gain a deeper understanding of who you are and to ensure that GEEK Up is the battleground you desire & that you are the missing piece we are seeking, the recruitment process for this position will undergo the following steps:

- CV Screening & General Assessment
- HR Interview
- Expertise interview
- Offer Negotiation
benefits:
FOR YOUR BETTER WORK

- You will participate in the process of discovering, finding and proposing solutions, not just simply implementing the existing ones
- You can seize the opportunity to continually receive constructive feedback and suggestions, so you can easier realize what you have done well and what needs to be improved
- There are team members sharing lessons learned, so each and everyone can keep building up knowledge and experience

FOR YOUR BETTER GROW

- Our flat structure with no middle management enables you to leverage your own strengths, and make room for you to grow yourself in whatever aspect you desire.
- There are weekly workshops and sharings, where we exchange our knowledge and experience, from technical to soft skills, from work to daily life subjects
- We embrace the eagerness of learning and sharing, so you will always have room to raise your own voice

FOR YOUR BETTER STAY

- The flat structure will also enable you to choose your own career path and there will be a broad range of career opportunities available on your adventure at GEEK Up
- These perks will equip you with a clear mind and a healthy body: Weekly exercise with your teammates; morning coffee with free drinks; fruits, and nutritious drinks in our shared kitchen with a well-stocked fridge
- You can also enjoy team-building, retreats and other customized quarterly events with other team members

title: Frontend Developer (ReactJS, TypeScript, CSS)

title: Automotive AUTOSAR Base SW Developer (1 year contract)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:

jobDescription:
This position will be contracted through Bosch’s external vendor under a one-year agreement.

MS/ESC XC Horizontal ENE

Horizontal NE is a cross‑domain engineering organization within XC, responsible for developing and scaling reusable software and platform assets across ADAS, Radar, Video, and integrated vehicle computing platforms. The organization owns horizontal topics such as base software, middleware, safety, security, compute, and engineering methods, supporting XC‑CP, XC‑CE, XC‑AC, and XC‑AS products. Horizontal NE works closely with product teams to enable standardization, reuse, and technical alignment across projects. It plays a key role in building future‑ready platforms for software‑defined vehicles, ensuring high quality, efficiency, and scalability across XC portfolios.

Main Roles and Responsibilities

Work as part of Bosch’s global ADAS teams to develop and integrate AUTOSAR Classic BSW and diagnostics software for next‑generation driver assistance ECUs (radar, camera, sensor fusion, domain controllers).

Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain embedded AUTOSAR Classic software (BSW and low‑level SW) for ADAS ECUs using C/C++.
- Configure, integrate, and debug AUTOSAR BSW modules, with focus on: Diagnostics, CAN Communication, Failure management and PDM.
- Collaborate closely with global system, hardware, and application teams to ensure end‑to‑end integration of BSW with ADAS applications (e.g., radar, camera, sensor fusion).
- Participate in the complete software development lifecycle: requirements analysis, architecture & design, implementation, unit/integration testing, debug, and maintenance.
- Optimize software performance and memory usage for resource-constrained embedded systems.
- Conduct code reviews, ensure adherence to Bosch coding guidelines, MISRA rules (if applicable), and best practices.
- Develop and execute unit tests and integration tests; support SIL/HIL testing and vehicle testing as needed.
- Ensure compliance with ISO 26262 (functional safety) and Automotive SPICE processes contribute to work products and assessments.
- Create and maintain software architecture, design, and interface documentation for global stakeholders.
- Use tools such as CANoe, CANalyzer, debuggers, emulators, and simulators for development, analysis, and issue resolution.
- Stay updated with the latest AUTOSAR specifications and implement compliant software solutions.
- Contribute to the development of software architecture and design documents.
- Collaborate with hardware engineers to ensure optimal software-hardware integration.
- Participate in technical discussions in an international, distributed team; and actively provide innovative solutions to complex engineering challenges.
- Work, design reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives.
requirements:
Mandatory Qualifications

- Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in Electronics, Electrical, Mechatronics, Computer Science, or related field.
- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; comfortable collaborating in global teams.

Technical Skills

- 1-5 years of experience in embedded software development
- Strong Technical skills preferably in automotive domain & Good experience in programming in C, C++ for embedded systems.
- Experience with AUTOSAR Classic architecture and BSW and ASPICE know-how.
- Good understanding of microcontrollers, low‑level drivers, and embedded RTOS concepts.
- Experience / Familiarity in:Vehicle diagnostics and fault management SWAUTOSAR modules: Diagnostic Error Management (DEM), Diagnostic Communication Management (DCM), Communication Stack (CAN\Ethernet\LIN protocol)Automotive protocols and standards: ISO 14229, ISO 15765, ISO 14230, ISO 26262.
- Vehicle diagnostics and fault management SW
- AUTOSAR modules: Diagnostic Error Management (DEM), Diagnostic Communication Management (DCM), Communication Stack (CAN\Ethernet\LIN protocol)
- Automotive protocols and standards: ISO 14229, ISO 15765, ISO 14230, ISO 26262.
- Familiarity with CANoe, CANalyzer, and issue/requirement tracking tools (e.g., Jira, DOORS/ or similar).
- Prior Experience with ADAS‑related ECUs (radar, camera, sensor fusion, braking/steering controllers) is a strong plus.

Soft Skills

- Self‑driven, proactive, and able to take ownership of modules/features end‑to‑end.
- Strong teamwork, interpersonal skills, and problem‑solving ability.
- High degree of self-discipline, quality focus, and willingness to learn new technologies in ADAS and autonomous driving.
benefits: Further details regarding benefits will be shared during the interview process.

title: Senior Java Software Engineer (AWS, Acting Lead)
reasons:
- Flexible Friday afternoon
- 18 Annual Leave + 5 Recharge Days/ Year
- Hybrid working model
jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Java Technical Leader to lead and grow a team of Software Engineers delivering scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.

In this role, you will combine strong Java architecture expertise, technical leadership, and modern engineering practices, including effective use of AI-assisted tools to improve productivity, quality, and decision-making.

You will work closely with international stakeholders, take end-to-end ownership of technical outcomes, and foster a culture of engineering excellence, continuous learning, and smart adoption of new technologies.

Key Responsibilities:

Technical & Team Leadership

- Lead, mentor, and coach a team of Software Engineers, supporting their technical growth and career development.
- Act as a hands-on technical leader, setting coding standards, architectural principles, and best practices.
- Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and learning-oriented team culture with strong ownership and accountability.
- Guide engineers on effective and responsible use of AI tools to enhance daily engineering work (e.g., design, coding, debugging, testing, documentation).
- Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve complex performance or scalability issues.
- Work closely with DevOps/SRE teams to improve CI/CD pipelines, deployment reliability, and runtime stability.
- Drive improvements in system observability, monitoring, and alerting.
- Ensure high standards of code quality through design reviews, code reviews, automated testing, and documentation.
- Design, develop, and review robust Java-based systems using Spring ecosystem and microservices architecture.

Global Collaboration

- Work effectively with cross-functional and international teams (e.g., UK, US).
- Communicate complex technical topics clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

AI-Augmented Engineering (Big Plus)

- Leverage AI-assisted developer tools (e.g., for code generation, refactoring, test creation, log analysis, incident triage, and documentation) to:
- Improve development speed without compromising quality
- Reduce repetitive manual work
- Support faster debugging and root-cause analysis
- Promote best practices for AI usage, including validation of outputs, security awareness, and IP safety.
- Explore and propose practical AI use cases in backend engineering, and system observability.
requirements:
Core Java & Backend Expertise

- Strong expertise in Java, including OOP, multithreading, concurrency, collections, and performance tuning.
- Hands-on experience with Spring / Spring Boot, Spring Data, Dependency Injection (DI), and transaction management.
- Solid experience designing and building RESTful APIs and distributed microservices architectures.
- Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and NoSQL solutions (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB).
- Strong understanding of data modeling, query optimization, and backend performance tuning.
- Hands-on experience with AWS (e.g., EKS, S3, RDS, Lambda).
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines and modern DevOps practices.
- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as DataDog for metrics, logs, and traces.

Ways of Working

- Proficient with GitLab for version control and collaboration.
- Experience working in Agile / Scrum environments.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to make sound technical decisions under constraints.
- Strong spoken and written English for international collaboration.

Bonus / Differentiators

- Proven experience using AI tools in daily engineering work (coding, debugging, testing, design, or operations).
- Ability to mentor others on productive and responsible AI usage.
- Familiarity with Kubernetes (K8s): containerization, deployment, scaling, and service-to-service communication.
benefits:
Attractive Benefits:

- 100% salary during probation period
- Annual Leave: 18 days/ year
- Five “Recharge Days” – Extra days, in addition to company holidays.
- Flexible Friday afternoon
- Full salary insurance
- 13th-month bonus
- Gift + 1 day off for birthday
- Advanced health insurance (Generali)
- Regular engagement activities: sport clubs, internal event…
- Support Macbook and Monitor

reasons:

jobDescription:
We are looking for enthusiastic and dedicated operation engineers to help support, maintain, monitor and improve the infrastructure and code building and deployment process for our development teams. At the same time, the operation team plays a vital role to ensure smooth product experience for our customers.

What you will do

- You will be responsible for maintaining our Linux and Windows servers in all environments (production, staging or development). Ensuring the servers are in good working condition (with enough RAM, CPU, etc..).
- You will learn to use tools such as Ansible and our CI/CD pipeline to automate our deployment of our services and maintenance of our servers.
- You will learn and understand the architecture and details (services, relation among services, etc....) of our products to perform first level support for our customers.
- You will further improve our CI/CD pipeline and make changes to satisfy the deployment requirements from our dev teams.
- You will find out the current issues and optimize our infrastructure and deployment processes.
- You will communicate with our customers when needed to resolve issues or escalate the issues to our other development teams.
- You will keep track of and report the production, and deployment issues to the management team.
requirements:
- Have 1.5 to 3 years of experience in a similar role.
- Strong understanding of Linux operating systems including maintaining server, software installation, log management, service monitoring and management, firewall management, etc..
- Experience with build/continuous integration tools such as Jenkins and GitLab.
- Experience with modern build systems such as Gradle.
- Experience with using Git.
- Experience of managing the full lifecycle of the Build, Test and Release process of web applications.
- Experience with AWS or other cloud providers.
- Experience with automation tools such as Ansible is a plus.
- Strong communication and management skills.
- Refer candidates under 30 years old

- Có khả năng truyền đạt và xử lý vấn đề kỹ thuật tốt
- Kỹ năng sử dụng tin học văn phòng tốt, đặc biệt cần kỹ năng sử dụng excel thành thạo (có thể tạo macro để tạo các thống kê, báo cáo)
- Ưu tiên các ứng viên có chứng chỉ về QA/Tester (ví dụ: ISTQB level Advanced hoặc các chứng chỉ tương đương khác)
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các domain về E-commerce là lợi thế
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh so với thị trường
- Thưởng và review tăng lương 2 lần/năm
- Thử việc hưởng 100% lương
- Ca làm việc linh hoạt: 8h-17h; 8h30 – 17h30; 9h – 18h
- Ngày phép: 14+ ngày/năm
- Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp cho toàn bộ nhân viên.
- Kiểm tra sức khỏe định kỳ 1 năm/lần
- BHXH, BHYT, BHTN mức cao, đảm bảo quyền lợi người lao động.
- Trợ cấp hoạt động teambuilding hàng tháng, du lịch công ty 1 năm/lần

Dành riêng cho nhân viên nữ:

- Nghỉ sinh lý 2,5h/tháng
- Hưởng 100% lương trong thời gian thai sản
- Thêm 5 ngày nghỉ khám thai trong thai kì

Môi trường làm việc tuyệt vời

- Trang bị thiết bị làm việc trọn bộ, hiện đại, đáp ứng yêu cầu dự án.
- Làm việc và hướng dẫn bởi các chuyên gia/Senior nhiều kinh nghiệm thực tế.
- Trợ cấp hàng tháng cho các hoạt động của CLB thể thao (Yoga, Zumba, bóng đá…)
- Thông tin chính sách mới/cải tiến được cập nhật đều đặn tới nhân viên.
- Có riêng khu vực thư giãn phục vụ hoạt động giải trí, ẩm thực.
- Không gian làm việc mở, tiện nghi.

Cơ hội đào tạo và phát triển bản thân

- Thường xuyên tổ chức các buổi đào tạo, seminar cập nhật xu hướng công nghệ.
- Đào tạo kiến thức chuyên môn, kĩ năng quản lý, kỹ năng mềm,… theo định hướng công ty và nhu cầu khảo sát nhân viên.
- Hỗ trợ chi phí thi chứng chỉ chuyên môn. Trợ cấp chứng chỉ tiếng Nhật, chứng chỉ chuyên môn theo định hướng phát triển của Công ty.
- Các lớp đào tạo tiếng Nhật (sơ cấp – cao cấp) với giáo viên bản ngữ trong giờ hành chính.
- Cơ hội làm việc tại Nhật Bản với các nhân sự có tiếng Nhật.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Java, ReactJS, JavaScript)
reasons:
- Personal Development Opportunities
- Attractive Salary & Seniority Bonus (3/5/7 years)
- Premium Private Health Care(employee & dependents)
jobDescription:
About the Role: We are seeking a highly proactive Senior Full-Stack Engineer (5+ years of experience) with a strong frontend focus to join our team. You will be instrumental in building scalable user interfaces using React, powered by a purely Headless Magnolia CMS backend.

We operate in a fast-paced, modern environment and are actively embracing AI-assisted development. We are looking for a self-starter —someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do, actively identifies and solves blockers independently, and communicates effectively across the team.

Key Responsibilities

- Frontend: Drive the development of robust, high-performance UIs using React, seamlessly consuming REST APIs from our Headless Magnolia setup.
- Backend Integration & Support: While the immediate focus is on the frontend, you will work with Java to configure Magnolia, expose RESTful services, and maintain backend stability.
- Autonomous Execution: Take ownership of your deliverables. Proactively identify blockers, propose solutions, and independently drive tasks forward while maintaining tight, continuous alignment with our PM, Architects, and Leads to shape epics and clear dependencies.
- Agent-Assisted E2E Delivery: Go beyond basic code completion. We expect you to actively leverage agentic AI workflows (using tools like Gemini, Claude) across the entire product lifecycle. From shaping epics and brainstorming architecture with the PM, to automating complex development tasks, testing, and streamlining our go-to-market deployment—you will use AI to reduce cognitive load, stay unblocked, and boost your efficiency.
- Collaborate & Communicate: Maintain clear communication in English regarding project status, technical hurdles, and architectural decisions, which is critical for our team's success.
requirements:
- 5+ Years of Experience: Proven track record as a Senior Full-Stack Engineer or a Frontend Engineer with solid backend capabilities.
- React Expertise: Deep knowledge of React and the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem.
- Java: Solid proficiency in Java.
- Autonomy: A demonstrable history of taking initiative, self-managing, and driving projects forward independently in a remote environment.
- Language Skills: Excellent command of written and spoken English is a must have.
- Forward-Thinking: A strong curiosity and willingness to adopt AI tools to accelerate your development speed.
benefits:
Personal Development Opportunities: We believe in nurturing individual growth and happiness. As part of our commitment, we provide a range of indoor and outdoor training activities, including technical courses, English classes, and soft skills training.

Comprehensive Health Coverage: Your well-being and that of your family are paramount to us. We cover 100% of healthcare premiums for all employees and their dependents, ensuring you can access quality medical care without financial worries.Employee and Family Care: At Magnolia, we extend our care beyond the workplace. From health insurance to organizing summer vacations and family events like Family Day, Children's Day, and the Mid-Autumn Festival, we prioritize the well-being and happiness of our employees and their families. Additionally, enjoy recreational activities such as football, swimming, bowling, cinema, and more.Competitive Salary and Benefits: Your hard work deserves recognition. Our compensation package includes:

- An attractive salary, a 13th-month salary, seniority bonuses, and opportunities for career advancement.
- Annual leave of up to 21 days;
- Opportunity for the exchange programs to Switzerland.

Flexible Working Hours: We understand the importance of work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility in your schedule.Employee Perks: Your comfort and satisfaction matter to us. Our office is stocked with beverages, fruits, and snacks, and we provide meals every evening. Join us on "Whoopee Fridays" for team-building activities, knowledge exchange sessions, and lively conversations.

title: DevOps/Developer Experience Engineer (English)
reasons:
- Attractive Salary and Benefits
- Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
- Award: MVP for excellent Department/members
jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced DevOps Engineer or Developer Experience to design, build, and maintain the platforms, tools, and processes that enable our development teams to deliver high-quality software efficiently and reliably.

[Responsibilities]

- Manage and maintain CI/CD pipelines for Java and front-end applications using tools such as Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes.
- Automate tasks and processes using scripting and automation tools, including GitHub Actions.
- Develop and maintain automated test suites for both front-end (e.g., Vue.js) and back-end (Java) applications, utilizing testing frameworks such as Mockito, JUnit, and Playwright (or similar).
- Manage and maintain staging and production environments, ensuring their stability and reliability.
- Participate in the migration and implementation of secure software delivery processes using tools such as GitHub Actions.
- Promote best practices in software development, testing, and deployment across the organization.
- Support and train team members on DevOps principles, CI/CD best practices, and tooling.
- Implement and maintain security scanning and code quality analysis tools.
requirements:
Must have:

- 4+ years of experience in a DevOps or related role.
- Experience managing CI/CD pipelines for Java and front-end applications.
- Experience with Java Server Faces (JSF) framework
- Proficiency in Java and experience with front-end technologies (e.g., Vue.js, React, Angular).
- Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.
- Experience with Rancher or similar Kubernetes management platforms
- Experience with automated testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit, Mockito, Playwright, Selenium).
- Strong understanding of Linux operating systems.
- Proven experience managing staging and production environments
- Ability to work independently, take responsibility, and stay self-motivated.
- Passion for helping others and improving the developer experience.
- Intermediate level in English communication.

Nice to have:

- Experience with security scanning tools (e.g., SonarQube).
- Experience with implementing secure software delivery processes.
- Solid understanding of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
- Hands-on experience with build automation tools like Maven, Gradle, etc.
- Strong interest in the latest trends in CI/CD and development efficiency tools.
- Excellent communication and teamwork skills.
- Intermediate level in Japanese communication.
- Experience designing and implementing microservices architectures.
- Experience working on large-scale, mission-critical systems.
- Experience migrating from Jenkins to GitHub Actions
- Experience with enterprise Kubernetes distributions (Rancher, OpenShift, etc.)
benefits:
- Attractive Salary and Benefits
- Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
- Bonus: Annual Bonus, Performance Bonus.
- Award: MVP for excellent Department/members
- Annual health check-up
- Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Unemployment Insurance (company will pay for full salary); Voluntary health insurance & accident insurance (PTI care 24/7)
- Company trip, Big annual year-end party every year, Team building, etc.
- Working hour: Monday to Friday (working hour from 08:00 to 17:00)
- Training: Tech E-Learning & various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills
- Tech SHIMEKAI (Quarterly Technology Sharing)

And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

title: Senior Data Security - Data Division
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2026TD450980 - Chuyên viên cao cấp Bảo mật dữ liệu - Khối Dữ liệu

1. Mục tiêu công việc:

Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến xây dựng và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu, đảm bảo an toàn, tuân thủ và bảo vệ dữ liệu trong suốt vòng đời, theo quy định pháp luật và tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP, ISO 27001, GDPR...).Phối hợp với các đơn vị Quản trị dữ liệu, An ninh thông tin, Rủi ro và Tuân thủ để triển khai hiệu quả các chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn và công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu trong phạm vi được phân công, góp phần đảm bảo hoạt động quản trị dữ liệu toàn hàng được vận hành liên tục, an toàn và hiệu quả.2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)• Mã hóa và quản lý khóa (Encryption & Key Management)• Ẩn danh, che dấu dữ liệu (Masking, Tokenization)• Quản lý truy cập và phân quyền (Access Control, IAM, ABAC/RBAC)• Giám sát và phát hiện rò rỉ dữ liệu (DLP, Monitoring, Incident Response)iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.
requirements:
i. Trình độ & kinh nghiệm• Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Khoa học dữ liệu, hoặc tương đương.• Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực: Information Security, Data Governance, IT Risk, hoặc Cloud Security.• Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và khung kiểm soát bảo mật dữ liệu: ISO 27001/27701, NIST, GDPR, PCI-DSS, Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP.• Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc quản lý các công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu: DLP, Data Masking, Encryption, IAM, SIEM, Key Vault, Cloud Security Tools.ii. Kỹ năng• Khả năng thiết kế và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu ở cấp tổ chức.• Tư duy data-centric security, cân bằng giữa bảo mật và hiệu quả kinh doanh.• Kỹ năng điều phối liên phòng ban, giao tiếp tốt, và ra quyết định nhanh trong tình huống sự cố.• Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quốc tế: CISSP, CISM, CDPSE, ISO 27001 LA/LI, CDMP Practitioner, CISA.• SQL, các công cụ BI

The ideal candidate will lead the design and development of complex software systems, utilizing advanced knowledge of concurrency control, cloud-native technologies, and distributed architectures. Key skills include strong troubleshooting, innovative problem-solving, and process optimization. The role requires a quick learner with a proactive attitude, capable of leveraging AWS, SQL, CircleCI, and GitHub for architectural improvements and enhancements.

Key Responsibilities:

- Streamline software development and deployment by implementing CI/CD pipelines with CircleCI and managing version control through GitHub.
- Optimize SQL database performance, ensuring efficient data management and query responsiveness.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (DevOps, Product, QA) to deliver high-quality, end-to-end solutions aligned with business objectives.
- Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues in both development and production environments, providing timely and effective solutions.

requirements:

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines using CircleCI (or similar tools) and version control with GitHub.

Preferred Skills:

title: Principal Architect (AI)
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Principal Architect to define and own the architecture of our Unified Edge AI Engine. In this role, you will design the software backbone that orchestrates the entire lifecycle of video analytics on embedded hardware.

You will act as the bridge between Systems Engineering and AI Research. Your mission is to build a modular, graph-based execution engine that balances massive data throughput with limited compute resources, enabling advanced AI models (optimized via quantization/pruning) to run in real-time across diverse hardware platforms.

Scope of Responsibilities/Expectations:

- Pipeline Engine Architecture: Architect a modular, high-throughput Video & AI Pipeline Engine. Design the framework for dynamic graph construction (DAG) where AI models, logic nodes, and image processing blocks can be assembled and executed efficiently.
- Heterogeneous Resource Orchestration: Design the scheduling logic to balance workloads across CPU, GPU, DSP, and NPU. manage critical system bottlenecks such as PCIe Bandwidth, Memory Bandwidth, and Thermal constraints to prevent system stalls.
- AI Optimization Strategy: Define the architectural support for Model Quantization (INT8/FP16) and Network Pruning. Ensure the engine can natively handle optimized model formats, managing the trade-off between inference speed, memory footprint, and accuracy.
- Memory & Data Flow Design: Architect zero-copy data transport mechanisms (DMA, Shared Memory, Ring Buffers) to pass high-resolution video frames and tensor data between pipeline stages without CPU intervention.
- Scalability & Abstraction: Create a hardware-agnostic Abstraction Layer (HAL) that allows the engine to scale from low-power cameras to high-performance AI processors with minimal code changes.
requirements:
- System Architecture: Mastery of Modern C++ (14/17/20) and architectural patterns for high-concurrency, real-time systems. Deep understanding of Producer-Consumer models, Lock-free queues, and multi-threaded synchronization.
- AI Model Optimization: Strong knowledge of techniques to reduce model complexity: Quantization (PTQ/QAT), Weight Pruning, and Knowledge Distillation. Experience integrating these optimized models into C++ runtimes (e.g., TensorRT, SNPE/QNN, OpenVINO).
- Hardware Intimacy: Deep understanding of SoC architectures (Qualcomm, Ambarella, NVIDIA). Ability to analyze how Cache Coherency, Bus Arbitration, and Memory Controllers impact AI performance.
- Profiling & Analysis: Expert ability to use system profilers (e.g., Perf, eBPF, Nsight Systems) to visualize the "Critical Path" of the pipeline and optimize instruction-level performance.
- Pipeline Frameworks: Experience designing or heavily customizing media pipelines (similar to GStreamer, MediaPipe, or DeepStream).

Basic Qualifications

- Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Embedded AI, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related technical fields.
- 10+ years of industry experience in Embedded Software Architecture or High-Performance Computing.
- Proven track record of designing complex software engines for Video Processing, Computer Vision, or Autonomous Systems.
- Experience acting as a System Architect, making critical decisions on resource allocation, memory management, and hardware selection.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …

You will work with a team of young and talented scientists and engineers to build robust and scalable data models using big data pipelines, conduct advanced research in implementing state-of-the-art ML and AI techniques, build high-quality data services that are both real-time and batch-based.

- Develop our extensive range of products such as Credit Score, Fraud Score, Income Score, Lead Generation, etc.
- Utilize robust Big Data platform and powerful computation clusters to perform your day-to-day tasks of analysis, modeling, feature engineering, deployment and monitoring.
- Work with broad categories of structured and unstructured data such as tabular, text, media, etc. to improve ML models.
- Experience full MLOps practices: streamlined data pipeline, deployment, feature monitoring, model performance monitoring, business integration.
- Mentor Junior Data Scientists and provide them with practical guidance, as needed.
- Partner with business stakeholders to translate business challenges into data science projects with measurable outcomes.
- Communicate insights effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Define team goals, manage project timelines, and ensure delivery of high-quality, business-impactful outcomes.
- Collaborate cross-functionally teams to align data science initiatives with company strategy.
- Drive adoption of best practices, innovation, and continuous improvement within the Data Science team
requirements:

- Experienced in working with Python, SQL.

- Strong understanding of financial services and the digital banking products.
- Possess a data-driven mindset and a passion for applying data science to solve real-world business problems.
- Experience in managing complex data science projects from inception to completion.
benefits:

jobDescription:
We are seeking motivated Senior Fullstack Engineers (Java) who are passionate, results focused to take accountability for the delivery of Microservices that will be used by banking front end applications. You will be part of our delivery team and will be responsible for providing technical leadership throughout all phases of the software delivery life cycle as we initiate a transformation of NAB technology.

At NAB, we believe success comes from our people. We're committed to supporting your talent and skills through your career, as you help us build a culture that affects change for our customers and for the community too.

YOUR JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

- Design, develop, review, implement, and manage Java applications and services for the production and pre-release en.
- Design, develop, review, implement, and manage continuous integration, build management and deployment scripts, systems, and any code as required.
- Participate in Agile software development, prototyping, and code review with international development teams to build scalable microservices-based products and APIs using Java technologies on AWS Cloud architecture.
- Fully understand the requirements of the customer or business and utilize this knowledge to develop applications that are consistent with this.
- Work with delivery teams to achieve success through development using CI/CD and DevOps practices, processes, and tooling.
- Provide robust coding practices, solid unit/component test coverage, and debugging code.

title: AI-Native Associate Product Manager (Japanese required)
reasons:
- Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro
- L&D programs; 17 days off
- 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer
jobDescription:
Purpose and Objective

At Money Forward Vietnam, a Product Manager is “Someone who does whatever it takes for the success of the product.” As an AI-Native Associate Product Manager, you are the driver of product execution and a "Mini-CEO" of your assigned scope. Your mission is to master the Product Management Triangle (Engineering, Business, and User) and leverage AI to bridge the gap between non-verbalized user pain points and high-fidelity technical requirements. You are responsible for navigating complex legal and operational constraints to ensure our products deliver world-class value.

About This Role: Responsibilities

- Absolute Ownership: You own the success of your assigned product area. You identify gaps between departments and proactively resolve issues outside the traditional scope to move the product forward.
- Cross-Functional Synergy (Sales & CS): You serve as the primary bridge between the product and the front office. You work closely with Sales and Customer Success teams to ensure they are fully equipped to deliver the product's value. You provide expert-level support by addressing complex product inquiries and translating technical capabilities into business benefits.
- High-Fidelity PRD Development: You translate guidance from Lead PdMs and identified user needs into comprehensive PRDs from scratch. You drive the development process and ensure the output meets the "Money Forward" standard of excellence.
- Domain Structuring: You move beyond "Domain Knowledge" to "Domain Understanding." You are expected to define the absolute boundaries and legal/operational constraints of complex back-office workflows.
- Hypothesis-Driven Development: You utilize the "Demo First" approach. Instead of passive interviewing, you present high-fidelity hypotheses and prototypes to stakeholders and customers to extract true, non-verbalized insights.
- AI Management: You integrate AI tools into your workflow for deep data analysis and to translate vague requirements into high-resolution technical specifications for the engineering team.
requirements:
Your Skills and Experience

Core Competencies (The Triangle)

- User/Domain: Ability to structure complex operations (Finance, Accounting, HR). You must be able to explain the why behind a requirement, not just the what.
- Business & Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to collaborate with Sales and CS. You act as the product advocate, ensuring that feedback from the field is funneled back into the roadmap while providing the clarity the business side needs to succeed.
- AI & Technical Execution: You utilize AI tools to analyze data and translate vague requirements into high-resolution specifications. You lead the Agile development cycle by effectively communicating business and user constraints to engineers, ensuring the final output aligns perfectly with the strategic product vision.

Minimum Qualifications

- 1–3 years of experience as a Product Manager, Business Analyst, or in a high-impact architectural role within the Fintech/SaaS sector.
- Track Record of Ownership: Demonstrated ability to drive projects to completion by taking initiative beyond the standard job description.
- Strategic Reverse-Calculation: Ability to visualize the "Final Goal" of a product and work backward to define the necessary steps, avoiding the trap of incremental "stacking."
- Global Communication: Professional fluency in English.
- Japanese Language Skills (JLPT N2 or higher): Essential for understanding the nuances of Japanese back-office constraints and influencing stakeholders in a multinational environment.

Preferred Qualifications

- Direct experience with ERP, HR, or Accounting systems for SMEs or growth-stage companies.

Performance Expectations & Career Growth

Success in this role is measured by your ability to evolve from guided execution to independent leadership. You are expected to:

- Initiate: Proactively propose additional features based on a clear understanding of why a specific function is required at a specific timing.
- Self-Direct: Transition to identifying product needs and initiating PRDs from necessity without senior follow-up.
- Support & Empower: Become the go-to expert for Sales and CS, reducing friction in the sales cycle and onboarding process through deep product knowledge and responsive communication.

The "Money Forward" Mindset

We are looking for product "craftsmen" with the tenacity to commit to a product’s long-term evolution. If you aim to build the No. 1 Product Management team in the global SaaS industry and hold yourself to the highest standards of execution, we want to talk to you.
benefits:

- Full salary in probation & 13th month salary
- Social insurance on full salary from probation
- Premium Health insurance from probation
- Flexible start 8AM-9AM from Mon-Fri
- 16 days off annually + 1 Birthday Leave
- Paternity leave extra 5 days
- Annual company trip; Quarterly team building activities
- Club activities
- Annual health check

Caring Career & Development:

- Monthly and biannually Recognition Awards

Thời gian làm việc
