title: Senior OutSystems Developer/ Expert
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
Are you a highly talented Senior OutSystems Developer looking for a challenging opportunity to join OutSystems Workflow platform team? We are seeking a candidate with a strong technical background in OutSystems, a good product mindset to join our global product team.

As a Senior OutSystems Developer at Bosch, you are responsible for the development and maintenance of mobile and web-based applications assigned and ensure that the applications are in working well, supporting both internal and external stakeholders in any errors or bugs in the applications.

Your main responsibilities

· Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using OutSystems, with integration of previous experience in .NET or Java.

- Lead the architecture, development, and optimization of both web and mobile applications, ensuring clean, efficient, and maintainable code across the stack.
- Develop and maintain complex business logic, custom UI components, and database layers, using relational and non-relational databases like SQL, NoSQL, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Design, DevOps) to translate business requirements into technical solutions and ensure seamless integration across front-end, back-end, and databases.
- Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application errors, ensuring high availability and performance for users.
- Participate in agile teams, contributing to backlog refinement, sprint planning, and continuous delivery pipelines, ensuring high-quality and timely releases.
- Define and optimize data models, ensuring data integrity, scalability, and performance across SQL and NoSQL databases.
- Implement REST and SOAP APIs, as well as other third-party integrations, to support the full functionality of applications.
- Provide guidance and mentorship to junior developers, promoting best practices in coding, testing, and application security.
- Stay updated on the latest technology trends in OutSystems, full-stack development, and database management, recommending new tools and methodologies to enhance the development process.
requirements:
Must Have

- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer/Software Engineering, Information Technology, or equivalent practical experience.
- Experience: 7+ years of experience in OutSystems development.
- OutSystems certs: Professional/Expert Web (Traditional/Reactive), Architecture; ODC certs.
- Solid back-end development skills: data modeling, advanced SQL (e.g., MSSQL or Oracle), and performance tuning.
- Workflow/process development experience (e.g., BPT, case/process management, asynchronous processing, timers/queues).
- Front-end development proficiency with UX/UI best practices; strong HTML/CSS/JS.
- Integrations: REST/SOAP, API design, auth, error handling, resiliency.
- OutSystems architecture best practices (layered, modular, dependencies); code quality/reviews.
- DevOps/release: LifeTime/environment management, deployments, versioning, basic CI/CD.
- Security: RBAC, SSO, secure integrations, data protection, OWASP.
- Troubleshooting/performance: caching, query tuning, aggregates, pagination, logging/monitoring.
- Strong communication, stakeholder collaboration, mentoring; Agile/Scrum.
- Proficient in written and spoken English.

Nice to Have

- Platform tools: AI Mentor, Service Center, LifeTime Analytics/APM.
- Advanced architecture: DDD, lean, microservices/SOA.
- CI/CD beyond LifeTime: Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions/Jenkins/GitLab CI.
- Cloud (Azure/AWS/GCP) and integrations: Azure AD/Entra, API Management.
- Extensions via Integration Studio (C#/.NET or Java); building/exposing services.
- Event/messaging (Kafka, RabbitMQ); enterprise integration patterns.
- ODC experience: migration from OS11 (Reactive to ODC).
- Mobile: offline sync, native/Cordova plugins, push notifications, app store releases.
- Observability/reliability: centralized logging/monitoring (App Insights, ELK), alerting, incident response.
benefits:
- Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company
- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

companyInfo.name: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited

title: Senior IT Product & Service Manager (Agile/Scrum)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
We’re redefining how Bosch works.

Our global product team is evolving to be a best-in-class workflow platform that serves as the backbone for 500,000+ users worldwide. Built on advanced low-code/no-code (NCLC) and accelerating with GenAI, this platform is entering its next chapter becoming truly AI-native, smarter, faster, and more intuitive at scale.

We’re looking for a Senior IT Product & Service Manager (PSM) who combines strong product ownership with execution mindset. The role requires understanding of complex architectures, experience in technology leadership, and responsible for strategic decisions.

You’ll work closely with engineers, designers, and business leaders to turn vision into product functions and features using Agile principles to move fast, stay focused, and deliver meaningful outcomes.

If you’re driven by impact, energized by complexity and standardization for efficiency, and ready to lead at global scale join us.

Key Responsibilities:

Product Vision & Strategy:

- Define and own the product vision, positioning, and roadmap, aligned with long term digital strategy.
- Drive prioritization and investment decisions that balance value, risk, cost, and scalability.
- Stay up to date with market trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies to identify opportunities and risks.
- Continuous improvement mindset, encouraging the team to explore new ideas and approache

Continuous Workflows Platform Migration:

- Lead the migration of legacy technology to Next Gen platform, leveraging new AI frameworks & solutions.
- Ensure seamless transitions with change management best practices.
- Manage keystakeholder expectation, and customer satisfaction.

Service Provisioning:

- Ensure service reliability, performance, and SLA alignment.
- Implement data driven monitoring and analytics to steer decisions and outcomes.
- Drive operational excellence through simplification and efficiency.

Technical Expertise & Requirements Management:

- Translate business and user needs into clear, feasible technical requirements aligned with desired outcomes, driven by data.
- Provide technical expertise and guidance on software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and no-code/low-code platforms.
- Understanding the workflow product is preferable, stay ahead of the latest industry trends and technologies to ensure the platform remains cutting-edge.

Product Lifecycle Management:

- Own the entire product lifecycle: ideation → build → scale → optimize → sunset.
- Drive continuous improvement and innovation by gathering and analyzing user feedback, conducting user research, and A/B testing.
- Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success and inform data-driven decision-making.

Stakeholder & Vendor Management:

- Act as a trusted product manager for global business and technology stakeholders.
- Secure alignment and buy in for roadmap, priorities, and change.
- Manage strategic vendors and technology partners with a focus on quality and long-term value.

Additional Responsibilities:

Product Architecture:

- Ensure product is designed for high availability, performance, and maintainability.

Security and Compliance:

- Collaborate with security teams to ensure product adheres to security best practices and compliance requirements.
- Stay informed about evolving security threats and proactively address vulnerabilities.

Agile Leadership:

- Empower teams to self-organize, make data-driven decisions, and deliver value iteratively.
requirements:
Must have:

- Bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
- 10+ years of experience in technical product management, with a focus on complex systems and large-scale IT solutions.
- Deep expertise in software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and no-code/low-code platforms.
- Proven ability to lead and inspire cross-functional teams.
- Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts to varied audiences.
- Proficiency in data analysis and decision-making tools.
- Experience in vendor management and working with global teams.
- Strong understanding of AI technologies and their potential applications in business settings.

Nice to have:

- Deep understanding of automation principles and ability to design efficient, automated workflows.
- Knowledge of emerging technologies in no-code/low-code platforms, cloud computing.
- Experience with agile development methodologies.
- Familiarity with the latest industry trends and technologies.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
- A proactive and creative problem-solving approach.
- Strong organizational and time-management skills.

- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company

- 12 days annual leave

requirements:

Kỹ năng chuyên môn:

Kỹ năng mềm:

- Kiến thức cơ bản về thiết kế UI/UX.
benefits:

jobDescription:
1. Data Engineering & Pipeline:

3. Internal Tooling & Automation

- Xây dựng hệ thống thông báo nhập kho tích hợp Lark Bot

4. Phối hợp nghiệp vụ & Chiến lược

jobDescription:
Mục tiêu vị trí: Phát triển và triển khai các hệ thống AI/LLM vào sản phẩm thực tế của công ty như AI CRM, chatbot, hệ thống hỏi đáp tài liệu và AI tự động hóa quy trình; đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định, dễ mở rộng, kiểm soát tốt chất lượng đầu ra, tốc độ phản hồi và chi phí vận hành.

Mô tả công việc:

- Trực tiếp phát triển backend và các thành phần AI cho sản phẩm như chatbot, RAG, AI xử lý tài liệu, AI workflow và automation.
- Xây dựng các service/API phục vụ tích hợp AI vào website, CRM, hệ thống nội bộ và các nền tảng liên quan.
- Phát triển các pipeline xử lý dữ liệu, retrieval, orchestration, evaluation và monitoring cho hệ thống AI.
- Tham gia thiết kế giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp với yêu cầu sản phẩm, bảo đảm hiệu năng, độ ổn định, bảo mật và khả năng mở rộng.
- Đề xuất hướng triển khai phù hợp giữa prompting, RAG, workflow AI, model routing hoặc các giải pháp liên quan tùy bài toán thực tế.

- Chủ động phân tích nguyên nhân khi hệ thống AI hoạt động chưa đạt kỳ vọng; đề xuất và triển khai hướng khắc phục.
- Phối hợp với các bộ phận Business, Product, Backend, Frontend, Data và DevOps để triển khai giải pháp AI vào môi trường thực tế.
- Viết tài liệu kỹ thuật, mô tả luồng xử lý, đầu vào – đầu ra, giới hạn hệ thống và các lưu ý vận hành.

Ưu tiên

- Được trang bị công cụ phục vụ công việc như GPT Pro và các tài khoản cần thiết cho quá trình nghiên cứu, phát triển.

jobDescription:
Tổng quan: Xây dựng hệ thống backend nhằm cung cấp các năng lực phần mềm triển khai kết nối qua kênh web và mobile cho Công ty cũng như phục vụ đối tác kết nối.

1. Thiết kế & phát triển hệ thống phần mềm

- Dựa trên bài toán nghiệp vụ, tiến hành thiết kế và phân rã các module, chức năng của ứng dụng và phân việc cho các thành viên trong team hoàn thành công việc của mình.
- Phối hợp xây dựng CSDL phù hợp với bài toán.
- Phối hợp xây dựng ứng dụng trên và môi trường di động (mobile, máy tính bảng ios, android…).
- Phối hợp xây dựng ứng dụng front-end trên nền tảng web.
- Xây dựng tích hơp với các API của hệ thống middleware để đảm bảo luồng tương tác end-2-end.

2. Hỗ trợ việc chuyển giao ứng dụng

- Đào tạo/chuyển giao cho khách hàng/đối tác và các đơn vị liên quan về hệ thống phần mềm được xây dựng/triển khai.

3. Xử lý các lỗi, sự cố phát sinh của hệ thống:

- Tiếp nhận và chỉnh sửa, nâng cấp kịp thời ứng dụng khi phát sinh lỗi hoặc có nhu cầu nâng cấp tính năng sản phẩm
requirements:
1. Trình độ Học vấn

- Tốt nghiệp đại học các trường chuyên ngành công nghệ thông tin (CNTT)

2. Kiến thức/Chuyên môn có liên quan

- Sử dụng thành thạo java springboot & hibernates.
- Hiểu biết tốt về cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ, sử dụng tốt các câu lệnh SQL.
- Hiểu, có kinh nghiệm về mô hình client – server & kiến trúc microservices.

3. Kỹ năng

- Có năng lực phân tích, thiết kế, lập trình và triển khai ứng dụng và dịch vụ phần mềm
- Chủ động trong việc tìm hiểu, học hỏi và triển khai các công nghệ mới.
- Luôn sẵn sàng cho mọi thay đổi, hoặc làm lại toàn bộ dự án khi được yêu cầu.
- Có kỹ năng làm việc nhóm
- Tiếng Anh đọc hiểu tài liệu

4. Kinh nghiệm liên quan

- Có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phát triển hệ thống phần mềm.
- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực bảo hiểm hoặc tham gia dự án lập trình hệ thống trong lĩnh vực bảo hiểm.
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc theo dự án, từng sử dụng qua python, golang là một lợi thế.
- Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm với các dự án Big-data, Data analytics, OCR, AI…
benefits:
- Thử việc Full lương- Thưởng lương tháng 13 + thưởng hiệu quả làm việc + thưởng Lễ tết- Chế độ phúc lơi toàn diện: BHXH, BH OPES care dành riêng cho OPESers và người thân, trợ cấp ăn trưa, đi lại, điện thoại…
- Chế độ hỗ trợ vay ưu đãi dành riêng cho OPESers từ VPBank (vay mua nhà/tiêu dùng...)
- Tư vấn, đồng hành trong quá trình phát triển cá nhân qua các chương trình IDP hàng năm.
- Thời gian làm việc cân bằng hướng tới hiệu quả: 5 ngày/tuần (nghỉ thứ 7, CN)/ Nghỉ phép năm từ 14 đến 21 ngày (theo cấp bậc).
- Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động với các hoạt động văn hóa, teambuilding du lịch…

Hãy đến và gia nhập cùng OPES để đặt những dấu ấn ấn tượng trên bản đồ Bảo hiểm số Việt Nam

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (AI)
jobDescription:
- Advanced Model Research: Lead the R&D of high-performance models for Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) and Hierarchical Classification, focusing on detecting complex object attributes and nuances in unconstrained environments using both Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL).
- Generative AI & VLM: Spearhead the exploration of Vision Language Models (VLM) and CLIP-based architectures to enable Text-to-Image / Image-to-Image retrieval and Open-Set Recognition, moving beyond fixed-class taxonomy.
- Agentic Data Workflows: Architect and implement AI Agentic Workflows to automate the data lifecycle. Design intelligent agents for autonomous data mining, auto-captioning, and Synthetic Data Generation to overcome long-tail edge cases and reduce reliance on manual annotation.
- Production-Grade AI: Drive the transition of models from research prototypes to production. Collaborate with Embedded AI Engineers to guide the distillation and quantization of heavy Foundation Models for deployment on edge devices.
requirements:
- Deep Learning Mastery: Expert-level understanding of Deep Learning architectures, specifically Transformers (ViT, Swin), CNNs (EfficientNet, ResNet), and Object Detection/Segmentation frameworks.
- Generative AI & Multi-modal: Hands-on experience with Multimodal Foundation Models (CLIP, LLaVA, etc.) and Generative approaches (Diffusion Models, GANs) for data synthesis.
- Data-Centric AI: Proven track record in building automated data pipelines. Experience with Active Learning, Auto-labeling, or building "Agentic" systems for data curation is a critical differentiator.
- Frameworks: Proficiency in PyTorch (preferred) or TensorFlow, and strong programming skills in Python and C++.
- Practical Implementation: Strong ability to write clean, maintainable code and experience with MLOps practices (CI/CD for ML, Experiment Tracking).
- Education: Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Mathematics, or a related technical field.
- 7+ years of relevant industry experience in Computer Vision and Machine Learning.
- Proven track record of leading technical initiatives and successfully deploying AI models into commercial products (0-to-1 product lifecycle experience is highly preferred).
- Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor technical teams in a fast-paced R&D environment.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Senior ReactJS Developer - Fluent English
reasons:
- 100% salary is paid in probation.
- Annual Leave: 12 days/ year.
- Cash out leaves at lunar Tet
jobDescription:
Joining SSTech, you will be involved in a variety of software development projects, working directly with Australian clients and our internal team. We focus on comprehensive growth, providing you with the space and time to study, apply new technologies, and improve both your technical and soft skills.

ResponsibilitiesRepresent SSTech's technical team in projects with Australian partners and clients:• Core Hands-on Development: Act as the primary React JS programmer on assigned projects. Take full ownership of the frontend codebase, writing clean, scalable, and highly maintainable code.• Feature Implementation & Integration: Participate in technical syncs with the project team, analyze project requirements and UI/UX designs to build highly responsive, performant, and reusable React components.• Task Estimation & Delivery: Review technical requirements to break down your own development tasks, provide accurate technical estimates, and manage your coding pipeline to ensure reliable, on-time delivery.• Debugging & Unit Test Implementation: Write and maintain comprehensive unit tests for React components and core business logic.• Other tasks assigned by the leader and the PM to get the project done on time.
requirements:
• From 4 year experience with React.JS (inc. hooks, functional components etc.) on practical projects;• Programming experience in HTML5, CSS3, Styled Component;• Experience in performance optimization and security;• English skills, both spoken and written

Nice to have but not compulsory:

- Experience with React Hook, Redux, Webpack, ES6;
- Experience in consuming RESTful APIs/services.
benefits:
- Attractive salary and benefits
- 13th-month salary & annual salary review.
- Added 1 day leaves/month & Cash out leaves at Lunar New Year (Tet). Furthermore, an additional day of leave will be granted for each year of seniority
- All benefits under the labor code

- Well-equipped working condition
- In-house lunch
- Unlimited free coffee, tea, snacks, and fruit to keep you energized
- Dynamic and friendly working environment in a team of talented and experienced developers.
- Working time: Monday – Friday, 08:00 – 17:30 (including a 90-minute lunch break)

title: QA Automation Engineer (Python, Embedded)
jobDescription:
As a QA Automation Engineer in our camera systems group, you will play a crucial role in technically leading, designing, developing, and optimizing automated test solutions for intelligent embedded camera systems and user interfaces and evaluating Computer Vision and AI algorithms.

You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of test automation development, from conceptualization to deployment, while also contributing to backend API test design and implementation. This position requires a deep understanding of modern UI frameworks, strong full-stack test automation principles, and experience with camera technologies or similar data-intensive applications.

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Automation Engineer who can lead our Vietnam embedded automation efforts.

The ideal candidate is passionate about leading successful deployments of commercial systems for the benefit of our customers. The Quality Assurance Automation Engineer will be responsible for guiding the development, and hands-on participation in the quality assurance activities for our Embedded AI platform that is the core intelligence of our security surveillance cameras, appliances, and cloud services. This engineer will help drive our releases, ensure smooth and timely deployment of new features and bug fixes, and work with a team of quality engineers to maintain the test automation framework and overall product quality.

Job Description:

- Collaborate with a small team of Quality assurance engineers and Quality technicians.
- Ensure that the Motorola Solutions Embedded AI group produces the highest quality, smartest, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry.
- Help lead the design & implementation of a quality evaluation pipeline, workflows, and reporting service for automatically testing IoT devices code prior to release.
- Contribute to a comprehensive quality assurance strategy to ensure the reliability and performance of our edge-based video surveillance cameras and cloud-based services.
- Execute quality assurance testing strategies for OTA firmware releases for cameras and appliances
- Work with the quality team to develop an exhaustive test approach, including pass fail metrics, real and synthetic video datasets, and automation as part of a comprehensive test suite for each new feature.
- Collaborate with product management, embedded software developers, algorithm developers, data scientists, and user interface engineers to define system requirements and use-cases for each new analytics feature.
- Coordinate with software development teams to define release scope, objectives, and timelines.
- Develop and maintain quality metrics, reports, and documentation to track and communicate product quality improvements.
- Analyze test results, identify trends, and provide recommendations for process improvements.
- Stay up-to-date with industry best practices and emerging technologies related to quality assurance and AI-based video surveillance systems.
- Support our cross-team software escalation process, ensuring timely resolution of critical quality issues and effective communication with stakeholders.
- Identify and close testing holes in current test processes and automation
- Create and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts for both manual and automated testing.
- Conduct off-site outdoor field testing of analytics features on camera hardware
requirements:
- Bachelor of Science degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Robotics, Physics, or equivalent experience from a technical engineering discipline.
- Experience leading a small team, evaluating performance and managing direct reports successfully.
- 3- 8 years of experience in quality assurance automation engineering.
- Proven experience in designing, implementing, and managing comprehensive quality assurance strategies and automation frameworks for complex software and hardware systems.
- Expertise in developing and authoring Python, C++, and Javascript automation software to test individual software components, web-enabled embedded hardware, IoT, and/or Robotics.
- Strong background in cloud-connected applications with platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and integrating automated tests within CI/CD pipelines.
- Demonstrated ability to mentor young developers, fostering a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous improvement.
- Excellent communication, collaboration, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively engage with technical and non-technical stakeholders across all levels of the organization.
- Experience with AI, machine learning, and computer vision technologies, and their application in quality assurance.
- Ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues, think critically, and drive timely resolution of critical quality issues.
- Highly organized, creative, and curious, with the ability to multi-task and thrive in an autonomous, empowering, and exciting environment.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Android Engineer (Kotlin)
reasons:
- Excellent environment and team to help you grow.
- Competitive salary and learning culture.
- Premium health care for you and your family.
jobDescription:
Are you an experienced (Senior) Android Engineer looking for your next career move? Do you have a background in design & architecture and development of digital products? If so read on.

The team:

You will be part of our Digital Delivery Hub who are responsible for designing, developing and maintaining some of the most interesting and innovative digital apps within the financial services space that are at the forefront of the market. Our Hub is focused on building a world class User Experience, Design and Web / Mobile Development team that can work with the business to realise an exciting digital strategy.

The role:

We are looking for a talented (Senior) Android Developer who still does hands-on development to contribute in the development and execution of an innovative mobile banking solution in Asia. This will include the development of in-country and cross-border solutions across all facets of a mobile banking operation including customer experience and design, developing and implementing new products and services, process engineering and other functional deliverable. Risk management and technology innovation will be essential for your success.

You will be responsible for technically leading and coaching our engineers who work in cross-functional delivery teams to design and build best-of-breed mobile solutions whilst maintaining necessary support for ongoing products.

Your duties will be to:

- Provide hands-on technical leadership and development in mobile solution development – you will get your hands dirty.
- Provide a leading voice in the evolving mobile architecture framework and road-map covering languages, tooling, patterns and delivery processes.
- Enhance our talent pool ensuring that our team’s skills and practices are leading edge and aligned to technology strategy.
- Provide technical guidance through the complete Solution Development Life Cycle.
- Developing solution architectures aligned with enterprise-wide standards to ensure successful implementation of technology solutions.
- Lead the technical design process coordinating various stakeholders; develop and document solution architectures for projects aligned to bank’s standards and policies.
- Custodian of design and engineering best practices; and technical app road-maps.
requirements:
Technical Skills:

- At least 3 years of experience in Android.
- Good understanding of modern Android architecture like MVVM, MVI, etc.
- Having experience developing both Android and iOS applications is a plus.
- Willingness to learn iOS stuff and apply it to feature development.
- Having an app in Google Play or the Apple App Store is a plus.
- Having experience in KMM development is a big plus.
- Having experience integrating mobile apps with web services, such as Firebase.
- Having experience in automation tests and unit tests.
- Having experience in memory and performance solving.
- Having experience with Dexguard, Proguard, or Dexprotector is a plus.
- Having experience with Design System is a plus.
- Having experience with Feature Flagging is a plus, such as Firebase, LaunchDarkly.
- Must have experience developing for multiple screen sizes and densities.
- Experience with developing custom UI for native components.
- Familiar with trending frameworks and libraries.
- Good at finding and using third-party open-source libraries.

Soft skills:

- Strong willingness to learn new practices and technologies.
- Able to work well in the team and willing to mentor/coach others.
- Exceptional interpersonal skills, including facilitation and negotiation.
- Understanding and experience of Agile methodology.
- Experience in working across several technical domains with the ability to ‘deep dive’ where required and ensure correct solutions are implemented.
- Ability to translate technical talk to the business.
- Ability to deliver convincing presentations that provide significant insight and generate consensus and buy-in.
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Some of our benefits:

- Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.
- Full benefits and salary rank during probation.
- Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.
- SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
- Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
- Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.
- Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).
- Pro-Rate and performance bonus.
- 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company.
- Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri.

title: iOS Developer (Swift/ Objective-C)
jobDescription:
Job description

Autani develops intelligent building automation and energy management systems that help commercial facilities reduce energy consumption and environmental impact. Our technology controls lighting, monitors energy usage, and integrates with building management systems across thousands of facilities in North America. We operate under the LiteTrace Brands umbrella, which includes a portfolio of lighting control and building automation brands serving the commercial and industrial markets.

Job Responsibilities:

- Responsible for the development, daily maintenance, and launch of the company's iOS apps.
- Responsible for iOS app code refactoring.
- Responsible for new app development.
- Write development documentation and draw basic flowcharts.

Nhiệm vụ công việc:

- Chịu trách nhiệm phát triển, bảo trì hàng ngày và ra mắt các ứng dụng iOS của công ty.
- Chịu trách nhiệm tái cấu trúc mã ứng dụng iOS.
- Chịu trách nhiệm phát triển ứng dụng mới.
- Viết tài liệu phát triển và vẽ sơ đồ khối cơ bản.
requirements:
How well do you fit this job and rank among other candidates?

Job Requirement:

- Bachelor’s degree is required with at least 2+ years of experience in iOS development (Swift/Objective-C)
- Hands-on experience in real projects with the ability to work independently and deliver development tasks
- Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment
- Bachelor's degree or higher in a computer science-related field, with 2+ years of relevant work experience.
- Familiarity with common data structures and algorithms, good programming habits and software design skills, and experience in code refactoring.
- Familiarity with various iOS data storage methods, including SQLite.
- In-depth understanding of multithreading, runtime, and memory management.
- Experience in iOS performance optimization.
- Basic English reading and writing skills, such as reading English documents and communicating via email in English.
- Experience with iOS Bluetooth development is preferred, proficiency in Chinese is a plus.

Yêu cầu:

- Bắt buộc tốt nghiệp đại học và Kinh nghiệm từ 2 năm trở lên về phát triển ứng dụng iOS (Swift/Objective-C)
- Kinh nghiệm thực tế về dự án, có khả năng hoàn thành các nhiệm vụ phát triển một cách độc lập
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc, có khả năng làm việc hiệu quả với nhóm
- Bằng cử nhân trở lên chuyên ngành khoa học máy tính, có kinh nghiệm làm việc liên quan từ 2 năm trở lên.
- Nắm vững các cấu trúc dữ liệu và thuật toán phổ biến, thói quen lập trình tốt và kỹ năng thiết kế phần mềm, cũng như kinh nghiệm tái cấu trúc mã.
- Nắm vững các phương pháp lưu trữ dữ liệu iOS khác nhau, bao gồm SQLite.
- Hiểu biết sâu sắc về đa luồng, thời gian chạy và quản lý bộ nhớ.
- Kinh nghiệm tối ưu hóa hiệu suất iOS.
- Kỹ năng đọc và viết tiếng Anh cơ bản, chẳng hạn như đọc tài liệu tiếng Anh và giao tiếp qua email bằng tiếng Anh.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm phát triển iOS Bluetooth
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, thương lượng theo năng lực

title: AI/ML Developer (Python, LLM, Redis, LLM)
jobDescription:
We are looking for an AI Agent / Applied LLM Engineer to design and build LLM/VLM-based agent systems that automate or support specific tasks based on structured/unstructured data. This role is not just about building simple chatbots, but developing search, reasoning, and execution-based AI systems connected to documents, databases, APIs, and internal systems.

Job Description

- Data Pipeline & Preprocessing: Collect, refine, and structure data (documents, tables, images, logs, DB, etc.) into AI-ready formats. Build pipelines including document parsing, OCR, chunking, and metadata design.
- RAG System Development: Design and implement RAG systems using Embedding, Vector DB, Hybrid Search, and Re-ranking.
- AI Agent Design: Develop LLM/VLM-based agents capable of Query Routing, Tool Calling, Workflow Orchestration, Multi-step Reasoning, and Human-in-the-loop interaction.
- System Integration: Develop AI functions integrated with customer systems (DB, ERP, MES, PLM, Groupware, internal APIs) using backend frameworks like FastAPI.
- Deployment & Optimization: Deploy and operate models and search systems in On-premise or Cloud environments. Monitor and improve response quality, search performance, latency, cost, and stability
requirements:
Requirements

- 2–5 years of experience in LLM/VLM related projects, service development, or research.
- Strong proficiency in Python and ability to implement systems/services to solve real-world problems.
- Hands-on experience with core LLM application elements: RAG, Vector DB, search, and Agent Workflows.
- Experience handling diverse data sources (documents, images, tables, DB, logs).
- Experience with LLM/VLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) or Open Source LLMs.
- Understanding of Prompt Engineering, Structured Output, and Tool Use/Function Calling.
- Familiarity with data processing (Pandas, SQL) and unstructured data parsing (PyMuPDF, BeautifulSoup, etc.).
- Experience with Backend development (FastAPI, Flask, or Django) and Docker-based deployment.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, DSPy, or Haystack.
- Experience in fine-tuning, evaluating, or serving open-source LLMs (vLLM, Ollama, etc.).
- Experience designing performance monitoring and evaluation metrics (RAGAS, DeepEval).
- Experience building AI services in On-premise, private cloud, or air-gapped environments.
- Experience with MLOps and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins).

Tech Stack

- Language: Python, SQL, Bash.
- AI/LLM: OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, Hugging Face.
- Framework: LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FastAPI, Flask.
- Vector DB/Search: Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, Pinecone, Elasticsearch.
- Infra/Ops: Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, AWS.
- Data/Monitoring: Pandas, Redis, MLflow, Langfuse.
benefits:
- Receive full benefits for employee according to labor law: annual leave, salary, social insurance
- Opportunities for professional learning and training
- Collaborative and innovative work environment
- Working equipment provided by the company
- Join birthday party, holiday party organized by the company
- Review 1 - 2 times per year

title: Sr/ Technical Leader ODOO Developer - Tuyển gấp
reasons:
- Highly attractive salary
- 13th month salary, bonus, abroad and local trip
- Opportunity for overseas training (Germany)
jobDescription:
SGH Á Châu đang tìm kiếm  Sr/ Technical Leader ODOO Developers – Tuyển gấp để dẫn dắt mảng kỹ thuật trong các dự án triển khai Odoo ERP. Đây là vị trí đóng vai trò trọng tâm, đảm bảo giải pháp được thiết kế đúng chuẩn, vận hành ổn định và đáp ứng chính xác yêu cầu nghiệp vụ của khách hàng.

Responsibilities

Dành cho Senior Developers:

- Phát triển, tùy chỉnh và bảo trì các module Odoo (Sales, Inventory, Purchase, Accounting, HR, …)
- Viết code sạch, tái sử dụng và có tài lieu rõ ràng
- Refactor và tối ưu các module hiện có để cải thiện hiệu năng và khả năng bảo trì
- Xây dựng business logic bằng Python, Odoo ORM và PostgreSQL
- Tùy chỉnh workflow, giao diện, báo cáo và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống
- Phân tích yêu cầu và đưa ra giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp
- Tích hợp hệ thống thông qua REST API, web services và webhooks
- Thực hiện code review, mentoring Junior Developers và hỗ trợ xử lý production issues
- Phối hợp với BA, QA, DevOps trong quá trình triển khai dự án.

Dành cho Lead Developers:

- Thiết kế kiến trúc và định hướng kỹ thuật cho các dự án Odoo
- Phát triển và review custom Odoo modules
- Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ và đề xuất giải pháp kỹ thuật phù hợp
- Dẫn dắt team developers, phân bổ task và hỗ trợ xử lý các vấn đề kỹ thuật phức tạp
- Review code, đảm bảo coding standards và chất lượng hệ thống
- Tối ưu hiệu năng, khả năng mở rộng và tính ổn định của hệ thống
- Định hướng tích hợp với các hệ thống bên thứ ba thông qua API, web services và webhooks
- Phối hợp với PM, BA, QA và DevOps trong quá trình triển khai dự án
- Hỗ trợ deployment, go-live và xử lý production issues.
requirements:
Dành cho Senior Developers:

- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm với Odoo (v12 trở lên)
- Thành thạo Python, PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, XML và JavaScript
- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển custom modules và tích hợp hệ thống
- Kỹ năng debug, troubleshooting và tối ưu hiệu năng tốt
- Thành thạo Git; biết Docker/CI/CD là lợi thế
- Có tinh thần trách nhiệm, tư duy giải quyết vấn đề và kỹ năng teamwork tốt.

Dành cho Lead Developers:

- Tối thiểu 7 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có ít nhất 5 năm với Odoo
- Thành thạo Python, PostgreSQL, Odoo ORM, XML và kiến trúc hệ thống
- Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế solution architecture và quản lý technical delivery
- Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team, mentoring developers và code review
- Hiểu biết về performance optimization, security và system scalability
- Thành thạo Git; có kinh nghiệm với Docker, CI/CD là lợi thế
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp, giải quyết vấn đề và leadership tốt
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan.
benefits:

- Bảo hiểm xã hội FULL lương

title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer (Network, OS)
jobDescription:

- Quản lý và vận hành phần mềm giám sát hệ thống
- Phân tích log hệ thống, tìm nguyên nhân để khắc phục triệt để sự cố

- Nghiên cứu nâng cấp, tối ưu hóa hệ thống
- Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ và công việc khác được giao theo yêu cầu của cấp trên
requirements:
Trình độ & kinh nghiệm

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học ngành Công nghệ thông tin hoặc liên quan
- Tối thiểu 2 năm kinh nghiệm về quản trị hệ điều hành

- Biết sử dụng phần mềm giám sát hệ thống
- Có kinh nghiệm về sao lưu, khôi phục dữ liệu
- Có chứng chỉ về Network và OS là lợi thế

Kiến thức & kỹ năng

- Hiểu biết vững chắc về quy trình và lập kế hoạch
- Kỹ năng thuyết trình và khả năng giao tiếp hiệu quả
- Kỹ năng phân tích, xử lý sự cố
- Luôn cập nhật các kiến thức và công nghệ mới
- Có chứng chỉ về các lĩnh vực liên quan là lợi thế
- Khả năng làm việc dưới áp lực cao và xử lý sự cố 24/7 khi cần
benefits:

- Tiếp cận trực tiếp các đối tác quốc tế, dự án công nghệ và hạ tầng số quy mô lớn.
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp cùng Ban lãnh đạo cấp cao Vietnamobile & Hanoi Telecom.

title: Babylon.js Developer (Web 3D Developer)
jobDescription:
We are looking for a Babylon.js Developer to join our team and build interactive 3D web experiences. If you are passionate about WebGL, 3D graphics, and modern web technologies, we would love to work with you.

Job Description

- Develop interactive 3D features on the web using Babylon.js / WebGL.
- Integrate and manage 3D models (GLB, GLTF) in web applications.
- Collaborate with 3D designers, frontend developers, and backend developers to build complete 3D experiences.
- Optimize rendering performance and loading speed for web-based 3D scenes.
- Implement animations, lighting, camera controls, and user interactions in 3D environments.
- Contribute to projects such as 3D virtual spaces, avatar systems, and interactive web applications.
requirements:
Requirements

- Strong experience with JavaScript or TypeScript.
- Experience with Babylon.js, Three.js, or WebGL.
- Understanding of 3D graphics concepts (lighting, materials, textures, camera systems).
- Experience working with 3D assets such as GLTF, GLB, FBX.
- Knowledge of performance optimization for web-based 3D applications.
- Familiarity with Git and modern development workflows.

Nice to have

- Hands-on experience with Babylon.js in production projects.
- Experience with 3D tools such as Blender, Maya, or 3ds Max.
- Experience building Metaverse, Virtual Spaces, or Web 3D platforms.

title: Senior UI/UX Designer (Product mindset)
reasons:
- Empowerment to create your impact.
- Global team, strong foundation, endless growth.
- Friendly culture, supportive colleagues.
jobDescription:
Job Summary

The Senior Designer is responsible for design end-to-end for web & mobile, from concept to execution. Deliver high-quality, user-centered designs aligned with brand and product goals, ensuring consistency and elevating overall product quality.

---------------------------------------------------

Role Description

1. Design Execution

● Lead the conceptualization of creative designs for websites and mobile applications.

● Develop user flows, sitemaps, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes.

● Build and maintain cohesive design systems, including typography, color schemes, and UI components.

● Ensure all designs align with client branding and internal content standards.

2. Collaboration & Communication

● Partner directly with clients to define requirements and present design structures.

● Collaborate with developers and content creators to ensure technical feasibility and timely delivery.

● Act as a mentor to junior designers, fostering a culture of high-quality design.

3. Performance & Optimization

● Apply UX best practices to maximize usability and feature functionality.

● Analyze user feedback and product metrics to identify and implement design improvements.

● Monitor project progress and report on key performance indicators (KPIs) to stakeholders.
requirements:
Requirements

● Bachelor’s Degree in Graphic Design or a related field.

● At least 6 years as related roles

Technical Proficiency

- Strong in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, and modern UI/UX principles
- Good command of English (written & verbal)
- Solid understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript; familiar with CMS (WordPress, Drupal)
- Up-to-date with responsive design, UX best practices & industry trends
- Experience with web publishing workflows is a plus
benefits:
- Attractive salary package (negotiable in the interview)
- 100% salary from probation period
- 24 paid day-offs (effective from probation period)
- Premium Health Insurance package
- Annual health check at international medical centre/hospital
- Company trip & Occasional gifts (Birthday, New year, X-mas…)
- Lunch allowance: 2.000.000đ/person/month
- Yearly learning budget: $300/person
- Yearly Competency Assesment
- Pantry Offering
- High-end MacBook or laptop, monitor, and other devices as required

title: Technical Lead (Golang) ~ Upto 3500$
company: Virtual Security Lab Cyber Risk Management Services L.L.C
reasons:
- Competitive salary package
- Flexible working culture
- Global environment with international project
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Technical Lead to drive the architecture and development of high-performance, low-latency backend systems built with Golang/Java. The role emphasizes secure networking, real-time event streaming, and hybrid cloud/on-premise architectures. You will be responsible for leading engineering teams to design and scale distributed services that operate under massive concurrency, while ensuring performance, resilience, and security across environments.

Key Responsibilities

- Lead the design and implementation of distributed backend services in Golang.
- Build systems with advanced networking, routing, and encryption capabilities using modern protocols.
- Define and evolve system architecture for multi-region, highly available deployments across AWS and on-premise infrastructure.
- Deliver performant APIs and control systems for secure, large-scale connectivity and real-time workloads.
- Design for high Concurrent User (CCU) loads, focusing on throughput, latency reduction, and horizontal scalability.
- Leverage Redis for caching, distributed coordination, and Pub/Sub messaging.
- Use Kafka for scalable event streaming, log aggregation, and operational analytics.
- Conduct performance tuning, load testing, and fault injection to validate system resilience.
- Embed strong cryptographic and secure communication practices (key exchange, rotation, encryption in transit and at rest).
- Collaborate with security stakeholders to align with compliance standards (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR).
- Implement CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), and GitOps workflows.
- Manage Kubernetes clusters (AWS EKS and on-prem) for containerized workloads, ensuring scalability and high availability.
- Drive observability with metrics, logs, and traces (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).
- Provide hands-on technical leadership and mentor engineering team members.
- Guide design reviews, enforce coding standards, and foster a culture of technical excellence.
- Partner with Product and Operations teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions.
requirements:
Must Have

- Expertise in Golang, including concurrency, networking, and performance profiling.
- Strong understanding of WireGuard protocol and modern secure networking approaches.
- Advanced experience with Redis (caching, Pub/Sub, clustering, distributed locks).
- In-depth knowledge of Kafka (streaming pipelines, consumer group management, schema evolution).
- Proven experience with Kubernetes (EKS, on-premise clusters) and AWS cloud services (VPC, EC2, IAM, MSK, ElastiCache).
- Background in large-scale distributed systems handling thousands of concurrent connections.
- Strong DevOps mindset with automation, observability, and reliability engineering practices.

Nice to Have

- Knowledge of Linux networking internals (iptables, nftables, routing, namespaces).
- Experience with additional messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ).
- Security certifications or expertise in cryptography and access management.
- Exposure to real-time systems or high-frequency transaction processing.

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience.
- 9+ years in backend engineering (Golang) with 3+ years in a Tech Lead.
benefits:
What we offer

- Competitive salary package aligned with your experience and market standards
- Performance-based reviews and clear growth opportunities
- A global working environment with exposure to international teams and projects
- Opportunities for personal and professional development, including training and new-skill learning
- Flexible working culture, built on trust and responsibility
- Supportive, open-minded team culture, where your ideas and contributions are valued
- Chances to travel or collaborate across offices, depending on project needs
- And more benefits tailored to help you thrive at Secuwall

title: Senior AI Engineer (AI ML / English)
reasons:
- Perks & benefits for well-being and balance
- Access to top tech and modern engineering
- A culture of growth, collaboration & learning
jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced Senior AI Engineer with practical experience in developing AI-based solutions and a strong commitment to secure software development practices in accordance with the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).This role combines strong technical expertise, the ability to work independently, and a responsible approach to security, quality, and documentation. The developer will also play an important role in maintaining project know-how and supporting knowledge sharing with new team members to ensure continuity and minimize the impact of staff turnover.
requirements:
Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, test, and optimize AI/ML solutions (e.g., machine learning models, NLP solutions, predictive models, AI automation services).
- Integrate AI components into existing or newly developed software systems.
- Work with data, including dataset preparation, validation, processing, and quality control.
- Collaborate with architects, analysts, and infrastructure teams to design AI system architecture.
- Follow secure development standards according to the Asseco Secure Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
- Prepare and maintain technical documentation and participate in code reviews.
- Monitor model performance and continuously improve deployed models.
- Identify and mitigate AI-related risks, such as bias, data leakage, and security vulnerabilities.
- Ensure compliance with privacy and data protection regulations, including handling sensitive data.

Requirements (Must-have)

- 5+ years of experience in software development, including at least 3 years in AI/ML development.
- Experience with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn.
- Strong knowledge of Python (experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar frameworks is an advantage).
- Practical experience in training, tuning, and deploying AI models.
- Professional English proficiency in both spoken and written communication (Must Have)
- Experience with data preparation, data pipelines, or MLOps is a plus.
- Understanding of modern software engineering practices, including CI/CD, Git, and containerization.
- Ability to follow secure development methodologies, especially in areas such as:- osecurity requirements analysis- oinput validation and data integrity checks- osecure integration of AI components- ologging, monitoring, and auditability- oAI risk management and mitigation of model vulnerabilities
- Knowledge of cybersecurity principles is an advantage.
benefits:
- Base Salary: Negotiable
- 13th bonus salary, project bonus
- Merit reviews every year
- Meal allowance
- Annual leave: 14 days/year + 3 days/year Christmas
- Annual health check
- Health insurance
- Other benefits

title: [HYBRID] Senior Java Developer

jobDescription:

Software Development

System Design & Architecture

Testing & Quality Assurance

- Apply best practices in test automation (JUnit, Mockito, BDD frameworks such as Cucumber/JBehave)

DevOps & CI/CD

- Work with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools (Jenkins, Git, Gradle, etc.)

Collaboration & Agile Delivery

- Participate in code reviews, knowledge sharing, and mentoring junior engineers
requirements:

Preferred Skills & Experience

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD tools and build systems (Gradle – Groovy/Kotlin DSL, Jenkins, Ant)

- Strong understanding of Agile development methodologies
- Experience working on large-scale, global applications
benefits:

title: DevOps Manager
reasons:
- Positive work environment, support & determination
- Very attractive salary & benefits
- Development opportunities & improve a quality life
jobDescription:
Primary Objectives

• As a DevOps Manager, you are responsible for strategizing and operating a centralized DevOps Service to support multiple product lines. You will act as a strategic liaison to facilitate smooth operational transitions, infrastructure problem-solving, and seamless handovers across technical units.• Additionally, you will integrate advanced reliability and security standards into the software development lifecycle to ensure maximum performance and protection for all products. This includes maintaining strict compliance with cybersecurity best practices and corporate information security policies.

Main responsibilities

• Drive the establishment of SLAs and standardized CI/CD toolchains to empower development teams across Trading and Investment Banking, ensuring a seamless and rapid time-to-market.• Promote a security-first culture by embedding automated security testing (SAST, DAST, and container security) into the delivery pipeline, ensuring every product meets strict security requirements before production release.• Architect robust monitoring and observability frameworks; define SLIs/SLOs to ensure high availability of mission-critical services while partnering with engineering teams to optimize system performance• Act as a key bridge between IT Service, Infrastructure, and Security teams to design scalable Cloud/On-premises architectures and proactively eliminate operational bottlenecks.• Lead the transformation toward Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and GitOps, driving operational efficiency and mitigating risks through advanced automation frameworks

Other responsibilities

• Drive the continuous development of team capabilities through proactive mentorship and knowledge transfer, ensuring the consistent maintenance of high-level delivery standards across all projects• Champion DevOps, SRE, and Software Security principles across the organization, serving as a technical authority to instill a culture of excellence• Lead R&D on emerging technologies to propose and implement innovative solutions that strengthen the platform's competitive edge
requirements:
1. Educational level

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field

2. Knowledge & Experiences

• Over 7 years of professional experience in DevOps, System Administration, or Software Engineering• Deep expertise in DevSecOps and SRE operational models. A proven track record of integrating robust security standards throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)• Extensive expertise in microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and the deployment of distributed systems• Direct experience in administering and operating Cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) and Containerization/Orchestration ecosystems (Kubernetes, GKE, RKE)• Proven experience in establishing and managing a DevOps Service model to support multiple concurrent product development teams

3. Technical skills

• Designing and implementing complex, large-scale CI/CD pipelines • Expertise in IaC (Terraform, Ansible) and the GitOps framework (ArgoCD)• Designing and deploying comprehensive Monitoring/Observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK, APM) for multi-cluster Kubernetes environments• Troubleshooting, log analysis, and bug fixing at the network and application architectural level• Integrating robust security tools and automated scanning into development pipelines

4. Soft skills

• Demonstrated ability to perform under high pressure and execute swift, decisive actions within a fast-paced Agile/Scrum environment• A process-oriented and system-thinking mindset, with the ability to resolve complex problems through the lens of risk management and resource optimization• Proven ability to transfer knowledge and provide guidance to elevate technical capabilities across the team• Strong negotiation and communication skills used to align expectations between innovation-driven initiatives and system stability requirements
benefits:

Primary benefits:

- Review Salary and performance annual
- 18+ Annual Leaves​, 5 sick leaves, 1 day off birthday
- Full 100% Social Insurance, Annual Medical Check- up​, Health insurance
- Team Building and company activities: Year- end Party, New-year Party, Company trip, Charity activities
- Learning workshops: e-learning, English courses, career development training programs​
- Sports clubs: gym, yoga, running, football, tennis, badminton

⭐️ Perifit is a profitable and fast-growing femtech startup based in Paris, France, with a software team based in Ho Chi Minh City. Turnover was multiplied by 100 in 5 years!

reasons:

jobDescription:
Job Description

Our HCM is an enterprise HR SaaS platform currently in active operation and continuous expansion. The system covers Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations, and Custom Modules for Enterprise Clients.

The Senior DevOps Engineer will lead and optimize DevOps practices for Humanica’s HR SaaS platform, managing CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD), implementing GitOps workflows, and automating infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible. The role includes designing and executing modern deployment strategies such as blue-green and canary releases, managing Kubernetes environments, and enforcing Infrastructure as Code (IaC), deployment standards, runbooks, and rollback procedures. This position will integrate automated testing and quality gates into pipelines, monitor deployment health through the observability stack, lead incident response for infrastructure issues, mentor team members, and continuously improve deployment velocity, reliability, and cost efficiency.

Key Responsibilities

- Manage and optimize CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD)
- Implement GitOps workflows and deployment automation
- Automate infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible
- Design and implement deployment strategies (blue-green, canary)
- Manage Kubernetes deployments, services, and configurations
- Establish deployment standards, runbooks, and rollback procedures
- Build automated testing and quality gates in CI/CD pipeline
- Implement infrastructure as code (IaC) for all infrastructure
- Monitor deployment health and integrate with observability stack
- Lead incident response for deployment and infrastructure issues
- Mentor DevOps team members and establish best practices
- Optimize deployment velocity, reliability, and cost
requirements:
Experience

- 5+ years DevOps or infrastructure automation experience
- Expert in CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)
- Strong Kubernetes experience (deployments, services, ingress, helm)
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
- GitOps practices and ArgoCD
- Scripting and automation (Bash, Python, Go)
- Cloud platforms (AWS, Huawei Cloud)
- Monitoring and observability (Prometheus, Grafana)
- Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
- Team collaboration and mentorship capabilities

Preferred:

- Multi-cloud deployment experience
- Container security and image scanning
- Kubernetes operators and custom resources
- FinOps and cost optimization
- SRE practices and reliability engineering
- Certifications: CKA, CKAD, AWS/Cloud certifications
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field

- Working Hours: Flexible with some after-hours work for deployments and maintenance
- Location: On-site only

Language

title: Mid to Senior Fullstack Developer (NodeJS/Javascript)
reasons:
- Profitable startup from Year 1!
- High pay, MacBook Pro, $1000 annual development
- Work with top talent on product changing industry
jobDescription:
About the Opportunity

We are looking for an elite Internal Tools Builder to act as the engine behind our company's operations. As we evolve into a full-funnel marketing platform serving over 600k+ verified users, our internal operations, ERP, and tooling need to scale just as fast.

In this role, you will work directly with company leadership to identify operational bottlenecks and build custom internal systems from the ground up. You will not be handed a perfect ticket; you will be handed a business problem. We need a highly autonomous Fullstack Engineer with a relentless "builder mindset" who can lead the topic, architect the system, and collaborate with other engineers to get it across the finish line.

What You Will Do

You will not just "write code." You will own internal products end-to-end. Your core challenges will include:

- Build the Engine: Architect and build robust internal tools, ERP modules, and operational systems across the entire stack (Database -> API -> UI) to make our internal teams wildly efficient.
- Direct Collaboration with Leadership: You will work directly with leadership/the boss. You must be comfortable hopping on a call, translating a vague business problem into a technical roadmap, and executing it.
- Lead the Topic: You are the technical owner. You will drive the architecture, make the hard technical trade-offs, and push back when necessary to ensure we are building the right thing.
- Mentorship & Collaboration: You won't be doing it entirely alone. You will pair with and mentor a junior engineer—delegating tasks effectively, doing code reviews, and helping them level up their full-stack skills.
- Performance & Architecture: Balance speed with stability. Know when an internal tool just needs a quick MVP to save the team 10 hours a week, and when a system needs to be highly scalable to handle massive data throughput.
requirements:
What You Need to Be Successful

We hire for mindset first, technology second.

1. The Builder Mindset

- Idea to Reality: You thrive on ambiguity. You can take a vague request ("We are losing track of customer billing edge-cases") and independently architect the database, build the API, and craft the UI to solve it.
- Internal Systems Expertise: You have experience building internal tools, ERPs, CRMs, or admin dashboards. You know how to stitch together third-party APIs, webhooks, and internal databases.

2. Engineering Skills

- Deep Experience (5+ Years): You have a strong foundation in building complex, production-ready web applications.
- Fullstack Fluency: You are completely comfortable jumping between backend logic (API design, complex SQL/Database modeling) and the frontend (React, state management) without skipping a beat.

3. Communication & Leadership

- Exceptional Communicator: Because you work directly with leadership, your written and spoken English must be excellent. You can explain complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders clearly and confidently.
- Force Multiplier: You have the patience and communication skills to mentor a junior engineer, breaking down complex architectures into actionable tasks for them.
benefits:
Impact: The tools you build will instantly become the backbone of how our company operates daily.

Culture: We are a lean, fast-growing team that values Good Design, Trust, and Empowerment. We invest in our people and give them the autonomy to do their best work.

Perks:

- Highly competitive salary + 13th-month bonus.
- Stock options for high contributors.
- Professional development package of up to $1,000/year.
- Modern office with top-notch equipment (MacBook Pro).
- Comprehensive healthcare package (Annual health check, Premium Health Insurance).
- Flexible working hours with a standard 5-day workweek

jobDescription:
About The Opportunity

You will join a high-energy, global team where Design is our competitive advantage.

Flodesk is evolving into a full-funnel marketing platform - spanning email, forms, checkout, and workflows - all designed to help small businesses grow effortlessly.

We're looking for a Middle to Senior Frontend Engineer to build intuitive, intelligent interfaces that simplify complex marketing tasks and empower our users to achieve more with less effort.

What you will do

You will not just "convert Figma to Code". Your core challenges will include:

- Craft delightful, intuitive interfaces that anticipate user needs across our product suite, including email, forms, checkout, and workflow automation.
- Build AI-powered features that help users accomplish more: smarter writing assistance, auto-generated designs, and intelligent workflows.
- Optimize for performance, accessibility, and stability. Drive 80%+ test coverage and maintain our scalable component library across products.

requirements:
What you need to be successful

We hire for mindset first, technology second. To succeed here, you need:

Engineering Skills

- Frontend Mastery: You have deep skills in TypeScript and React (Hooks, Context). You understand how React works under the hood (re-rendering, virtual DOM).

Product & Design Mindset

title: Security Network Engineer
reasons:
- Competitive salary
- Full statutory insurance
- Professional, international working environment
jobDescription:
About Safetrust

Safetrust is building the future of identity.

Imagine a world where your phone, wearable, or digital credential becomes your secure key—unlocking buildings, systems, and experiences seamlessly across physical and digital environments.

That’s what we do.

Our platform combines IoT devices, mobile credentials, and cloud-native architecture to power secure access for Fortune 200 companies and global enterprises.

As we evolve from a hardware-centric model to a platform and services-driven business, marketing plays a critical role in shaping how the market understands—and adopts—Safetrust.

About the role

The Security & Network Engineer is responsible for the design, deployment, and ongoing operation of the network and security infrastructure across Safetrust's Vietnam sites. This includes the Q7 factory deployment, which features Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, Catalyst switching, and a layered network architecture supporting both office and manufacturing environments.

This role works closely with the IT Operations & Access Management Manager, the Global IT Admin, and the Security & Compliance team to ensure the local environment meets Safetrust's global security standards, including alignment with NIST and other compliance frameworks.

Key Responsibilities

Network Engineering & Operations

- Design, deploy, and maintain Cisco switching infrastructure across Vietnam sites, including core, distribution, and access layers.
- Configure, harden, and operate Cisco Firepower next-generation firewalls, including high-availability pair configuration where applicable.
- Plan and implement VLAN segmentation, routing, VPN connectivity to the US headquarters, and secure remote access for employees.
- Monitor network performance and capacity, troubleshoot incidents, and lead root-cause analysis for network and connectivity issues.
- Maintain accurate, version-controlled configuration backups and network diagrams.

Security & Compliance

- Implement and maintain firewall rules, access policies, intrusion prevention, and content filtering aligned with Safetrust security standards.
- Support the Security & Compliance team in NIST-aligned controls, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
- Participate in incident response activities for network and security events.
- Review and harden configurations on switches, firewalls, and access points before they are placed into production.

Collaboration & Documentation

- Work with the Global IT Admin and counterparts in other regions to ensure consistent network standards across Safetrust locations.
- Produce clear technical documentation, including network designs, runbooks, and standard operating procedures.
- Contribute network and security asset records into the IT Asset Management (ITAM) framework and CMDB.
- Coordinate with vendors and local Cisco partners on procurement, support contracts, and complex deployments.

Wireless and emerging needs

- Plan and deploy enterprise wireless infrastructure to support office, factory, and guest networks.
- Support the integration of Safetrust's own access management products into the corporate environment where applicable.
requirements:
Skills & Experience

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Network Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience administering enterprise network infrastructure, with strong Cisco focus.
- Demonstrated experience with Cisco firewall platforms — Firepower (FTD/FMC), ASA, or equivalent next-generation firewall technology.
- Solid working knowledge of Cisco Catalyst switching, including VLAN, trunking, spanning tree, link aggregation, and inter-VLAN routing.
- Experience with site-to-site VPN, remote access VPN, and secure connectivity between distributed offices.
- Strong understanding of TCP/IP, routing protocols, DHCP, DNS, NAT, and network security fundamentals.
- Working English communication skills, both written and verbal, sufficient for collaboration with the US headquarters and other regional teams.

Success Profile

The ideal candidate:

- Brings a measured and methodical approach to changes in production environments, prioritizing thoughtful design and thorough review over rushed deployments.
- Is comfortable raising concerns about scope, risk, or readiness, and proactively offer constructive, solution-oriented alternatives.
- Demonstrates strong written documentation practices, ensuring clarity, consistency, and knowledge sharing across the team.
- Is collaborative and willing to mentor and support junior team members.
- Is highly self-sufficient, able to work independently across time zones with minimal oversight while maintaining alignment with team priorities.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and performance
- Daily lunch provided at the office
- Free coffee, tea, and refreshments
- Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment)
- Annual health check-up and paid annual leave
- Professional, international working environment

title: ReactJS Frontend Developer (JavaScript)
reasons:
- Làm việc với các công nghệ mới nhất
- Lĩnh vực chứng khoán, tài chính hấp dẫn
- Liên tục được đào tạo chuyên môn, kĩ năng
jobDescription:
- Lập trình các tính năng trên nền tảng Web (ReactJS), đảm bảo độ chính xác tuyệt đối theo thiết kế Figma và các nghiệp vụ chứng khoán phức tạp (đặt lệnh, quản lý danh mục, bảng giá).
- Tham gia duy trì và hiện đại hóa các dự án ReactJS hiện có; đọc hiểu nhanh source code phức tạp để tối ưu hoặc chuyển đổi công nghệ.
- Xây dựng Base Code & Kiến trúc: Trực tiếp phân tích yêu cầu từ phía Business, thiết kế kiếntrúc Frontend (Micro-frontends hoặc Monorepo) để dễ dàng mở rộng và phối hợp team đông người.
- Tối ưu Performance: Profiling và giải quyết các bài toán thắt nút cổ chai. Xử lý triệt để việc re-render thừa, đảm bảo bảng giá cập nhật real-time mượt mà (60 FPS), xử lý hàng ngàn bản ghi dữ liệu mà không gây lag trình duyệt.
- Giám sát Hệ thống (Monitoring) & Xử lý sự cố.
- Thiết lập và quản lý hệ thống giám sát lỗi tập trung (DevTools, Sentry, LogRocket, Datadog...) để phát hiện sớm các lỗi xảy ra trên trình duyệt của khách hàng.
- Chủ động theo dõi log, phân tích tỉ lệ lỗi và đưa ra phương án xử lý (Hotfix) thần tốc, đặc biệt là trong giờ giao dịch cao điểm.
- Ứng dụng AI & Giao tiếp (Communication).
- Sử dụng thành thạo các AI Agent (Antigravity, Cursor, Copilot, Claude...) để tăng tốc độ viết code, Unit Test và tối ưu hóa logic nghiệp vụ.
- Đóng vai trò "phiên dịch viên" kỹ thuật: Giải thích các rào cản công nghệ cho bộ phận nghiệp vụ (BA/PO) và đề xuất giải pháp thay thế hiệu quả.
- Giao tiếp kỹ thuật trực tiếp với khách hàng để làm rõ các vấn đề liên quan đến kỹ thuật.
requirements:
Kiến thức & Kỹ năng bắt buộc (Must-have):

- Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan.
- Có ít nhất 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình ReactJS.
- Nắm vững kiến trúc React: Virtual DOM, Fiber Engine, Reconciliation, và Hooks API.
- Kinh nghiệm thực chiến với State Management: Redux-Saga, Redux Toolkit, Zustand hoặc TanStack Query (React Query).
- Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu thời gian thực với WebSockets (Socket.io) hoặc Server-Sent Events (SSE).
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các thư viện biểu đồ tài chính (Highcharts, Lightweight Charts, TradingView Charting Library).
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các css (style-component, tailwind,...)
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc trơn tru với các bản thiết kế từ Figma.
- Sử dụng thành thạo Git (GitHub/GitLab) và quy trình Git Flow.
- Kỹ năng Nâng cao: Kỹ năng AI, có tư duy sử dụng Prompt Engineering để giải quyết các bài toán thuật toán khó hoặc refactor code cũ.
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Hiểu biết về thị trường chứng khoán (Lệnh LO/MP/FS, nến Nhật, chỉ số kỹ thuật) là một lợi thế cực lớn.
- Khả năng Mentor, Review code và thiết kế quy trình CI/CD cho Frontend.

Điểm cộng:

- Sẵn sàng nghiên cứu các giải pháp WebAssembly cho các tính toán tài chính cực nặng.
- Có khả năng làm thêm mảng Mobile (Flutter).
- Có thể đọc hiểu hoặc code được Backend bằng Java (Spring Boot / Java Core) để dễ dàng phối hợp xử lý luồng API với đội Backend.
benefits:
Cơ hội phát triển

- Được làm việc với các chuyên gia công nghệ với trên 15 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực tài chính, fintech
- Số lượng giải pháp và các sản phẩm rất nhiều với nhiều thử thách đa dạng, giúp phát triển nghề nghiệp.
- Luôn được tiếp cận công nghệ mới nhất, tối ưu hóa năng lực sản xuất phần mềm
- Quy trình phát triển DevOps, tự động hóa nhiều trong quy trình
- Giải pháp tổng thể từ Front Office (iOS, Android, Flutter, ReactJS, .NET) – Middleware – Back Office với nhiều công nghệ chuyên sâu J2EE, Sping Framework, jBase, Nodejs, Apache Kafka, Apache Spark, Apache Flink, Hadoop, ElasticSearch, Oracle Database, SQL Server, Memory Database, Caching…được triển khai tại nhiều tổ chức tài chính, chứng khoán hàng đầu thế giới
- Được tham gia vào các dự án phần mềm, các mô hình phát triển ứng dụng cao cấp với các đối tác hàng đầu Nhật Bản: các ứng dụng trong lĩnh vực tài chính, fintech
- Được tiếp cận và đào tạo theo quy trình quản lý dự án phần mềm chuyên nghiệp theo chuẩn Nhật Bản như ISO 9001:2013, ISMS ISO 27001:2013

Chế độ đãi ngộ

- Lương cứng + Lương tháng thứ 13 + thưởng các dịp lễ, tết + lương hiệu quả kinh doanh;
- Có chế độ riêng cho các leader ở các cấp khác nhau
- Hưởng bảo hiểm xã hội, bảo hiểm y tế theo chế độ nhà nước ban hành.
- Thưởng dự án, review kết quả công việc 6 tháng một lần.
- Tuần làm việc 5 ngày, nghỉ thứ bảy, chủ nhật và các ngày lễ tết. Làm thêm ngoài giờ được tính tiền làm thêm = 150% ngày bình thường.
- Khám tổng thể sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm tại các bệnh viện quốc tế
- Du lịch 1 năm tối thiểu 1 lần, tháng tháng/quý có các hoạt động ngoại khóa, team building
- Được đào tạo hàng tuần về chuyên môn kĩ thuật, nghiệp vụ và các chương trình đào tạo kĩ năng mềm khác như quản lý dự án, quản lý cảm xúc, não bộ, sức khỏe, giải tỏa stress, thiền cho kĩ sư…

Văn hóa

- Môi trường Fintech chuyên sâu, nơi công nghệ và tài chính hội tụ.
- Cơ hội trực tiếp ứng dụng AI vào quy trình phát triển phần mềm.
- Quản lý chuyên nghiệp, thưởng theo dự án, đánh giá định lượng
- Làm việc với quy trình tinh gọn, khuyến khích sáng tạo, học hỏi và nghiên cứu.
- Lộ trình phát triển rõ ràng hướng tới Tech Lead / Solution Architect.
- Văn hóa tôn trọng cá nhân, đề cao hiệu quả thực tế và tinh thần đổi mới.
